**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

July ended as the hottest month on record, team.

In Florida, ocean temperatures reached 101.2° – the temperature most hot tubs are set at. In Arizona, many saguaro cacti, known for their ability to weather the arid heat, died as temperatures rose to 110° degrees for over 25 days.

And right here in Washington, we are seeing more wildfires, earlier growing seasons, warmer temperatures in our tributaries, and more species becoming extinct.

**Kim knows climate change is one of the greatest issues of our time, and we only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment.**

That's why Kim helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which makes the single largest investment in climate solutions ever, and the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which included provisions she championed to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more.

But to combat climate change, we have more work ahead of us.

**[If you agree, we need to recommit to combating climate change and protecting our environment, join Kim by signing your name today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67743039/420695239/-340167354?ms=em23_230807_climat_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230807_climat_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230807_climat_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230807_climat_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zHe/BijkYcnNsr1TYEns4dM2qhdaUL8t/de9k2G+D5bbwYWYLFXCMnMJ6EfO3KHyGRBzQ7OUIaJZQUfDeZIG7t0iBXOtnDyvnHkfjPANGMSddQ4Q0Lnc5mzCFEpwyJHbriF0KRdCwqGcl/oVf84RmhrEJ4u2R8WFSlYMqjXjCN8=&refcode2=65b03d82-7e35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWIwM2Q4Mi03ZTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npkWaCVbLvqbt8T6WN6urEpK_qpCW_idrFNSnMW2Hr0=&emci=01f34d31-3b32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=65b03d82-7e35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: Peter, our climate can’t wait for action July 2023 was the hottest month on record, Peter. Climate change is real, and Kim knows it's one of the greatest issues of our time. There's so much more to do to combat climate change – from regulating Big Oil to passing legislation to prevent forest fires. Will you join Kim in the fight to combat climate change? \----------Begin Forwarded Message--------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: 🚨“July was the world's hottest month, in an era of climate records” Date: Saturday, August 5th, 2023 | July was the world's hottest month, in an era of climate records | July ended as the hottest month on record, team. In Florida, ocean temperatures reached 101.2° – the temperature most hot tubs are set at. In Arizona, many saguaro cacti, known for their ability to weather the arid heat, died as temperatures rose to 110° degrees for over 25 days. And right here in Washington, we are seeing more wildfires, earlier growing seasons, warmer temperatures in our tributaries, and more species becoming extinct. Kim knows climate change is one of the greatest issues of our time, and we only have a few years to make major changes before we see irreversible and profound damage to our environment. That's why Kim helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which makes the single largest investment in climate solutions ever, and the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which included provisions she championed to make our forests more resilient to wildfires, protect our rivers and streams, and more. But to combat climate change, we have more work ahead of us. Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Joe Kent
subject: Republicans have lost the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Redistricting in New York means Republicans will lose **_seven_** Republican House seats, and the Democrats only need **_three_** to gain a majority.
A court ruling has allowed the Democrat-dominated New York state legislature to redraw the congressional lines and eliminate seven Republican-held seats.
That is why it is critical I flip Washington's Third District and win this seat. We cannot afford to aid the Democrats in their quest for a House majority by letting one of their most liberal members - Marie Gluesenkamp Perez - win re-election.
If you believe we need to send Republicans to Congress, please help me get to Washington by contributing to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/lbNy7v7t7634X763SLY55wGQHg/EI892YDWyhMh2TrEHzPlvahg).
Marie Perez and her fellow Democrats are pushing forward a radical left-wing agenda. They voted against protecting the Second Amendment, funding the VA, and prohibiting biological males from competing in women's sports.
Marie voted **_against_** cutting burdensome red tape and helping small businesses. She is aligned with the Democrat's Green New Deal regulatory agenda that will crush the American economy.
When I get to DC, I promise to fight to protect our freedoms and defend them from encroachments by the Democratic Party.
Help me with a donation today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/lbNy7v7t7634X763SLY55wGQHg/EI892YDWyhMh2TrEHzPlvahg).
Marie Perez has financial support from major establishment donors, but I rely on grassroots donations from individuals like you. Please help me close the gap by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/lbNy7v7t7634X763SLY55wGQHg/EI892YDWyhMh2TrEHzPlvahg). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
Republicans cannot afford to lose this seat. You can help me expose Marie's voting record by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/lbNy7v7t7634X763SLY55wGQHg/EI892YDWyhMh2TrEHzPlvahg).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a common-sense conservative to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS - Turn your anger about Democrats gerrymandering into action! Help me win so I can FIGHT for Americans by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/lbNy7v7t7634X763SLY55wGQHg/EI892YDWyhMh2TrEHzPlvahg).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1008&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9

UNTIL POLLS CLOSE IN OHIO!
RUSH $10 NOW >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1009&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

Peter Willis — Polls close in less than 24 hours in Ohio and Diane and her team on the ground are rushing to close the gap and get supporters to the polls.

Will you stand with us in this fight against far-right abortion extremists and chip in $10 or more RIGHT NOW to help our team get every last supporter to the polls? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1010&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
DONATE $10 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9545?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1011&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
DONATE $25 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9545?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1012&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
DONATE $50 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9545?amount=50&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1013&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
The stakes could not be higher. If these right-wing extremists win in Ohio, they’ll use this as the template to tear down democracy and abortion rights across the country.

Thank you for taking action in this critical fight — and please read Diane’s message from the front lines.

------------------------------------------------------------
Begin forwarded message from Diane Morgan:

Peter Willis,

Diane Morgan here, National Mobilization Coordinator for Our Revolution. I’m writing to you from my home state of Ohio — where we have 48 hours to win a crucial fight against anti-abortion extremists. Will you rush a contribution of 10 right now so we can mobilize our supporters and defeat this right-wing attack? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1014&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

FIGHT BACK >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1015&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

Right now in Ohio, anti-abortion politicians and their billionaire backers are trying to change the state constitution in order to block a November ballot measure to protect abortion rights — and the mainstream media isn’t paying any attention.

The vast majority of my fellow Ohioans oppose our state’s draconian abortion ban, but that hasn’t stopped our opponents from spending MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars to call a special election to try to change the rules.

They’ve intentionally called this special election for this Tuesday, in the dead of summer — in the hopes that nobody is paying attention, because they know that their extremist, anti-abortion views won’t win if a majority of Ohioans turn out to vote.

Now it’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it. We’re on the ground turning out voters, but it’s going to take a MASSIVE PUSH in these last 48 hours to win this fight. That’s why we’re counting on you to chip in $10 or more today to get us over the finish line >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1016&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9545?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1017&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9546?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1018&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9547?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1019&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1020&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9549?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1021&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1022&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)
Here’s the thing, Peter Willis: If these right-wing extremists win the day in Ohio, they won’t stop. They’ll report back to their billionaire donors and ask for more money to fund their new template to tear down democracy and abortion care in other states.

The buck stops here. It’s up to us to win this fight and show anti-abortion extremists across the whole country that there is unified, mobilized opposition wherever they go. Will you chip in $10 or more to stand with us in this fight today? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_abortionalertviaourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1023&akid=4528%2E5885482%2Eo0bLK9)

In solidarity,

Diane Morgan
Our Revolution Mobilization Coordinator

SOS America PAC is working hard to get Miami Mayor Francis Suarez on the GOP Presidential debate stage in August...

...but to qualify, **he needs 40,000 individual donors giving at least a dollar.**

Whether or not you support Mayor Suarez, **we think the GOP will benefit _tremendously_ from hearing from a bold, young conservative mayor who won 80% of the vote in a major city** during his reelection campaign.

In Miami, Mayor Suarez has:
* **Slashed** the number of homeless people,
* **Created** massive economic and population boom, AND
* **Cut** bureaucracy and **restored** power to the people!

That’s a record and a story that **deserves to be heard by the American people** in this primary.

We’re not asking for you to cast your vote for Mayor Suarez...we’re just asking for you to **give him a fighting chance to make his case to Republican primary voters** on the debate stage.

| | Weekly Team Emord Volunteer Opportunity Email
---
| |
---
| | Team Emord, We hope this email finds you well and filled with excitement for our ongoing campaign to Save Virginia. As a valued member of our dedicated team, we appreciate your commitment and willingness to help us make a difference. This weekly update is specifically tailored to our team members who have indicated their interest in volunteering for the campaign. Feel free to forward this email to anyone you think might be interested in joining our cause! In addition, if you know someone who would like to be added to our weekly volunteer opportunity email, please have them email us at info@emordforva.com. We welcome new volunteers and greatly appreciate your efforts in spreading the word. If you have an event you would like us to attend, please email Samantha at scheduling@emordforva.com.
---
| | |
---
| |
## Upcoming Events
---
| |
### Tuesday, August 8, 2023
---
| | Event: Lunenburg GOP MeetingDate: Tuesday, August 8, 2023Location: 1812 Main St, Victoria, VA 23974Time: 6 pm - 7:30 pmDescription: Join us at the Lunenburg GOP meeting.Volunteers: We need volunteers to help us pass out campaign material. If you can help us out, please respond to this email.
---
| |
### Wednesday, August 9, 2023
---
| | Event: Meet and Greet in Orange CountyDate: Wednesday, August 9, 2023Location: Madison at the Mill, 323 N Madison Rd h, Orange, VA 22960Time: 6:30 pm - 8 pmDescription: Join us at Madison at the Mill for a meet and greet.Volunteers: We need volunteers to help staff this event to greet people, sign up new volunteers, and pass out campaign material. If you can help us out, please respond to this email.
---
| | |
---
| | We believe that your participation and dedication are critical to our success. If you are available and would like to volunteer at any of these events, please respond to this email and let us know which events you would like to support. Our volunteer coordinator will reach out to you with further details and instructions. Thank you for being part of the Emord Campaign Team and for your unwavering commitment. Together, we will achieve victory in this race and bring positive change to Virginia.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: This is the future the Biden Administration risks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
However, we can choose a different future. Recent history illuminates a practical path to peace.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hiroshima_non_donors_2&n=1)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y_DJtb2riNWJvQzNQXHTfwhYwsq09wF-D0v4zYjKajN-&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hiroshima_non_donors_2&n=2) Peter -- [**This is the future the Biden Administration risks by escalating the war in Ukraine.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y_DJtb2riNWJvQzNQXHTfwhYwsq09wF-D0v4zYjKajN-&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hiroshima_non_donors_2&n=3) However, we can choose a different future. Recent history illuminates a practical path to peace. According to US National Security Council official Fiona Hill and former Israeli PM Naftali Bennett, Ukraine and Russia agreed on the terms of a negotiated peace in March 2022\. Russia pledged to retreat to pre-invasion lines and Ukraine pledged not to join NATO in exchange for security guarantees from a number of Western countries. Both Bennett and Hill tell the same story. Leaders from Washington and London arrived to scuttle the deal and prolong the conflict in the hopes of exhausting the Russian military on the grist of Ukrainian teenagers. As President I will revive the peace that almost was. I will negotiate in good faith and propose that Russia pull out of the territory it has seized in eastern Ukraine. UN peacekeepers will ensure the safety of ethnic Russians there and maintain order so that people can rebuild. In return, I will remove Aegis missile systems from Russia's borders and pull NATO troops out of the region. This week, as we mark the nuclear destruction of Hiroshima and Nagasaki, we must ask ourselves: Is having Ukraine in NATO worth even the slightest risk of a nuclear winter killing 99% of the people living in the United States today? Is it worth the cost already being paid -- hundreds of thousand of casualties, millions of refugees? Is it worth the billions of American dollars drained from our food banks, our hospitals, our schools and instead detonated in foreign lands to rip young flesh from bone? Is "weakening Russia" worth higher gas bills, higher grocery prices, higher utility bills, higher housing costs, and too little money in your bank account to pay for them? Tell me, President Biden, how is it worth all this to fight a war that could have ended a month after it began? You and I know it's not worth it. With your support, I will lead our nation onto a path to peace. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hiroshima_non_donors_2&n=4 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hiroshima_non_donors_2&n=4)

According to US National Security Council official Fiona Hill and former Israeli PM Naftali Bennett, Ukraine and Russia agreed on the terms of a negotiated peace in March 2022\. Russia pledged to retreat to pre-invasion lines and Ukraine pledged not to join NATO in exchange for security guarantees from a number of Western countries. Both Bennett and Hill tell the same story. Leaders from Washington and London arrived to scuttle the deal and prolong the conflict in the hopes of exhausting the Russian military on the grist of Ukrainian teenagers. As President I will revive the peace that almost was. I will negotiate in good faith and propose that Russia pull out of the territory it has seized in eastern Ukraine. UN peacekeepers will ensure the safety of ethnic Russians there and maintain order so that people can rebuild. In return, I will remove Aegis missile systems from Russia's borders and pull NATO troops out of the region. This week, as we mark the nuclear destruction of Hiroshima and Nagasaki, we must ask ourselves: Is having Ukraine in NATO worth even the slightest risk of a nuclear winter killing 99% of the people living in the United States today? Is it worth the cost already being paid -- hundreds of thousand of casualties, millions of refugees? Is it worth the billions of American dollars drained from our food banks, our hospitals, our schools and instead detonated in foreign lands to rip young flesh from bone? Is "weakening Russia" worth higher gas bills, higher grocery prices, higher utility bills, higher housing costs, and too little money in your bank account to pay for them? Tell me, President Biden, how is it worth all this to fight a war that could have ended a month after it began? You and I know it's not worth it. With your support, I will lead our nation onto a path to peace. | "Give $5 ->" "Give $27 ->" "Give $50 ->" "Give $100 ->" "Give $250 ->" "Other Amount ->" Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.

name: CADEM
subject: CADEM August Newsletter: Forever Organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
FOREVER ORGANIZING
The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state. From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
IN THE FIELD
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/334A593436425A447255446D464875676E7751675461763254694A3344327468414767614C4E435A67473342727943786A5250644D7A585A64466B63566D7862/editor_images/YOungDems.jpg]
Young Democrats in Madera
Together, The Madera Democratic Club and CADEM have helped launch Madera’s first Young Democrats Club! The club is committed to register youth voters and help provide important services in their community. This club is a massive stepping stone to help increase voter turnout in the Central Valley.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/IMG_8013.jpg]
Defending Healthcare from MAGA Republicans
Our South Valley Organizer, Dave Perelman, gathered outside MAGA Rep. David Valadao’s office along with other constituents in CD-22 to demand protection for healthcare.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/376470634858575541696A724D714B68427154593147776E4A767544573736414738626634522B6554324E6149386F373747334F3756736C494137694F4E512F/editor_images/IMG-5411%20-%20Christian%20Pierce_1.jpg]
Registering Students to Vote
CADEM was present at Madera Community College’s Welcome Week to register students to vote. Our North Valley Organizer, Christian Pierce, registered a dozen students!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/IMG_8014.jpg]
Calling On the Issues That Matter
Our Southern California Organizer, Ivan Aguayo, gathered with the Chino Valley Dems, Fontana Dems, Ontario Dems, and the Democratic Party of Orange County to call voters about the issues they care about. We’re hitting the ground running because the path to the House runs through California.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/San%20Mateo%20Democracy%20for%20America%207-14-23%20-%20Sue%20Hilderbrand.jpg]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/San%20Mateo%20Democracy%20for%20America%207-14-23%20-%20Sue%20Hilderbrand.jpg]
Potluck and Politics
Our Northern California Organizing Manager, Sue Hilderbrand, met with the San Mateo Democrats for their Summer Potluck. Some of these Democrats have been organizing together for about 20 years!
MEET THE INTERNS
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/Arianna%20Lema%20%281%29.jpeg] Hello, I'm Arianna Lema, a compassionate and caring individual who deeply values humanity. Creating comfortable spaces for people is important to me, and I take pride in being a sister and a mother figure to my four siblings. Currently, I am attending Bakersfield Community College with the plan to transfer to a four-year institution. While I have spent my entire life in Kern County, I have also had the opportunity to travel outside the state to learn about different communities. My love for animals runs deep and I share my life with six cats and two dogs. I dream of one day owning a ranch filled with various animals.
My involvement in politics began with a profound personal experience during a Chicano studies course. Learning about my family history during an assignment in that class ignited within me a call to action. This passion led me to participate in community council meetings and actively engage in local politics. My commitment deepened when I received a job offer from my Chicano studies professor to work with the Dolores Huerta Foundation, further fueling my interest in politics. Through these experiences, I have come to recognize the power of community grassroots activism in driving policy change.
I identify as a Democrat because the party aligns with my core values– social justice, equality, inclusivity, and economic opportunity for all. I support policies and initiatives that address systemic inequalities, protect civil rights, promote environmental sustainability, and expand access to healthcare and education. I firmly believe that the Democratic Party's approach to governance and policy-making aligns with my dedication to creating a fair and just society for all individuals.
Passionate About
Women's reproductive rights
Human rights of migrants
Police reform
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/Alvina%20Shea%20%282%29_1.jpg] Hi, I'm Alvina Shea. I was born and raised in San Francisco but I now live in Los Angeles as a third-year student at UCLA, majoring in Public Affairs. Along with my studies, I serve as an intern in Senator Dianne Feinstein's office and hold the role of Director of Civic Engagement in the undergraduate student government at UCLA.
Growing up, my parents' access to information about civic engagement was limited, which sparked my curiosity about politics. During high school, I took it upon myself to educate myself on current events and how government and politics impact our lives. This journey led me to form my own opinions and perspectives.
I'm a Democrat because I'm passionate about improving the quality of life for all people and communities, including those often overlooked by many policymakers. I want to see change in problems that plague my city, state, and country.
Passionate About
Reproductive rights
Environment
Housing
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/2B4B46427670754B734C7A665630704D366168487579306772793334715844466766764D2F6F514E775A484A4E363167397A3977495A6F346962455830744934/editor_images/Christian%20Figueroa%20%281%29.jpeg] Hi, I'm Christian! I am an 18-year-old lifelong activist living in Los Angeles County and currently studying Public Policy at Stanford University. My passion for creating "a more perfect union" in my community has driven me to be deeply involved in various local nonprofit organizations, as well as national, state, and local political campaigns. Additionally, I have a background in engineering and computer science and have worked on projects related to satellites, space, and defense.
My involvement in politics began at a young age, inspired by my grandmother's extensive activist work, which instilled in me the belief that I can make a meaningful difference in my community and contribute to building a better future for all generations.
As a Democrat, I firmly believe that everyone, regardless of their background or class, deserves a fair and equal opportunity to achieve the American Dream. I envision a future where we take decisive action on climate change, prioritize education, provide affordable housing, and create an economy that benefits everyone. These values and priorities are why I proudly identify as a lifelong Democrat and plan to run as one for Congress one day!
Passionate About
LGBTQ+ Rights
Mental Health Policy
Climate & Technology Policy
DEMOCRATS OF CALIFORNIA
The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6D2F3732517A4B4E4E617373315A6479334B2B614633386B333278334F6F6C75744C7352396E365663663641545363746263732B464241554C4A4957666F7A69/editor_images/randy-evans.png] Randy Evans
My name is Randy Evans, and I am originally from Columbus, Ohio, but I grew up in Rolling Meadows, northwest of Chicago. I am a musician who enjoys traveling and gardening and am currently located in South Valley.
Being a Democrat has been a constant part of my life. From a young age, I was encouraged to give back to the community. In high school, I became involved in politics by opposing a proposal that would have negatively impacted high school performing arts programs. Through phone banking and canvassing efforts, we successfully defeated the initiative with 80% of the vote against it. Since then, I have been actively engaged in various political campaigns both in the Bay Area and the Central Valley. I currently serve as the Secretary of Visalia Democrats and am a Central Committee member.
In 2023, I had the honor of attending my first state convention as an elected delegate for Assembly District 23. I have a keen interest in getting involved with the rural and environmental caucus to address important issues in those areas.
My primary focus is on increasing Democratic voter registration and recruiting candidates who truly embody Democratic values at the local level. Additionally, I am committed to staying connected with youth who leave the area to pursue educational opportunities, with the personal goal of getting more young professionals actively engaged in the Democratic Party.
Diversity is crucial to me, and I believe that the LGBT community is currently underrepresented in the central valley. I am dedicated to increasing visibility and participation from the LGBT community, advocating for their rights and perspectives within the Democratic Party and beyond.
TAKE ACTION
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/PhoneankLaunch.png]

clean_body: FOREVER ORGANIZING The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state. From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. IN THE FIELD [] Young Democrats in Madera Together, The Madera Democratic Club and CADEM have helped launch Madera’s first Young Democrats Club! The club is committed to register youth voters and help provide important services in their community. This club is a massive stepping stone to help increase voter turnout in the Central Valley. [] Defending Healthcare from MAGA Republicans Our South Valley Organizer, Dave Perelman, gathered outside MAGA Rep. David Valadao’s office along with other constituents in CD-22 to demand protection for healthcare. [] Registering Students to Vote CADEM was present at Madera Community College’s Welcome Week to register students to vote. Our North Valley Organizer, Christian Pierce, registered a dozen students! [] Calling On the Issues That Matter Our Southern California Organizer, Ivan Aguayo, gathered with the Chino Valley Dems, Fontana Dems, Ontario Dems, and the Democratic Party of Orange County to call voters about the issues they care about. We’re hitting the ground running because the path to the House runs through California. [] [] Potluck and Politics Our Northern California Organizing Manager, Sue Hilderbrand, met with the San Mateo Democrats for their Summer Potluck. Some of these Democrats have been organizing together for about 20 years! MEET THE INTERNS [] Hello, I'm Arianna Lema, a compassionate and caring individual who deeply values humanity. Creating comfortable spaces for people is important to me, and I take pride in being a sister and a mother figure to my four siblings. Currently, I am attending Bakersfield Community College with the plan to transfer to a four-year institution. While I have spent my entire life in Kern County, I have also had the opportunity to travel outside the state to learn about different communities. My love for animals runs deep and I share my life with six cats and two dogs. I dream of one day owning a ranch filled with various animals. My involvement in politics began with a profound personal experience during a Chicano studies course. Learning about my family history during an assignment in that class ignited within me a call to action. This passion led me to participate in community council meetings and actively engage in local politics. My commitment deepened when I received a job offer from my Chicano studies professor to work with the Dolores Huerta Foundation, further fueling my interest in politics. Through these experiences, I have come to recognize the power of community grassroots activism in driving policy change. I identify as a Democrat because the party aligns with my core values– social justice, equality, inclusivity, and economic opportunity for all. I support policies and initiatives that address systemic inequalities, protect civil rights, promote environmental sustainability, and expand access to healthcare and education. I firmly believe that the Democratic Party's approach to governance and policy-making aligns with my dedication to creating a fair and just society for all individuals. Passionate About Women's reproductive rights Human rights of migrants Police reform [] Hi, I'm Alvina Shea. I was born and raised in San Francisco but I now live in Los Angeles as a third-year student at UCLA, majoring in Public Affairs. Along with my studies, I serve as an intern in Senator Dianne Feinstein's office and hold the role of Director of Civic Engagement in the undergraduate student government at UCLA. Growing up, my parents' access to information about civic engagement was limited, which sparked my curiosity about politics. During high school, I took it upon myself to educate myself on current events and how government and politics impact our lives. This journey led me to form my own opinions and perspectives. I'm a Democrat because I'm passionate about improving the quality of life for all people and communities, including those often overlooked by many policymakers. I want to see change in problems that plague my city, state, and country. Passionate About Reproductive rights Environment Housing [] Hi, I'm Christian! I am an 18-year-old lifelong activist living in Los Angeles County and currently studying Public Policy at Stanford University. My passion for creating "a more perfect union" in my community has driven me to be deeply involved in various local nonprofit organizations, as well as national, state, and local political campaigns. Additionally, I have a background in engineering and computer science and have worked on projects related to satellites, space, and defense. My involvement in politics began at a young age, inspired by my grandmother's extensive activist work, which instilled in me the belief that I can make a meaningful difference in my community and contribute to building a better future for all generations. As a Democrat, I firmly believe that everyone, regardless of their background or class, deserves a fair and equal opportunity to achieve the American Dream. I envision a future where we take decisive action on climate change, prioritize education, provide affordable housing, and create an economy that benefits everyone. These values and priorities are why I proudly identify as a lifelong Democrat and plan to run as one for Congress one day! Passionate About LGBTQ+ Rights Mental Health Policy Climate & Technology Policy DEMOCRATS OF CALIFORNIA The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work. [] Randy Evans My name is Randy Evans, and I am originally from Columbus, Ohio, but I grew up in Rolling Meadows, northwest of Chicago. I am a musician who enjoys traveling and gardening and am currently located in South Valley. Being a Democrat has been a constant part of my life. From a young age, I was encouraged to give back to the community. In high school, I became involved in politics by opposing a proposal that would have negatively impacted high school performing arts programs. Through phone banking and canvassing efforts, we successfully defeated the initiative with 80% of the vote against it. Since then, I have been actively engaged in various political campaigns both in the Bay Area and the Central Valley. I currently serve as the Secretary of Visalia Democrats and am a Central Committee member. In 2023, I had the honor of attending my first state convention as an elected delegate for Assembly District 23. I have a keen interest in getting involved with the rural and environmental caucus to address important issues in those areas. My primary focus is on increasing Democratic voter registration and recruiting candidates who truly embody Democratic values at the local level. Additionally, I am committed to staying connected with youth who leave the area to pursue educational opportunities, with the personal goal of getting more young professionals actively engaged in the Democratic Party. Diversity is crucial to me, and I believe that the LGBT community is currently underrepresented in the central valley. I am dedicated to increasing visibility and participation from the LGBT community, advocating for their rights and perspectives within the Democratic Party and beyond. TAKE ACTION [] Don't forget to SAVE THE DATE for the Day of Action on August 26. Eboard Action [] Cafecito Vota [] Call Voters in CD-3 [] Call Voters in CD-13 [] Call Voters in CD-22 [] Call Voters in CD-27 [] Call Voters in CD-40 [] Call Voters in CD-41 [] Call Voters in CD-45 [] Find other volunteer opportunities near you by visiting our CADEM Organizing Linktree. Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sen. Tom Cotton and Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

We’re emailing today because the future of the Senate majority, and with it our entire country, is hanging in the balance.

We’re fellow combat veterans. On the battlefield, we learned that you never retreat. You always advance. And if we’re going to save America in 2024, we must advance in 2023.

**Joe Biden and Senate Democrats are intentionally sabotaging American power. We refuse to let it continue, but we need you standing with us if we’re going to win.**

# AHS Speaker Lineup Announced

[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=5b578a06d5&e=3a42edfdc4)

# CHD 2nd Annual Conference
CHD’s 2nd Annual Conference will be held in Savannah Georgia at the Savannah Convention Center Nov. 3-5, 2023. Registration is now open [here](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a960c106ad&e=3a42edfdc4).
[](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=565e85f34e&e=3a42edfdc4)
There will be over twenty notable speakers including Catherine Austin Fitts, Krishna Doniparthi, M.D., Zen Honeycutt, Leigh Merinoff, Christina parks, Ph.D., Tracy Slepcevic, Monica Smit, Paul Thomas, M.D., Andrew Wakefield, M.D., FRCS.
| [CHD Registration](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=0be4377ead&e=3a42edfdc4)

|

# Why Read Warrior Mom?
Dr. Andrew Wakefield wrote the forward to Warrior Mom, highlighting how the book’s origins sprouted from a place of humanity. Warrior Mom sheds a light on the reality of what families facing an autism diagnosis might go through. A raw story, such as this one, can help a struggling parent learn something new and feel a little less alone in their journey.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sen. Tom Cotton and Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

We’re emailing today because the future of the Senate majority, and with it our entire country, is hanging in the balance.

We’re fellow combat veterans. On the battlefield, we learned that you never retreat. You always advance. And if we’re going to save America in 2024, we must advance in 2023.

**Joe Biden and Senate Democrats are intentionally sabotaging American power. We refuse to let it continue, but we need you standing with us if we’re going to win.**

[**WATCH OUR MESSAGE TO YOU
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d3c382dd0a6f47809ab5e4f844968e1c&_e=FSQWE3oFEyd8OtU-FjgJGRpYlDNJ29_siteoMNMHkFwMpyLdevPtV1-QGSS2IipQyO4ZjX3MvtfZmJySku2pX_KDq-m6kIo42MzKwoRj718uO7fNDyWBplSJ33nLMmq1xzKLsTJED5d2a8GK0zigw_eIVPnZSFjLgf9i-qVsKeen-fVY0Vi8jqmy5pPB6Pcng3qpU8sPUTK5PpGgf_uHxDaZiQmml2Dv1P9g64cAdNpCwxUJ8LMlKI5F0uK8TSWYtm81hDX_RFOY74Xjd_ioD90rv29USloeUYKuYjLqldFoFKwuX5nxqikur952Y3U8jKoaMX01G9ovxtzDUts2oIrr6pxKYKUMF-9c5DzKdhjrveOAmx0jHI9Tk3CBMD_nlX4uLhu8VtI2zWyg1iAVwMIx0rnrRHTc3rUHHF_pyNM%3D)

We’ve recorded a quick video with more about why this Senate race in Montana is so important.

We know you may not be as involved as you were a few years ago, **but it’s critical that you know what’s on the line here.** The stakes could not be higher.

**[We hope you’ll watch it](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d3c382dd0a6f47809ab5e4f844968e1c&_e=FSQWE3oFEyd8OtU-FjgJGRpYlDNJ29_siteoMNMHkFwMpyLdevPtV1-QGSS2IipQyO4ZjX3MvtfZmJySku2pX_KDq-m6kIo42MzKwoRj718uO7fNDyWBplSJ33nLMmq1xzKLsTJED5d2a8GK0zigw_eIVPnZSFjLgf9i-qVsKeen-fVY0Vi8jqmy5pPB6Pcng3qpU8sPUTK5PpGgf_uHxDaZiQmml2Dv1P9g64cAdNpCwxUJ8LMlKI5F0uK8TSWYtm81hDX_RFOY74Xjd_ioD_nuFZm3ppPbcM2YONs5nCpDYPqXv4nJSS4icFTCO_rLTwj7RFduK-wknAhE1oZwDxklkWMiou3bkcg6vw7hZb9uE14iCD5MDCUVrUVH_vJNX2DYASREYt_sTZhvJyBM0ykid76fAizC31a4cqU0rFY%3D)** , and send reinforcements to the mission.

Sen. Tom Cotton and Tim Sheehy, candidate for U.S. Senate

body:
Open to watch a special message from Sen. Tom Cotton and Montana Senate candidate Tim Sheehy | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_t=FVwRGm6gs0cQfOC9MWyZdDsu3slDu73knRHAaKesXhSrCeb8TLX8vlYuP0_sZASkybXednGaQxO0BsKv5pRSETNqwOCKML28DBSsQF1hyTE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_t=FVwRGm6gs0cQfOC9MWyZdDsu3slDu73knRHAaKesXhSrCeb8TLX8vlYuP0_sZASkybXednGaQxO0BsKv5pRSETNqwOCKML28DBSsQF1hyTE%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UON54PsiNy8ZCnQoJJ0xMgfEJwTxmMb6jVDIOjMDPdl5sA8-HOtXsXpcrU7LryG-GaQkpacuEJoeBSO-Lw5xmJMdZkHg4LUteNA9XurK5d6agNsoN-kPHVYiy4iNZIytfIXJx-D9EUu5H6PlM3Sw1jdGE%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Sen. Tom Cotton and Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

We’re emailing today because the future of the Senate majority, and with it our entire country, is hanging in the balance.

We’re fellow combat veterans. On the battlefield, we learned that you never retreat. You always advance. And if we’re going to save America in 2024, we must advance in 2023.

**Joe Biden and Senate Democrats are intentionally sabotaging American power. We refuse to let it continue, but we need you standing with us if we’re going to win.**
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UON_FWw3_tYtU-zIu3I4BUTgJkU3RER-6I5sc2Q3EEEvJK8tLNJ0vL11VEHfXR1jre7PA7zvi2yjVOc8ucXdC6QfaOHcS4UR2LiTdyuMDXd-LpD5abcrKxN02IoZ80I-Nmq8_WLALBSwgnXERrLAkarGA%3D)
[**WATCH OUR MESSAGE TO YOU
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UON-YFY3nVABoxJgGMP4Zt6PNZbnN6mPZn3lBonw8FknffoMlK2hMkdI6rdSlcvRKobIltvkhb72NjD4E8tc98l7v9GRmlYA9NCpKIhs_oY11wb4-GDnbW5OhLy46PZlwagugHyKOE_fe4_d3WwuY2T_Y%3D)

We’ve recorded a quick video with more about why this Senate race in Montana is so important.

We know you may not be as involved as you were a few years ago, **but it’s critical that you know what’s on the line here.** The stakes could not be higher.

**[We hope you’ll watch it](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UON3TmVxBygDMfQJQ6ehG_QrUur4fOAUAmKc4qGFzcFUDJSL-LxXFdOsSpJ6kHZpqdGb8etqYn3kjQ8N3XQqHti1yr7g5trmTYDyNlM5_tXzESLnE9snNHd5xWHBD2Th80TJwLozQS7msVCrre31CISdU%3D)** , and send reinforcements to the mission.

Thank you,
Sen. Tom Cotton and Tim Sheehy, candidate for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UON5sni2qXvwHRTbWiiN_xYQSOBQuuHQ-8g1MCkOXLL83p205oNW5UK3jTptezJMKTl0EAjX5pf1ny8IwWosi3K7vGQmxzFmrgTZ5lt8MpQoGC0aGl641xKyG2KyCTes9mUpHnjvQ8CLXr3WqjpqczRFQ%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eMLRevma3cRAdwbl0FRVaiwn-JRP6kfRhy5ABQe0Q7l-a-t_ziQb-L9dYSotT3A3t9jdbH88W0Wa08hfzbKCWD1oD2WFjFb9oHoN4TG_n3P026Kueb-qqXiQTrZRJGoq31_kEteoJrQcaXVOkKoKUZo4bkxd4GpfNLgQDBc-PsoRLIzsYt_8iUDrxdi7dgup990wjzZ07I_KSs1kvRkP6fFT247ZyEOU1PjGBozKAU_DfmQQkiFLnH_f6MbD1UONwmhBYZhMsZXx354xVmaL2SkV0VkpZ823cfqTkuBsthslIGvELmrLeRAAgP0ftgsgXpNLbzNDNv03kiqkyj6NBat96tO4Zcr_YHY8VS9aX0jV3TqtSB5k5cS-S9e4a70s-vX0rXb2l_PFj4JLDQd0C0%3D)

* * *
---

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5bJsI5p-vzIOWf6RhRw9-x0Se6ub_Kt9wja8_eFrCMBYEE4vieiBOkDzk8a1EMR1EeQONSijqZaSGiZkulMJrEqDuQqUA7gWYH54c1iChBC6msLoCb9oSZCzSIC-AuRlQ3jgyGyHrOwyC5jFWd3M31aaFgbj_lUozb2A3PDgdQSOEU6FGKSJp68j1nhfn73f3A%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5eCOb4jVY5nbNY0GMhJ8LQ-e-KIS0zrJzeaVd3ZuFCRL6EYDDTJnCeimH_m6ZESghL9NzQcX9bSbn4WQB8suvYiJoiw-U5Tv5AFgjvtJALG62VhbbfNVJLXe7TXtaIAOaFtxaBWFx0CqtqisLvlZjqBowxu7P62WYM3hO5_GZaucgBEy_LJex44_u5WYM4hMwQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=499cde6eb01e4546885dd6cb6418206e&_e=nTrGWeDJ0JeLsCQu9jPJ5ZP_uykjQEfwjJ7TX05CxJruiIjiO4MWHiPPnpecyCbrszN-l4nm7yqu79P8L2hbVPNDC7lqO8hUlIGk_yar4mh7-vwhUrKoCEhjJF3AgdqCHG6QyTB9jb3OodjHy14QE1b07F4-PHwZ7X09HyHSxmR3rIZeh5_-wtg5AfW4xc_dLuLCpHaOu6z5vEOL5Pt_VnqsyV2G0Hv4aa3Omdqq6CA%3D)

America needs to stop Chinese encroachment in the Western hemisphere

# [Is Colombia the Next Front in the US-China War?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=135809371&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1ODA5MzcxLCJpYXQiOjE2OTE0NjU1MTMsImV4cCI6MTY5NDA1NzUxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l3kT3sj88RawR6OWU-5LGLURMJwTqpGMTIGlZxoQVSE)
### America needs to stop Chinese encroachment in the Western hemisphere
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bd2dd79c-a39a-4167-9249-b9bd1651ab53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Aug 8
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bd2dd79c-a39a-4167-9249-b9bd1651ab53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=135809371&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1ODA5MzcxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5MTQ2NTUxMywiZXhwIjoxNjk0MDU3NTEzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5YgDh51xXajPdWxI-1TJYGaVRpd8Q5VBgPLK7Oq3GLc&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=135809371&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1ODA5MzcxLCJpYXQiOjE2OTE0NjU1MTMsImV4cCI6MTY5NDA1NzUxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l3kT3sj88RawR6OWU-5LGLURMJwTqpGMTIGlZxoQVSE&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack..Yc172jU9Bczlo-34cPev1IzPptQ4zNRt9dGOeLb7pm4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=135809371&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1ODA5MzcxLCJpYXQiOjE2OTE0NjU1MTMsImV4cCI6MTY5NDA1NzUxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.l3kT3sj88RawR6OWU-5LGLURMJwTqpGMTIGlZxoQVSE)
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/37964ab5-d8f1-41ea-8321-f777c7754c58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As I've said multiple times, I believe [the world is bifurcating into two global ecosystems](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/64e7dfa7-2e08-4c4a-9940-f87fc1778a6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Politics has displaced economics as the main driver of activity in the world, and the US-China war is forcing countries to pick sides. The reorganization of global economy around relationships rather than issue-led transactions is quite possibly _**the**_ defining development of our time. Leaders around the world are going to have to choose between Washington and Beijing.
The Chinese are trying to make the choice easy. They have launched numerous programs to bring countries into their ecosystem. Consider the [Belt & Road Initiative](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3bbb94b9-8ef5-464f-ae8f-a0c77858fd54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (BRI), previously known as the "One Belt, One Road" program, something I called "[the most significant global economic initiative in the world](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3e4d5816-7664-48bb-b90f-36cb44eef7e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in 2016. [BRI is a trillion dollar program through which the People's Republic plans to rebuild the Silk Road and reconnect China with Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and Latin America](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3cb60cf7-edce-458f-afe2-76da115a228c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by building ports, railways, airports, highways, electricity grids, and other critical infrastructure. The Belt & Road Initiative had multiple objectives, ranging from securing energy and raw materials for China's economy to creating future markets for Chinese goods. It also promised to increase Beijing's geopolitical clout.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ef9a6f8b-be7e-4112-9ed0-85c5b0bc66b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Chinese activities in the Western hemisphere are particularly noteworthy. BRI agreements have been signed with [Cuba](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/589c2019-64d9-4baa-bdac-f95a77159484?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),[Venezuela](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/67bd0115-6c52-447c-8af1-39492a0e4070?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Chile](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/09d5e449-6d14-47a7-b3e9-45f95c5fc323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Peru](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/eea2b939-e267-4ca5-86f2-182be266639a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Panama](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e4d77c1b-412c-4151-90dd-f529527872d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [Uruguay](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f0d3902f-fced-4900-843f-3dc6e58e67dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as well as [dozens of smaller countries](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/17774b9f-d130-43f4-81f8-c43a4d9e0b40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Two countries in Latin America are noticeably absent from the list: Brazil and Colombia. Does this mean that the two countries are resisting Chinese influence? Are they opting to remain in the US ecosystem?
Brazil is trying to not pick sides, [something explicitly noted by ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/77f6a7a1-980a-4b26-93c6-4d85ac6ee2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[The Economist Intelligence Unit](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/77f6a7a1-980a-4b26-93c6-4d85ac6ee2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , by opting to align ever closer with Beijing without formally joining the Belt & Road Initiative. [Recall Brazil's statements](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/85e71d6d-b73c-4fc4-9855-e79f4b548850?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) regarding a move away from US dollar settlement for Brazil-China trade. Or consider that China is the destination for [more than a quarter of Brazilian exports](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dcafc863-94a1-477d-8f1a-6d4c7f1d55d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with agricultural products such as soybeans topping the list, making Brazil another front in the [currently escalating global food fight](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9ed620b2-24b9-453c-a895-cc22078249bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And of course, Brazil is the "B" in the BRICs alliance of emerging countries that are beginning to jointly flex their economic muscle. When push comes to shove, if Brazil were forced to pick sides, their actions to date suggest they'd choose Beijing over Washington.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sM5g6a0ZTNfKJnVRiUshxsmUEOWP0dmyXQImjpPsztc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=135809371)
Unlike Brazil, Colombia offers a potentially different outcome. The United States and Colombia have [remained strong allies for more than two centuries](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dc119115-c039-4e78-aeb0-ba2f771921bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and despite [the occasional setbacks](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a127a4a9-30d4-4366-b7f0-9fc0af86c2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) such as [President Teddy Roosevelt's recognition of Panama as independent country breaking away from Colombia](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5460d4c9-dd50-441b-8d65-19a431429966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [President Bill Clinton's decertification of Colombia as a partner in the war on drugs](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5e5daef7-69f3-4ae0-acbe-f2d3d8a9a105?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Bogota and Washington have managed to collaborate on a wide range of topics including climate change efforts, migrant management, and counternarcotics programs. Further, in [March 2022, American President Joe Biden announced](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5327c2de-55e5-4cde-8e34-cf28afc7ee70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the United States had [designated Colombia a major non-NATO ally in recognition of two hundred years of diplomatic ties](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a127a4a9-30d4-4366-b7f0-9fc0af86c2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As a result of this designation, Bogota gained access to numerous economic and security programs.
In [March 2022, American President Joe Biden announced](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5327c2de-55e5-4cde-8e34-cf28afc7ee70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the United States had [designated Colombia a major non-NATO ally in recognition of two hundred years of diplomatic ties](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a127a4a9-30d4-4366-b7f0-9fc0af86c2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
All of this was before the June 19, 2022 election victory of Gustavo Petro and his running mate, Afro-Colombian environmental activist Francia Marquez, as Colombia's first leftist leaders in decades. While left-leaning politicians are quite common in Latin America, Colombia had been dominated by right-leaning leaders for decades since Alvaro Uribe came to power in 2002 and began an all-out military campaign against leftist guerrilla groups such as the FARC and ELN. Uribe's anointed successors, Juan Manuel Santos and Ivan Duque, held Colombia's highest office until Petro's victory in 2002. Petro, a former member of the M19 armed guerilla movement and former Mayor of Bogota, received a congratulatory call from Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/94cd6d42-62ca-47e2-ae2d-41e9876fd3ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Gustavo Petro and his candidate for vice president, Francia Marquez, celebrate after Petro's victory in the second round of the presidential election, at the Movistar Arena, in Bogota, Colombia, June 19, 2022 [Luisa Gonzalez/ Reuters]
Petro and Marquez ran on a campaign promising to transition the country towards "total peace" and away from an economy dependent upon extracting raw materials and trading illicit drugs. According to Dr. Will Freeman, a Latin American Studies Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations:
> _[To chart a path toward total peace, the new government proposed holding simultaneous dialogues with armed groups and criminal organizations...at a minimum, the government said, it would require these groups to ask for pardons from society, observe a cease-fire, and cooperate with the justice system. In exchange, it would suspend arrest warrants and extradition orders for those who complied...](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8d176898-c6fc-4d2d-9215-06f2b83a4cd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
To date, violence has not subsided and the trade in illicit drugs is booming. The economic challenges facing Petro, however, raise more alarm bells, and for good reason. A combination of high inflation, slow growth, and a rapidly depreciating peso have combined with high debt levels (more than 30% of Colombian government debt is denominated in US dollars) to pinch the government's budget and Petro's spending plans. [And Petro's promise of transitioning from fossil fuels also appears challenged, given that oil revenues provide a meaningful share of the government's budget](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b66c52e8-9465-4866-acdc-50fdce6efabc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In addition, the country lost its investment grade credit rating in 2021, and pandemic-induced unemployment remains elevated. **All of this makes Colombia increasingly vulnerable to outside influence, and therefore an important front in the US-China war. From this perspective, America seems to be letting Chinese encroachments to happen without any competition.**
China's ambitions in Colombia are not new. In fact, the Economic & Commercial Counselor for the Chinese embassy in Bogota publicly acknowledged Beijing's interest and even shared its rationale: "[Colombia is strategically important in the region and is the only country in South America that connects the Pacific and Atlantic oceans and is politically and economically stable](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d28e3552-a5c1-4b43-8875-519440d24017?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sM5g6a0ZTNfKJnVRiUshxsmUEOWP0dmyXQImjpPsztc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=135809371)
Even though Colombia is not officially part of the Belt & Road Initiative, this is not stopping China from acting as if Bogota had signed an agreement with Beijing. Here's a partial listing of major infrastructure projects that Chinese companies are pursuing in Colombia:
* [China's Zijin Mining purchased the Buritica mine, which contains one of Colombia's largest gold deposits, in late 2019](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d06778a0-e49b-4383-a6c3-e0eba897e847?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for US$1 billion and began operations in 2020.
* [A Chinese consortium led by China Harbor Engineering Company and including Xi'an Metro Company Limited was selected in 2019 to to build the Bogota metro system](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d1cd32ff-58c2-4d92-ac5a-66db2ce8dfce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* [China Harbor Engineering Company and a few local companies won the 2015 bid to build a highway connecting connecting Medellin to the ports in Uraba. The project was delayed until the Chinese Development Bank (and others) provided financing in 2019](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/157d9396-e9fc-45cd-8c7a-9dde8a1ab921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* "[Between 2006 and 2020, Chinese state-owned corporations acquired companies that gave them control over at least seven oil fields in Colombia's Andean region, the eastern plains and the Amazon region, according to NGO Ambiente y Sociedad](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/de3af179-02c7-4580-ab53-82bb05e91970?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
* [Colombia Reports published a February 2023 analysis titled "China's Secretive Investments in Colombia" that includes a listing of Chinese companies that are actively pursuing or building projects in the country. These include China Three Gorges Corporation, Beijing's Yellow River Company, and PowerChina International Group in the hydroelectric sector; and China Civil Engineering Construction Corporation and China Railway Construction Corporation in light rail](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/de3af179-02c7-4580-ab53-82bb05e91970?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

As clear from this short (and incomplete) list, Beijing is clearly interested in developing deeper ties to Colombia...with or without the Belt & Road Initiative. And while the BRI program has not been without its hiccups, it has been a contributing factor to [the death of global multilateralism](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fc10e74f-baef-41ce-9222-f2ff8a6352ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and accusations of Chinese colonialism in Africa and South Asia. **Sri Lanka, for instance, was unable to pay loans taken from the Chinese to build a port.[Beijing resolved the issue by taking over the port](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/809a1f72-5233-4a28-a3f7-69d61597a9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [utilizing it for Chinese navy vessels](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7af934b0-3cd3-4878-b002-b58585695784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** Critics of the BRI note that such debt traps are Beijing's way of gaining influence.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b91e2803-a954-42db-81f9-bd57698f05c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
http://en.ccccltd.cn/xwzx/ztbd/202204/t20220420_171401.html
So is there any parallel between what happened in Sri Lanka and what's happening in Colombia? While it's too early to tell, it did catch my attention that **China Harbor Engineering Company** , the company that the _[New York Times](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/809a1f72-5233-4a28-a3f7-69d61597a9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ says "got Sri Lanka to cough up a port](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/809a1f72-5233-4a28-a3f7-69d61597a9c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," is leading the effort to build the Bogota Metro and the Mar2 highway connecting Medellin to the port. Will they get Colombia to cough up control of the Bogota Metro or the highway?
Is China de facto trying to colonize Colombia, to gain undue influence and loyalty via its infrastructure-oriented debt diplomacy? Before you answer, please note [Chinese investment in Colombia tripled from 2021 to 2022](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/51034dd2-4eaf-4bed-8beb-1ac408cbd5de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and seems to be accelerating at the every same time that Bogota has been struggling economically.
#### Monroe Doctrine 2.0
The United States needs to help Colombia's economic recovery to stop China's ongoing encroachments in the Western hemisphere. The recent election of left-leaning leadership in Colombia has created a new risk in a long standing partner, one that America recently designed a major non-NATO ally. [The United States and allies recently launched its Build Back Better World](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/399207d2-864b-4a3b-8bd6-286da9139ae5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (B3W) program as an attempt to combat the Belt & Road Initiative by helping to finance and build infrastructure in low and middle-income nations. But as John Padilla, managing director at IPD Latin America, notes in _Foreign Policy_ ,
> _[Passing a program in Congress is not enough. Washington needs a concrete game plan to implement the program and start making a dent into Chinese encroachment in Latin America...As the United States stands idly by, Colombia is becoming more dependent on Chinese financing and contractors as a source of local job creation....Moreover, the United States can help Colombia solidify the implementation of the peace agreement by funding infrastructure projects in areas of Colombia affected by conflict, which would help stabilize the country and unleash much broader economic development. All of these would be big wins for Colombia, the region, and the United States. Failure to actively support Colombia's ongoing infrastructure projects will only push it closer to China](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1a222316-68dd-4b45-a4cb-18007c8175ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
Now is the time for American leadership to counteract Chinese influence in the Western hemisphere. Strong statements and financial support need to work in tandem to assure countries such as Colombia don't default to China. The US needs a modernized version of the [Monroe Doctrine](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/668076e2-ef2f-4aa3-aae0-35a549c358e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one that makes it clear to China that the Americas are off-limits. Perhaps the United States should declare a slightly modified version of the words written by John Quincy Adams:
> _The occasion has been judged proper for asserting, as a principle in which the rights and interests of the United States are involved, that the American continents, by the free and independent condition which they have assumed and maintain, are henceforth not to be considered as subjects for future colonization by**China or any other global powers**._
Implementing such a policy, however, will require commitment, resolve, and dollars. Colombia has been and can continue to be a loyal friend to America. The time has come to support Colombia so Bogota does not feel compelled to run into Beijing's arms.

America needs to stop Chinese encroachment in the Western hemisphere | | | Aug 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- As I've said multiple times, I believe . Politics has displaced economics as the main driver of activity in the world, and the US-China war is forcing countries to pick sides. The reorganization of global economy around relationships rather than issue-led transactions is quite possibly the defining development of our time. Leaders around the world are going to have to choose between Washington and Beijing. The Chinese are trying to make the choice easy. They have launched numerous programs to bring countries into their ecosystem. Consider the (BRI), previously known as the "One Belt, One Road" program, something I called "" in 2016. by building ports, railways, airports, highways, electricity grids, and other critical infrastructure. The Belt & Road Initiative had multiple objectives, ranging from securing energy and raw materials for China's economy to creating future markets for Chinese goods. It also promised to increase Beijing's geopolitical clout. | | ---|---|--- Chinese activities in the Western hemisphere are particularly noteworthy. BRI agreements have been signed with , , , , and as well as . Two countries in Latin America are noticeably absent from the list: Brazil and Colombia. Does this mean that the two countries are resisting Chinese influence? Are they opting to remain in the US ecosystem? Brazil is trying to not pick sides, , by opting to align ever closer with Beijing without formally joining the Belt & Road Initiative. regarding a move away from US dollar settlement for Brazil-China trade. Or consider that China is the destination for , with agricultural products such as soybeans topping the list, making Brazil another front in the . And of course, Brazil is the "B" in the BRICs alliance of emerging countries that are beginning to jointly flex their economic muscle. When push comes to shove, if Brazil were forced to pick sides, their actions to date suggest they'd choose Beijing over Washington. Unlike Brazil, Colombia offers a potentially different outcome. The United States and Colombia have and despite such as or , Bogota and Washington have managed to collaborate on a wide range of topics including climate change efforts, migrant management, and counternarcotics programs. Further, in the United States had . As a result of this designation, Bogota gained access to numerous economic and security programs. In the United States had . All of this was before the June 19, 2022 election victory of Gustavo Petro and his running mate, Afro-Colombian environmental activist Francia Marquez, as Colombia's first leftist leaders in decades. While left-leaning politicians are quite common in Latin America, Colombia had been dominated by right-leaning leaders for decades since Alvaro Uribe came to power in 2002 and began an all-out military campaign against leftist guerrilla groups such as the FARC and ELN. Uribe's anointed successors, Juan Manuel Santos and Ivan Duque, held Colombia's highest office until Petro's victory in 2002. Petro, a former member of the M19 armed guerilla movement and former Mayor of Bogota, received a congratulatory call from Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro. | | ---|---|--- Gustavo Petro and his candidate for vice president, Francia Marquez, celebrate after Petro's victory in the second round of the presidential election, at the Movistar Arena, in Bogota, Colombia, June 19, 2022 [Luisa Gonzalez/ Reuters] Petro and Marquez ran on a campaign promising to transition the country towards "total peace" and away from an economy dependent upon extracting raw materials and trading illicit drugs. According to Dr. Will Freeman, a Latin American Studies Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations: To date, violence has not subsided and the trade in illicit drugs is booming. The economic challenges facing Petro, however, raise more alarm bells, and for good reason. A combination of high inflation, slow growth, and a rapidly depreciating peso have combined with high debt levels (more than 30% of Colombian government debt is denominated in US dollars) to pinch the government's budget and Petro's spending plans. . In addition, the country lost its investment grade credit rating in 2021, and pandemic-induced unemployment remains elevated. All of this makes Colombia increasingly vulnerable to outside influence, and therefore an important front in the US-China war. From this perspective, America seems to be letting Chinese encroachments to happen without any competition. China's ambitions in Colombia are not new. In fact, the Economic & Commercial Counselor for the Chinese embassy in Bogota publicly acknowledged Beijing's interest and even shared its rationale: "." Even though Colombia is not officially part of the Belt & Road Initiative, this is not stopping China from acting as if Bogota had signed an agreement with Beijing.
