subject: I was attacked by a pervert

body:

| |
---

* * *
---
Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20942%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fv1vxtifYCkrBjcpsPT%2bdA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20942%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fv1vxtifYCkrBjcpsPT%2bdA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20943%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aMxef4eqXo11XLgBGXHDaA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20944%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m6rITOFAFzFMUIwjSDW6FA&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20055%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hdZceg9XejRpTFv1oGE%2bEw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20056%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dcc4g8Fvx6IQU3zTIS3oPw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20057%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t834JlzMNppxsnAPIbiEZw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20058%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wfp0mLGxZcVBFtpbi2287A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20059%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fIVWvY3aaSv0hEV%2bruik8w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20050%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TkSs0I4HdVOldxZEsDRG6A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2N74YngaU9sDRjTQFyGXIQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DbTU1QKtakC%2fn35Sa3utEQ&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uYYxyOkITLXBSpN1mUREHw&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20054%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xk2n9pMBnzyVriH6UmzUXg&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20065%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CDNzqmwGYG5uvqBqlZCMqQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Your America News

subject: A new American revolution
body:
I hope you’ll grab yours before they’re gone!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsan0kkt5j7epp4klljm8raagcpp49l8d6l77l1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr3msojas3l69hr3cb7cpqb9cjl6uobfc32ehij2dtj69pj0tb66lo61cr3curjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm2phlciqj9ptiedj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9p31cjie6pj2c8iv0)

---
Fellow Patriot, Already this year, I've crisscrossed America to speak with THOUSANDS of young people. I've faced down Antifa rioters. I've been vilified and smeared by the Fake News Media. **My conclusion is one you may not expect: our ONCE-IN-A-GENERATION opportunity to completely end "Woke" Culture in America and WIN the American Culture War is CLOSER than EVER BEFORE!** [**_But Turning Point USA can't win this critical battle for America's future without YOU -- which is why I want to send YOU this special, limited-edition 1776 T-shirt when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA_** _._](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm5rf3ouolfa5k5ocurqc0g8skjmmaqbqh087f9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu4cejala24aprefbgdsrhhiu4n662nbn3i361ig_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
**_Normally, this shirt sells in the TPUSA merch store for $30_** \-- but today, it can be yours for any amount you choose to give to support TPUSA’s nation-saving grassroots work on over 3,500 college and high school campuses. [**And to make this opportunity EVEN BETTER, a generous TPUSA donor has offered to MATCH every gift that Turning Point USA receives before the end of this month. Can I count on your DOUBLE-IMPACT gift today? Every dollar you give will go TWICE as far.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0lq2623atg69an20gk4f7dlth22bqa1am4p8d3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[Support Turning Point USA](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zaan5r27np63vkg4koc2fm7v0c38cov4asf7shb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
The radical Left may seem like a powerful enemy... _...but they are throwing everything they have at me, Turning Point USA, and grassroots patriots like you because they are weak and scared._ The Left recognizes that they are LOSING control of the "narrative" as TPUSA's powerful, pro-America online content circumvents the Fake News Media gatekeepers. They are LOSING the power to indoctrinate America's young people as TPUSA's 600,000+ student activists in ALL 50 STATES bring our exciting, inspiring message of patriotism and love of country directly to their generation. [**And with your support of Turning Point USA today, you can help me ensure they will KEEP LOSING their control of American culture through their toxic, racist, sexist, hateful "Woke" ideology.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc3os5agbvamb6coqsbbeh26r8945sec71qg46cg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuj3c880m7f2p396gg7doqqqb02ulke8hbhimrko_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs)
---
For over ten years, the generous support of Turning Point USA partners has ensured that we can always answer the call -- and lead the charge -- to defend FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and the TRUTH from the lies of the radical Left. I truly believe that, with your support, our grassroots movement is closer than EVER BEFORE to completely _ending_ "Woke" Culture in America and WINNING the American Culture War. [**Please, if you can, will you make your most generous DOUBLE-IMPACT gift to Turning Point USA right now? Every dollar you give by the end of this month will be MATCHED thanks to a generous donor.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9hd4m7amc2pf78fstg26pef3f8i66d9dcsujrqo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs) _**That means your gift of $25 will become $50 ... your gift of $50 will become $100 ... your gift of $250 will become $500 ... and so on.**_ Plus, as my thanks for your gift of ANY amount by the end of this month, I'll send you a limited-edition 1776 T-shirt from Turning Point USA. I hope that you'll wear it proudly as a sign of your patriotism and your moral courage. [**I hope you’ll grab yours before they’re gone!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6ccs08mn87dcbpd3sd8omtiru80mpn9ucnflc48_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5ie9or6c9h2bs) Thank you for your continued support. For America,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA

I hope that you'll wear it proudly as a sign of your patriotism and your moral courage. Thank you for your continued support. For America, Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, . 625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tim Scott
subject: I hate telling you this, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
We can’t sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election. America’s future is on the line!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49377k67qoiidhdiaabe567385bov07agguo3ug_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg68ob6clh2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

I hate asking for money, but I need your help to make sure my campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting.

**_[Can you help?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohdmdones9n3n81eor97pe6djupl9f4k74idb1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg68ob6clh2bs "Can you help?")_ We just passed a MAJOR deadline.**

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhe2codf4e1d9f8ef9fq2d92lltefnmcbv4npo4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg68ob6clh2bs "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")
---

Seriously, anything you chip in today will help us catch up, whether it's $3, $30, $300, or even $3,300.

We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election. America's future is on the line!

So I'm respectfully asking one more time. **_[Can you give a critical $3 gift to support my campaign?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhrfih5rnq3h2ho3723declvvit2a0b2koghfevg_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg68ob6clh2bs "Can you give a critical $3 gift to support my campaign?")_**

If you can afford to help, we could really use it.

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm9ohotsvo08uroue10v81gek6bf4o964u10fbbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg68ob6clh2bs "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")
---

Thank you so much,

Tim Scott

North Charleston, SC 29406

# TUESday, August 8, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the 435th anniversary of one of the most pivotal naval battles in history. On Aug. 8, 1588, the British Navy defeated the Spanish Armada, saving England from invasion. If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OBCEQgPGnge42wwzLn4LOXHe2lhuE2bsxcJgVz_j2JrbafslX_F4u2yVLk_v1OXdOcx9bLlMevEE4hRPShrqmnRmZNCfjorGR0JC-JYz11VbHDqLjNQZyeTXe77msmQ0aLQkBCQIEiOSNXwqFUCuCyxjqWlBZ4CpzHMvbkPu88d6-x4OPpYyuW_obFZ4VnT9nV_RkQR-pvn9Ja_LhvLJw7Vna7zv_lfwEAAD__0tWSXM) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## Ukraine Says It Foiled Plot to Kill Zelenskyy
Ukraine's security forces said it caught a Russian spy who was part of a plan to [assassinate Ukrainian President](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGu4yAQANDT4A4LD46NC4pt3GXbLS0WhmQ2GCyYxPKe_ku__jd4en_u291Rovz47Xa0HMvmPNMHN2WkkaA36IKNiIC6QztMyzAuGgbdPW3w4-C1MlFP899FLXHwN4hmhnkJJoZbRxYUaGWUUYueh7n32pgQQE0OTLh5EKPCQFxq_69Q5ifGdJUP1t6XvUv2yXw0oX8JWAWs53n2R0nE5EuPbwGrq0w-oYD1_aqOMkpXKzZusr5bIycpx1J3l1keqbB0rbnWKDtG-SmphGu_qvyPCXN7XZeAtas2HCelRG2axageu6P0reEfb74CAAD__6XoaRw) Volodymyr Zelenskyy last month.

The plot called for the informant to learn details of Zelenskyy's schedule during his visit to the southern Mykolaiv region a few weeks ago and use it to call down a [massive airstrike by the Russians.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvszAQxvFPA9shY_PCMTC8S7Z07Yiu9jm5xuAIX4Lop6_Srt2fR_rp_36ezyRJ1ssbLTxpzDN5lSfPBgHButnWYYrMll3NU9uPbTc627r6OrmxG7yJMY49jp4IccCIhrxxoUXiWiZrrDNo0IxuaIfGO8QQrOnJYvjnbdUZDqJ5az6zrHrlmI785K3xeanTdFW9l8r9r-ypsqd935uPR5GVS5G1SPjdVfb0uG0kK0Oho4AoxCyJA5AqL3cFzUCl0OtFyvDFiddyOw4g2aDoJjeGFxSw3qZw3yUlKf1QdeaykKQfjP6Z5jsAAP__d0JoEQ)

Ukrainian forces learned about the plan, tracked the informant, and put extra security in place during the trip. The spy now faces up to 12 years in prison.
## College Football Transforms Itself
The traditions of college football have been upended by a dizzying series of conference changes, [culminating this weekend](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2ypCAQRp8GMyxo_MHAYBOz2XRDq4XGYbcFC9mx7tvfmolv9AXfCU6dP4_1gZFj2n_jQXMNeUVX44tWZaWVYFZo_ByIgExDsx4m3U0GtGmeM_ZeQwibnbAzatrMNGyd1WHs-81NoJo4gwKjrLJqMqMeW2es9R7UgGB970B0inysubR_c0z1SYG_8otK6_LR8Pys9byE-SVgEbDc992mzV1nLvV6EwKWFFjAcpYccq4bMlfkfwKW8v_IRR6R33ei-xKwuMxMO0mXU6BCydElCyHHPUncMSaJl9ziLiulz2qQBaOXJzqpoSmzP-_IHK9hFJ3aD4z8Ea0_ZvsOAAD__3NDcBs) when three colleges moved from the Pac-12 to the Big 12, and two others switched from the Pac-12 to the Big 10. In the end, the Pac-12 was the big loser, left with only four teams, including Stanford and UC-Berkeley, who are said to be in talks with the [Atlantic Coast Conference.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO2zAMhJ_G3hhIlGvLg4cu2f6uHQNaohIWihRIbIy8feHO_3bAHXAfvt9fty-SLOX-i568aao3CipvvhkPHtDdcIxbYkZ2I292Xu20OrRufGyrn5HcMnGYLNKysCUy1k1ux93u6zzKhgad8cab1S12uQTnfYxoZkIffwQcJsNRtLbLnypFH5zyp765XUJ9jnl7qL764H4OeB3wehzHJey9v2rTfi4GvIaaM98ZUq26U84DXgsf_WwoS6qtCEFXKqm2CFKUG3flMwKFAKGWxI1LYOisoBX4TfkvKcNbaJcs-oGagGKUcocXBbAIyvQ8P8a2xdchOUufl2Ey9ydJ_s-u35r8FwAA__9zFHgk) The Big 12 now has 16 teams, and the [Big 10 is up to 18.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD3znCAQhz8NdnsDCygUFmnsLm3KmxVWJUFwlJyTb5_JTcp_93upnufH8_WklFNZv9POY1vqi0JLb35JBw5Qv7CL48KMrDseVe-V8RqV7rYxKjKDmeXifZBWedPbeY5E1vaeeKAujShRSyed9HpQwyNo52JE2RO6aAMKIzmmVs_Hz5pK23jJf-qbz0eoe5fHrbXjEvqbwEngdN_3Q8n2_ncKnOhsKWQWOF1HPdslcMo1_OIItXwyFGqpFsoCpzmtoCRcW73_t8YFSr3h9wHKwRW2WvP1We6NGhwUQCGEWhY-uQSGkymntexcmsDJagtxMXOMgwc1aw1GSQkzqx50RLJGLkpr3Z1jPO6Uc7r6QRi57pTyB699KftvAAAA__9BVX3N) The schools involved say they're looking forward to an era of richer TV rights packages.
## Musk Vs. Zuck Fight Proposed for Aug. 26
Though it seemed a joke at first, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says he's proposed [a date of Aug. 26](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9yhCAQgPGnwQ5nXfyDBUUau0ub0llhPcmB3CA5xzx9JqlTf8U38_u4zTfywe_3d4psyppmssW_eAYttUQ1Y-XMyoysKjZNPzbtqLBR1WYW3TeoW6BldW7EnluLVruhW8lBT0vlDQIq0KBhVEMz1FZp7RxCT6hdZ1G0wM6XlOvP5Pey8Rqu9OJc2xSrYLZSnodQbwIngdN5nvVFW0q_VeDEe-FcyO-R9yJwipQf8vvLPjgvnO_yoOuQGx8yM7lLAmAL2I1dvZUYqmzc8_Qh-KMfRAv3SD78bcu_CD8BAAD__1oTXpE) for the Las Vegas cage match between him and Elon Musk. clean_body: Ukraine's security forces said it caught a Russian spy who was part of a plan to assassinate Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy last month. | | | | | | TUESday, August 8, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today is the 435th anniversary of one of the most pivotal naval battles in history. On Aug. 8, 1588, the British Navy defeated the Spanish Armada, saving England from invasion. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Ukraine Says It Foiled Plot to Kill Zelenskyy Ukraine's security forces said it caught a Russian spy who was part of a plan to Volodymyr Zelenskyy last month. The plot called for the informant to learn details of Zelenskyy's schedule during his visit to the southern Mykolaiv region a few weeks ago and use it to call down a Ukrainian forces learned about the plan, tracked the informant, and put extra security in place during the trip. The spy now faces up to 12 years in prison. College Football Transforms Itself The traditions of college football have been upended by a dizzying series of conference changes, when three colleges moved from the Pac-12 to the Big 12, and two others switched from the Pac-12 to the Big 10. In the end, the Pac-12 was the big loser, left with only four teams, including Stanford and UC-Berkeley, who are said to be in talks with the The Big 12 now has 16 teams, and the The schools involved say they're looking forward to an era of richer TV rights packages. Musk Vs. Zuck Fight Proposed for Aug. 26 Though it seemed a joke at first, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says he's proposed for the Las Vegas cage match between him and Elon Musk. He added cynically: "Not holding my breath." Musk says he'll stream the fight on his platform--X (formerly Twitter)--but also said he on his neck and upper back first, which would indeed delay the fight. Zuckerberg is younger, taller, and in excellent shape, judging he posted with his trainers. A longshot effort at reprogramming across 12 billion miles paid off as data from the ship began flowing to Earth again. () ➤ Two firefighting helicopters collided in mid-air Sunday night during an attempt to put out a fire in California. Three people died in the crash. () ➤ A charter bus crashed on a Pennsylvania interstate Sunday, killing three passengers, police said. The accident happened near midnight in heavy rain just north of Harrisburg. () ➤ To some, pigeons are just rats with wings. But to photographer Brendan Burden, they're misunderstood beauties, and he's produced a series of formal pigeon portraits in a studio setting. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it 's true._ _ _ _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ** ** **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. ** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ - and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I'm asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=60ec4438ccfd436eb40489a868d7e8a1&_e=m-7A-ZRcyRvbrQ-0Cvlip5eN9CZefyXAUHQjvYsYk0PPLHeqKoUgj-OQm6R5bOwfRFzQXV_Y2tS4kgeGFczkALQq8P6Gz6JzhPhYvZbtRBTFgYmLFh2TvPc8coXWtLXpnPaFaCbKDDIbdzzzZlNqEM0nHly0XSn4JZo3liIN85v1tPPeM3SHn98J66X6-rQ8_aKjx51MrKWEG4-yXlXLwGOfBu4RbVQtVJMIq3Qn4bHzLnmxALzR9I3r4YHMSBPKfMgz1_S7h4ZiSGrhXiA4i_XTqZ2qrbGlZiNGkPupYQlUYqGf1yZWXBV4ZXl-ENvlHEvK8wUKU4guuVHHjUjPysTbyWYGyq5mfm1sZwBMsOViehJ-EwIIyBzNDJjweV300l5mPpIHzDgN-l10IutEkQ%3D%3D) And as a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=60ec4438ccfd436eb40489a868d7e8a1&_e=m-7A-ZRcyRvbrQ-0Cvlip5eN9CZefyXAUHQjvYsYk0PPLHeqKoUgj-OQm6R5bOwfRFzQXV_Y2tS4kgeGFczkALQq8P6Gz6JzhPhYvZbtRBTFgYmLFh2TvPc8coXWtLXpnPaFaCbKDDIbdzzzZlNqEM0nHly0XSn4JZo3liIN85v1tPPeM3SHn98J66X6-rQ8_aKjx51MrKWEG4-yXlXLwGOfBu4RbVQtVJMIq3Qn4bHzLnmxALzR9I3r4YHMSBPKo9C59p3e9NjUyfJpjNTBDXHAE0oNuhUVYZYbcVQ0LJGVyuKteLL7ytgQYr9bmi8UiD1ncRF8j_-FPVQP-dSaRWrFcNlq8nLiUZJki7_IVTZoT6lXZByaWxSo0piGrLloSKFoJbI14X6xktquf2W0EA%3D%3D)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform [it]." **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.

subject: Peter, TOSS-UP!
body:
this is personal...

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4bcd6c94-ade3-4e07-8452-e45602107e08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | Peter, My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [before I ask you to chip in a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c09f8a4-dc9a-4943-86c6-03737ebe25c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here are three reasons why:
1. Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please: [Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta65b1afb-f047-4c8b-ae97-67bca42f9d66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election. America's future is on the line! So I'm respectfully asking one more time. "Can you give a critical $3 gift to support my campaign?" If you can afford to help, we could really use it. | | | "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT" Thank you so much, Tim Scott | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA 7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312 North Charleston, SC 29406 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

**This is disturbing, friend, but we can’t afford to look away. Three young gray wolves were MURDERED near the Colorado-Wyoming border, and bloodthirsty trophy hunters are to blame. These were some of Colorado’s first precious pups born in the wild in more than 80 years! Now the LAST survivors in this vital wolf pack are at extreme risk, and decades of wolf conservation could be DESTROYED!**
Here’s what we’re up against: **When the Trump administration slashed federal protections for gray wolves, trophy hunters went on an ALL-OUT KILLING SPREE. Hundreds of wolves were violently slaughtered in a matter of days!** But Colorado conservationists have been working tirelessly to protect these majestic creatures and the forests they need to thrive. The problem is: **Colorado’s wolves can be LEGALLY shot and killed as soon as they step over state lines!**
Even worse: The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service has been IGNORING science-backed wolf recovery practices! **That means struggling wolf populations have been ABANDONED in pro-hunting states like Wyoming. We can’t stand aside while vulnerable wolves are legally tortured to death with choking snares, violent shootings, ATV chases and even explosives! That's why we urgently need your help to protect gray wolves and the planet they call home – before it’s too late!**
**We're committed to protecting this crucial species and our planet for generations to come and putting a stop to these merciless attacks. But we urgently need to know where our top supporters stand, and we’re still missing 26 responses from your area – including yours! We’re almost out of time, so please, tell us before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**
| | **Do you think Colorado's LAST surviving wolves should be protected from bloodthirsty trophy hunters?**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z530a24aklq1lh9o2o94e8tpo1svflpfo3edjm80_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6epb7cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgd6s077g106qegurg618c98icmi9ah06u11n33g_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6epb7cdh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp9ou6sc8brsickt8l9ca95670qrf4a0dkd38rm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6epb7cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zui4723kskbcdh6mr57p32u0pr7ocmppvsb7vrq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6epb7cdh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf2fajov7m2kg5igvkhohpvdsgnu5hf9uugi150o_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6epb7cdh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zonfn3oi8chu5brg7hs62a1au2bfbh2lf5b0fk88_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg6ep73cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QkJ59iGcyNIPTTmcpAgNxQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GJ5DcwCK3NhUc0KhLwjFlg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lF1DinDJzBCgp543i26r%2fg&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Your America News

body:

Friend,

I hate asking for money, but I need your help to make sure my campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting.

**_[Can you help?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmev0f5ce5mf9s6e4fcdlnriv35s827b1h9e1n80_rp22sh2s8i66p74clg61or3c1h2bs "Can you help?")_ We just passed a MAJOR deadline.**

Tim Scott

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663473%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qhXFahn0dwS8oPrSy%2bdY8Q&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663474%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yMYdZGsPQouYVxN4UdxOhA&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663485%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p5%2f40Oxdbc7MCryux45mbg&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663486%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oktq0%2fvil9X%2binEC7vMtuw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
American Update

$8.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $8 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747108/420736955/-2022127741?&amounts=8,15,25,50,100,500&amount=8&refcode=jtk1154-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQzZDhjYy1lMzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKa3z4kvU_pRiPq8VXvjj2U0FCQhMs-mGf1JVndZw04=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $8 for the first eight days of the eighth month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747109/420736956/-2022127741?&amounts=8,15,25,50,100,500&amount=8&refcode=jtk1154-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQzZDhjYy1lMzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CKa3z4kvU_pRiPq8VXvjj2U0FCQhMs-mGf1JVndZw04=)**

subject: I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0015dfcde91c/party-12739110?e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=79094151a1&e=a6aa651d40)
---
| |
**Dear Friend** ,

I wanted to make sure you [saw](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=76f6f4c1fc&e=a6aa651d40) that I have officially filed to run for Congress in the First District. I didn’t make this decision lightly, because with so much at stake you deserve a candidate who will go all in. But after watching Nick LaLota spend the past seven months trying to strip away people’s rights instead of fighting for Long Island, I’m stepping up. And I intend to win.
[Will you be a founding donor to my campaign and ensure I have the resources to take this seat](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=e17876228c&e=a6aa651d40)[?](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=bfef4b95b1&e=a6aa651d40)

Long Island deserves a Member of Congress who is laser focused on the issues that matter most, and who actually gets results. As a former State Senator, County Legislator, Suffolk County Water Chair, and Huntington Town Board Member, I have always stood up for our communities.

In the Senate I codified Roe v. Wade into law, I passed significant gun safety measures, and I delivered millions in new funding for our schools. In Congress I will bring back SALT deductions that families depend on, I’ll protect Long Island’s environment, and I’ll fight to ensure reproductive rights and gun safety measures are protected and expanded at the national level.
But I can’t do any of this without your support. [Please chip in to get our campaign off the ground](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=b8302c01ec&e=a6aa651d40)

Congressman Lalota has misspent his time in Washington trying to cut reproductive health access while making zero progress on restoring the SALT deductions families depended on. Meanwhile, here at home he’s been an absentee Congressman who didn’t hold a single town hall until [hundreds of his constituents sent a petition](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=7922648c7c&e=a6aa651d40) asking for one. We can do so much better \- and I will.

We’re only just getting started, but I’m glad you’re here with me.
**_\- Jim_**
---
|
---
| P.S. [Please consider even a small donation. We need to show an impressive filling to make sure people know that LaLota’s days are numbered in NY-1.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=7517368892&e=a6aa651d40)
---
|

---

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I'm running

body:
| |
---
Peter, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. But my run for Congress isn’t about me. **I’m running for my parents.** They worked night and day on factory lines to give my brothers and me a shot at the American Dream. [**Now I’m running to make sure all Americans -- our families, our workers, our small businesses -- can have the same opportunities I did. That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you personally on the first day of this race: Will you rush your donation before midnight to help me kick off my campaign strong? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747905/420739239/1765688408?refcode=urd-em-230808-split_vargas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViNmY0YmUtZTUzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6dTG_K8YE-plORkJmWYUb72zDbT3ejZ0zhQ7YMPPWNc=) **I’m running for my kids, Ava and Luca.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747906/420739240/1765688408?refcode=urd-em-230808-split_vargas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViNmY0YmUtZTUzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6dTG_K8YE-plORkJmWYUb72zDbT3ejZ0zhQ7YMPPWNc=) _My family!_ I want nothing more than for my children -- and every child -- to have the greatest opportunities possible. But Don Bacon is in Congress fighting for cheap political points rather than families like mine and yours. **[Peter, I’ll be honest: We need a voice in Congress fighting for our families, not corporate CEOs. So can you rush in your donation and help me get this campaign off the ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747907/420739241/1765688408?refcode=urd-em-230808-split_vargas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViNmY0YmUtZTUzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6dTG_K8YE-plORkJmWYUb72zDbT3ejZ0zhQ7YMPPWNc=)** Peter, I never liked asking you for money. But last year, I lost to Don Bacon by less than 6,000 (!!!) votes. And in a presidential year, all eyes will be on our district and its pivotal electoral vote. So believe me when I say -- I’ll need a strong grassroots team behind me every step of the way. **[Peter, I know I can defeat Don Bacon. But DC Republicans have funneled him more than $600,000 to protect his seat and continue his voting record against our families. That’s why I need to kick off this campaign with a massive show of support -- $50,000 in my first 24 hours -- to get my message out and flip this seat for Nebraskans. Can I count on your donation right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67747908/420739242/1765688408?refcode=urd-em-230808-split_vargas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWViNmY0YmUtZTUzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6dTG_K8YE-plORkJmWYUb72zDbT3ejZ0zhQ7YMPPWNc=)** name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Bring the Kingdom to the Capitol
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-XN0g)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! **And, after reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL, we are in the FINAL WEEKS of our 2023 tour ... and we'll be roll through the final states in 2024.** [**Will you help TPUSA Faith finish our FINAL EVENTS for the Kingdom to Capitol Tour this year, with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more to help us reach as many people as possible before September 1?**](http://trk.libertyledger.-E9G1-mQ)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.libertyledger._cSNQ)
---
So far, **Kingdom to the Capitol** has visited almost half of America's capitals. We only have two more weekends, where we will visit six states to finish out this summer. We plan to roll through the rest of America in 2024. Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.libertyledger._bBB_KyhEA) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America!**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
After reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL this summer, we want to reach THOUSANDS more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, are bringing the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.libertyledger.) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-WePPtguYQl1Paw)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjIwLWI5Y2VjYWY3MWFmYjRlYjViNjE3MTc5NDAwMWQ4ZDg4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/iUNIR_q6_dQU426TC6BsUA) to unsubscribe.

* _**Rebuild the domestic supply chain**_

clean_body: ...we're worse off under Bidenomics| | | | | Are you sick of the wasteful way your tax dollars are being spent, Peter? Mariela Roca has two kids. She gets it. She knows how stressful it is to put food on the table with how high grocery prices, gas prices, and rent are right now. As your Congresswoman, Mariela will work to: Restore fiscal sanity Rein in out-of-control spending and debt Rebuild the domestic supply chain She believes these are the right steps forward to provide economic security to working families. Mariela believes that the American Dream is alive and well – but the economically illiterate policies of the Biden-Harris administration diminish that dream and make it harder to reach for many American families. Every American is worse off thanks to their reckless mismanagement of our economy. She promises to always vote to lower your taxes. You know the best way to spend your money — not the government. Thank you, Noah** Team Roca | | | | | | | Mariela Roca is a veteran of the U.S. Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Air Force or the Department of Defense.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Honesty on Tuesday
body:
#

Peter — we’re going to take a risk today and give you some brutal honesty. This is only going to a select group of Ruben’s supporters, so please. Don’t share.
Take a look at this:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=1&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)
This chart shows Ruben’s drop-off in fundraising from the end of July into the beginning of August. Donations always fall off a bit between an end-of-month push and the start of a new month.
Now, here’s the brutally honest part of this message: This drop-off is much worse than we thought it would be.
If it continues, this could be a disaster for the campaign.
Giving you this information was a risk. But we did it because we hope that you’ll see how important your support really is.
Your early support has been a huge help to the campaign, and it’s appreciated by all of us. But again, brutal honesty: we need you to make your first donation today.
[**So, please:[**Make contribution #1. Take that next step and help set Ruben on a path to victory in 2024. Any amount — even one dollar — helps us get back on track. We really need you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=3&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-aug23.7Jwrcb&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=22&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)**

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-aug23.hNnBDZ&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=24&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)**

**** | **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-aug23.Q6fKq6&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=25&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-aug23.EpL7PM&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=26&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)**

**** | **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&refcode=em230808-1-f&t=27&akid=896%2E734936%2EgZ2w5b)**

We have a real chance to do something important in 2024 — we can beat Kyrsten Sinema AND Kari Lake and put a true Democrat in the Senate. But we can’t do any of that without your help. So please, if you can, make that donation. Thank you, Ruben Gallego for Arizona

name: Tim Scott
subject: I’m respectfully asking one more time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election. America's future is on the line!

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a75764d5cf94a908df89fecd7dade56&_e=rErEsargbbwA5tpopPe6c3etdtycRPW9e1Xv90TUlhjUqquTT0yAb9XjfsQdtL6QmEDFKM7VLBqbInwLHz-m9ZPjmRFG5M1vWh_aIJ6CkLdciD5uFc-HRSQ9VC3HUn7f2dTDc5unn31p1apnR4F9x51Lh5W3XzeiYFKuhxMGInQ-U9Yi-YSqxZXlzEGfmotM8tCnqoA-YlYqzYUS7ABtV5SaNr1rFumPombW0-sZEImz1Whf1lV8XiMb5HE7jpOQbgyCC-yQFOfwoQhdcEdpDL4GWP8OnzbnMo8ptXX57dGgGo06Yh6FLz2DTjmAEz4vCpL8qeD0kp_67jNuwmNdNvKYRz9kfuf9gzbylAgXfDgfY3QngWXi5f2PW4N3Uyn9CQ-lrD0lgY6YoLbwWlYpIqITkrUkCDvDjOBTUnxJ26MxSyfSVTNhIfvjTzcYm3Qg "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")

Friend,

I hate asking for money, but I need your help to make sure my campaign has the resources we need to keep fighting.

**_[Can you help?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a75764d5cf94a908df89fecd7dade56&_e=rErEsargbbwA5tpopPe6c3etdtycRPW9e1Xv90TUlhjUqquTT0yAb9XjfsQdtL6QmEDFKM7VLBqbInwLHz-m9ZPjmRFG5M1vWh_aIJ6CkLdciD5uFc-HRSQ9VC3HUn7f2dTDc5unn31p1apnR4F9x51Lh5W3XzeiYFKuhxMGInQ-U9Yi-YSqxZXlzEGfmotM8tCnqoA-YlYqzYUS7ABtV5SaNr1rFumPombW0-sZEImz1Whf1lV8XiMb5HE7jpOQbgyCC-yQFOfwoQhdcEdpDL4GWP8OnzbnMo8ptXX57dH99_Kzi0wWFSoYT9982XXkDo1vwCIMyLCmsAdQE81JinOIa53JyIOb_edKze89sDCimTJJN8Zuxon_SfmI4OsT2XF4JvtF2cVcRJXvAqIzCVgM4WX0kpJ8VYAmI0XhOjsFZ4ctDZwCg7CrIa94NSK3 "Can you help?")_ We just passed a MAJOR deadline.**

| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a75764d5cf94a908df89fecd7dade56&_e=rErEsargbbwA5tpopPe6c3etdtycRPW9e1Xv90TUlhjUqquTT0yAb9XjfsQdtL6QmEDFKM7VLBqbInwLHz-m9ZPjmRFG5M1vWh_aIJ6CkLdciD5uFc-HRSQ9VC3HUn7f2dTDc5unn31p1apnR4F9x51Lh5W3XzeiYFKuhxMGInQ-U9Yi-YSqxZXlzEGfmotM8tCnqoA-YlYqzYUS7ABtV5SaNr1rFumPombW0-sZEImz1Whf1lV8XiMb5HE7jpOQbgyCC-yQFOfwoQhdcEdpDL4GWP8OnzbnMo8ptXX57dG1_QlLO0Q60WWI1ZBHZZNjoT1vz_F5ibGWpFrh-n38M1lqg6WI0aj8Ayq45j3soJ8Xur2uCQcTktj9jOBNzfRsxVXYEWlUwfmCKNTQagsQlcq_0KrcXZWv_OvMYox3iLu3lEN6E0CyizY42P5xzSzT "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")
---

Seriously, anything you chip in today will help us catch up, whether it's $3, $30, $300, or even $3,300.

We can't sit on the sidelines and let Biden win this election. America's future is on the line!

So I'm respectfully asking one more time. **_[Can you give a critical $3 gift to support my campaign?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a75764d5cf94a908df89fecd7dade56&_e=rErEsargbbwA5tpopPe6c3etdtycRPW9e1Xv90TUlhjUqquTT0yAb9XjfsQdtL6QmEDFKM7VLBqbInwLHz-m9ZenONck77arq-BoO6niehe3Rc9kYUygcKShyicn-MyH4jt6a4dntP0Q3nrEhkX7tb7WoUQXewe0cCVI9wj83mMK0PFqTOW3wtsCbYUt62XbHvLeelgW2leIAV0be91qnht8frdVIjBpFK2GRxFMHs6eIxJ2k-NcArdxaBFu-exxCZ4drfikHdyWsa00LFkSSkSwFdk9Mbtsil4Swny0zLsw9j6btw0Y4KhHStHOJdJQljGreoMBPFyJi4sB6mwlmP68UnnxNuUK6qMt_jH3isnbvXMf2NNmZZwmf0FuPGMtvP5S-intjnl2gO2wK6dhT-DqEbS1k_wByrXQUXhmyHn8jMmSLNt0yAC8J9kRjz8FMrJlL9tkl8qjdK553f1gjg%3D%3D "Can you give a critical $3 gift to support my campaign?")_**

If you can afford to help, we could really use it.

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a75764d5cf94a908df89fecd7dade56&_e=rErEsargbbwA5tpopPe6c3etdtycRPW9e1Xv90TUlhjUqquTT0yAb9XjfsQdtL6QmEDFKM7VLBqbInwLHz-m9ZPjmRFG5M1vWh_aIJ6CkLdciD5uFc-HRSQ9VC3HUn7f2dTDc5unn31p1apnR4F9x51Lh5W3XzeiYFKuhxMGInQ-U9Yi-YSqxZXlzEGfmotM8tCnqoA-YlYqzYUS7ABtV5SaNr1rFumPombW0-sZEImz1Whf1lV8XiMb5HE7jpOQbgyCC-yQFOfwoQhdcEdpDL4GWP8OnzbnMo8ptXX57dG-6Guo4jvkdX2PVxuCd9pSN5-pnfaMrFfhESR463_nV0gdwkiGPLFHL39DjuMSBLxT41F6XWpnOoqeQ5YpiDwdmF2zVJHitPoePKeVF7mf2itj7j4iSXdjoIUHkrcT4Wk2RUcAT_561WiomED8h9mU "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")

Tim Scott

subject: Save the Date: Granite Solutions Summit!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Join us on Saturday, September 23rd!

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

I am proud to announce the first-ever **Granite Solutions Summit** to be held on Saturday, September 23rd!

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fopenwith.link%2FGraniteSolutions.org%2Fevents%2F1830.html/1/01000189d53d4485-0bc9beb3-262c-4aa6-be9a-245d6e465c1a-000000/gy02wRaDMkz2toTkKf4gmY6NMBo=334)

Join us for an impactful day of learning and growth on Saturday, September 23rd. This candidate & activist training is designed for those who are passionate about shaping the future of the Granite State. From field organizing to social media use, our expert panelists and presenters will guide attendees through various essential topics.

From field organizing to social media use, our expert panelists and presenters will guide attendees through various essential topics. Whether you're a seasoned candidate or a budding activist, this training will equip you with the tools and knowledge to make a difference in your community.

Event Partners and Sponsors will be announced as we get closer to the event.

name: America First War Room

body:
Spotlight Feature: Rep. Jana Hughes | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12617695?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=734fbe3f26&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

What does 2024 look like politically?

2024 will have all FIVE Federal races up for election. Unique to 2024 is the dual Senate race as Incumbent **Senator Deb Fischer** is seeking re-election of a new term and Incumbent **Senator Pete Ricketts** is seeking re-election to fulfill the remaining two years of former Senator Ben Sasse’s partial term. As with every federal election year, all three Congressional seats are up for election with Republican Incumbents **Adrian Smith (CD3), Don Bacon (CD2), & Mike Flood (CD1)**. As we all know, this will be a presidential election year with our biggest opportunity to chart a better path for America with a Republican President. 2024 in Nebraska should see a record number of voter turnout simply because of the heightened excitement for so many high-profile races.

See the following stats for Presidential Year voting turnout and voting method. **_2020 Presidential Election_** **_
2016 Presidential Election_** **_
2012 Presidential Election_** **_
2008 Presidential Election_**

The bigger questions are...
1. What does 2024 look like politically for YOU?
2. Where are the American people?

Historically, the answer by Republicans has been to continue living our lives, going to church, raising our families, attending our extracurricular activities, while we wait to cast our ballot at the next election.

That is simply no longer enough.

The time has come to stand firm on our American principles. The time has come to mentally, spiritually, and personally prepare for an unprecedented opportunity. We must equip ourselves now to give all we can to involvement in local and national politics; to express our discontent with the way our beloved America is slipping through our fingers. We must be willing to sacrifice in the short term, to ensure the well being of our state and country in the long term. We must have more resolve and commitment to something GREATER than ourselves to see the success of our 2024 goals.

In 2024 we will focus significant energy on voter registration & engagement goals:
* _Expand our Volunteer Base:_ There is no better way to have a voice in politics than by volunteering. The NEGOP is organizing engagement events state-wide and at the county level to present opportunities for volunteer recruitment and voter registration. We will be offering training programs from the RNC & internal design to ensure a well-structured operation.
* _Recruit and Develop Candidates:_ _**YOU WANT CHANGE?**_ Then, **_BE_** the change. Become a candidate for a local level of governance like _YOUR_ local school board! There are 244 local school boards districts & 19 Educational Service Units (ESU’s) and in 2024 there will be elections for about 3 candidates in each district. In collaboration with our county parties, state district caucuses, and national partners, our primary focus is to identify and recruit exceptional **Constitutional & Platform Republican (CPR’s)** candidates. Interviewed and prepared CPR’s will revive the party specifically targeting the local level such as _School Boards, ESU’s, Community College Boards, City Councils, NRD’s, Power Boards, and County Department_ positions.

We have the resources for Republicans to get elected, all that is missing is _YOU_!
* _Strategic Engagement:_ To maximize Republican turnout, we will seek relationships with diverse communities across the state through the dedicated efforts of our Executive Committee and Community Centers. Our first goal is a Hispanic Community Center located in Congressional District 2 with an ability to develop state-wide engagements and embrace the Latino culture. Secondary goals will include engaging to the growing Asian, African, and Eastern European communities within Nebraska.

I believe 2024 will be the most successful election year for the NEGOP ever. A renewed focus on county party development will bring unprecedented increase of local ballot race turnout and assist our Federal and State candidates.

Can Nebraska count on you?

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---

## Spotlight Feature: From Rep Jana Hughes
---
| Back in 2021, the Nebraska Public Power District (NPPD) Board of Directors approved the goal to achieve net-zero carbon emissions from their energy generation resources by 2050. Sounds impressive but what does that mean to be “net-zero?”

If you were to ask people over a certain age they would remember the term “net-zero” as meaning a dial-up internet company that provided free internet access for the price of a bunch of ads on your computer once you were connected. However, net-zero refers to offsetting any carbon emissions created by energy generation by a variety of different methods, including zero carbon emissions, carbon capture and storage, etc.

According to NPPD, 86 of Nebraska’s 93 counties receive 65 percent of their energy needs from carbon free sources. Carbon free means that the energy generated does not produce any carbon emissions. While NPPD is growing its wind and solar energy generation capacity, it produces most of its carbon free energy at the Cooper Nuclear Station in Brownville, Nebraska.

While there are many different carbon free energy technologies available, such as wind, solar, geothermal, hydroelectric, none have the potential energy generation capacity and reliability as does nuclear. Opponents of nuclear power state that Nebraska has plenty of wind and solar capacity. This is true as long as the sun shines and the wind is strong enough but not too strong - many days the wind speed is too high to safely operate wind turbines and they have to be temporarily shut down!

The bottom line is that anyone spending more than a fleeting moment in Nebraska knows that Mother Nature is anything but reliable here. She is, in fact, reliably unreliable. Therefore it seems incumbent to at least explore nuclear power generation as an option as part of Nebraska’s future energy generation portfolio.

Setting aside the political dynamics behind the movement toward net-zero carbon emissions, the fact remains that Nebraska has a steady, growing demand for energy resources. The number of electric vehicles (EVs) on Nebraska roadways has increased dramatically. Locally, EV registrations have more than doubled in less than a decade in our state. The demand for electricity has steadily increased for the past sixty years and will continue to do so. In that light, we need to ensure that our energy generation systems have enough capacity to produce the electricity we need in a reliable manner.

One option that has emerged with promising potential are small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs). New, advanced SMRs with enhanced safety features are the next-generation of reactors that have been used safely for more than 70 years to power many U.S. Naval vessels. Currently, the Nebraska legislature is conducting a study to examine the feasibility of building and operating SMRs in Nebraska. NPPD is also conducting a site study to determine the 15 most viable sites for SMR locations within Nebraska. While we may be a decade or more away from the possibility of SMRs to be a part of Nebraska’s energy generation capacity, it is promising to see Nebraska take such a lead in securing our energy needs in a carbon free manner.

Some question why we don’t build more traditional, large nuclear power stations but those require a significant amount of land and access to rivers or lakes for cooling purposes and require billions in dollars of investment. SMRs require a significantly smaller footprint, cost far less and can even utilize spent nuclear fuel rods, thereby reducing our state’s current inventory of nuclear waste generated by the current Cooper Nuclear Station as well as from the former and now decommissioned Fort Calhoun Nuclear Station. I look forward to learning more from both ongoing studies and to further learn about SMRs as a member of the Natural Resources Committee, which has oversight of energy legislation before the Nebraska Legislature.

I've begun scheduling some open houses this summer to meet with constituents around the district. As always, if we can be of assistance to you in any way, please do not hesitate to contact my office. I do receive dozens of calls a day and hundreds of emails (sometimes a day!), so I am doing my best to respond. I prioritize responding to constituents, so please include your mailing address in your email or when leaving a message so I know you live in the district. My staff passes along messages, so if you'd like a call back, please let them know! My email address is [jhughes@leg.ne.gov](mailto:jhughes@leg.ne.gov), and the office phone number is 402-471-2756. You can also follow me on Facebook at [Senator Jana Hughes](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f36b7c4985&e=25844e23a8). While my office is on the 10th floor, which does require a staff member to access, please feel free to let us know if you’re in the Capitol and would like to stop by. My staff members - Matt and Katie - are always available to assist you with your needs.
---
|
---
| [Rep. Jana Hughes](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e5ff5ece41&e=25844e23a8)
Representing State Senate District 24
[https://janahughesforlegislature.com/](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ebc5e2a989&e=25844e23a8)

| **About Rep. Hughes** Elected to Nebraska Legislature: 2022 Born Jana Luebbe, Aug. 7, 1971, in Friend. Education: Graduate of Seward High School, 1989; Texas A&M University (B.S. in industrial engineering, magna cum laude), 1993. Family: Married John Hughes, July 5, 1996; three children: Lena, Anna and Hank. Occupation: Substitute teacher and exercise instructor Former: Engineering consultant Member: vice president, Seward Public School Board; Holy Savior Lutheran Church; Seward Jr. Women’s Club (president, vice president, secretary, treasurer); board, Seward Heartfelt Inc.; Seward County Republicans; Seward Changing the Game Committee; Meals on Wheels. Former member: St. John Lutheran School Parent Teacher League (president, treasurer, secretary); Seward County 4-H Council; club leader, Seward 4-H; youth group leader, Holy Savior Lutheran Church; COVID-19 relief chair, Legacy Fund of Seward County. Honors and awards: CoVan award, Texas A&M University; outstanding senior industrial engineering student.
