We must be willing to sacrifice in the short term, to ensure the well being of our state and country in the long term. We must have more resolve and commitment to something GREATER than ourselves to see the success of our 2024 goals. In 2024 we will focus significant energy on voter registration & engagement goals: Expand our Volunteer Base: There is no better way to have a voice in politics than by volunteering. The NEGOP is organizing engagement events state-wide and at the county level to present opportunities for volunteer recruitment and voter registration. We will be offering training programs from the RNC & internal design to ensure a well-structured operation. Recruit and Develop Candidates: YOU WANT CHANGE? Then, BE the change. Become a candidate for a local level of governance like YOUR local school board! There are 244 local school boards districts & 19 Educational Service Units (ESU’s) and in 2024 there will be elections for about 3 candidates in each district. In collaboration with our county parties, state district caucuses, and national partners, our primary focus is to identify and recruit exceptional Constitutional & Platform Republican (CPR’s) candidates. Interviewed and prepared CPR’s will revive the party specifically targeting the local level such as School Boards, ESU’s, Community College Boards, City Councils, NRD’s, Power Boards, and County Department positions. We have the resources for Republicans to get elected, all that is missing is YOU! Strategic Engagement: To maximize Republican turnout, we will seek relationships with diverse communities across the state through the dedicated efforts of our Executive Committee and Community Centers. Our first goal is a Hispanic Community Center located in Congressional District 2 with an ability to develop state-wide engagements and embrace the Latino culture. Secondary goals will include engaging to the growing Asian, African, and Eastern European communities within Nebraska. I believe 2024 will be the most successful election year for the NEGOP ever. A renewed focus on county party development will bring unprecedented increase of local ballot race turnout and assist our Federal and State candidates. Can Nebraska count on you? With much blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood | "Donate" | | Spotlight Feature: From Rep Jana Hughes | Back in 2021, the Nebraska Public Power District (NPPD) Board of Directors approved the goal to achieve net-zero carbon emissions from their energy generation resources by 2050. Sounds impressive but what does that mean to be “net-zero?” If you were to ask people over a certain age they would remember the term “net-zero” as meaning a dial-up internet company that provided free internet access for the price of a bunch of ads on your computer once you were connected. However, net-zero refers to offsetting any carbon emissions created by energy generation by a variety of different methods, including zero carbon emissions, carbon capture and storage, etc. According to NPPD, 86 of Nebraska’s 93 counties receive 65 percent of their energy needs from carbon free sources. Carbon free means that the energy generated does not produce any carbon emissions. While NPPD is growing its wind and solar energy generation capacity, it produces most of its carbon free energy at the Cooper Nuclear Station in Brownville, Nebraska. While there are many different carbon free energy technologies available, such as wind, solar, geothermal, hydroelectric, none have the potential energy generation capacity and reliability as does nuclear. Opponents of nuclear power state that Nebraska has plenty of wind and solar capacity. This is true as long as the sun shines and the wind is strong enough but not too strong - many days the wind speed is too high to safely operate wind turbines and they have to be temporarily shut down! The bottom line is that anyone spending more than a fleeting moment in Nebraska knows that Mother Nature is anything but reliable here. She is, in fact, reliably unreliable. Therefore it seems incumbent to at least explore nuclear power generation as an option as part of Nebraska’s future energy generation portfolio. Setting aside the political dynamics behind the movement toward net-zero carbon emissions, the fact remains that Nebraska has a steady, growing demand for energy resources. The number of electric vehicles (EVs) on Nebraska roadways has increased dramatically. Locally, EV registrations have more than doubled in less than a decade in our state. The demand for electricity has steadily increased for the past sixty years and will continue to do so. In that light, we need to ensure that our energy generation systems have enough capacity to produce the electricity we need in a reliable manner. One option that has emerged with promising potential are small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs). New, advanced SMRs with enhanced safety features are the next-generation of reactors that have been used safely for more than 70 years to power many U.S. Naval vessels. Currently, the Nebraska legislature is conducting a study to examine the feasibility of building and operating SMRs in Nebraska. NPPD is also conducting a site study to determine the 15 most viable sites for SMR locations within Nebraska. While we may be a decade or more away from the possibility of SMRs to be a part of Nebraska’s energy generation capacity, it is promising to see Nebraska take such a lead in securing our energy needs in a carbon free manner. Some question why we don’t build more traditional, large nuclear power stations but those require a significant amount of land and access to rivers or lakes for cooling purposes and require billions in dollars of investment. SMRs require a significantly smaller footprint, cost far less and can even utilize spent nuclear fuel rods, thereby reducing our state’s current inventory of nuclear waste generated by the current Cooper Nuclear Station as well as from the former and now decommissioned Fort Calhoun Nuclear Station. I look forward to learning more from both ongoing studies and to further learn about SMRs as a member of the Natural Resources Committee, which has oversight of energy legislation before the Nebraska Legislature. I've begun scheduling some open houses this summer to meet with constituents around the district. As always, if we can be of assistance to you in any way, please do not hesitate to contact my office. I do receive dozens of calls a day and hundreds of emails (sometimes a day!), so I am doing my best to respond. I prioritize responding to constituents, so please include your mailing address in your email or when leaving a message so I know you live in the district. My staff passes along messages, so if you'd like a call back, please let them know! My email address is mailto:jhughes@leg.ne.gov, and the office phone number is 402-471-2756. You can also follow me on Facebook at . While my office is on the 10th floor, which does require a staff member to access, please feel free to let us know if you’re in the Capitol and would like to stop by. My staff members - Matt and Katie - are always available to assist you with your needs. | | Representing State Senate District 24 | | About Rep. Hughes Elected to Nebraska Legislature: 2022 Born Jana Luebbe, Aug. 7, 1971, in Friend. Education: Graduate of Seward High School, 1989; Texas A&M University (B.S. in industrial engineering, magna cum laude), 1993. Family: Married John Hughes, July 5, 1996; three children: Lena, Anna and Hank. Occupation: Substitute teacher and exercise instructor Former: Engineering consultant Member: vice president, Seward Public School Board; Holy Savior Lutheran Church; Seward Jr. Women’s Club (president, vice president, secretary, treasurer); board, Seward Heartfelt Inc.; Seward County Republicans; Seward Changing the Game Committee; Meals on Wheels. Former member: St. John Lutheran School Parent Teacher League (president, treasurer, secretary); Seward County 4-H Council; club leader, Seward 4-H; youth group leader, Holy Savior Lutheran Church; COVID-19 relief chair, Legacy Fund of Seward County. Honors and awards: CoVan award, Texas A&M University; outstanding senior industrial engineering student. | | Upcoming Events | Friday, August 18th, 6:30 pm CT: NEGOP+ Exclusive Event: An Evening with Kellyanne Conway Divots Conference Center 4200 West Norfolk Avenue Norfolk, NE 68701 Purchase of ticket includes a 1 year membership to NEGOP+ (Booster Level) Cost for non-members: $150 Tickets can be purchased Already a NEGOP+ Member? Tickets for members can be obtained Saturday, August 19th, 7:30 am CT: State Central Committee Meeting Divots Conference Center 4200 West Norfolk Avenue Norfolk, NE 68701 We do ask that the SCC members and guests contribute $25 to cover the cost of food. Breakfast and registration will be from 7:30am to 9am Tickets can be purchased August 24th - September 4th: Nebraska State Fair Sign up opportunities to volunteer are available General event details available here Tuesday, September 5, 5:30-7pm Kathleen Kauth Fundraiser Hosted by Former Senator Suzanne Geist and Liz Davids Where: 5030 Sawgrass Drive | Lincoln, NE 68526 RSVP - Suzanne Geist - 402.440.1400 Upcoming Events section is not an endorsement or paid promotion/advertisement section for the NEGOP, Chairman Underwood, or its governing bodies. | | Just for Fun | | You did it! Nebraska finished 9th (between Michigan and Iowa) and will be featured on the September page of the 2024 calendar. | On Sunday, August 6th, Chairman Underwood spent time at Holmes Lake Park in Lincoln, Nebraska to engage and celebrate READING. Brave Book Story Hour was hosted by Empower Nebraska and it's founder Liz Davids; the fun event was designed to promote the goodness of reading to children and the joy of letting one's imagination run wild. Stay tuned for more opportunities to be involved with Brave Book Story Hours and connect to your community. For more information on Brave Book Story Hours events contact LIz Davids with empowernebraska@gmail.com. "When a child learns to read their whole future is brighter." \--Chairman Underwood | | Weather Update - Lincoln | | Weather Update - Grand Island | | Weather Update - Scottsbluff | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it’s true.__ _ _What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck._ It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making...** ****...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them.** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ – and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I’m asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0tvublt01gp8uph556iagegcnhplob7tumudl50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli62o32cth2bs) And as a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008._ __He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.__ __He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage.__ __And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **“A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza**** ****“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin**** ** **“David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfver90vk10ivhnvrq42l70bnno3kc5t88tlssjo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli62o32cth2bs)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform [it].” **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. [**Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today** ,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuj7de20bgc207e9abav5b38ba6a3efhcutbs0h8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli62o32cth2bs) and as a thank you for your generous support, I’ll reserve a complimentary copy of my book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv2dtccm8js5fho9v2h8fglsovmamjrfqg5a9kg0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli62o32cth2bs)
---

Today is a special day - it’s N ational Dollar Day! Today, we’re asking you to pitch in just $1 (or more) to take back the Senate and keep Florida red. I know it might not seem like a lot, but in such a close race, every single dollar counts. Senator Scott’s Democrat opponents are raking in major money from liberal activists — we’re hearing north of $500,000 in just a few weeks. And now that they're spewing off constant attacks, the hard part of this race has officially begun. All we’re asking for today is $1 (or more if you can) - can you pitch in now to fuel our fight? Thank you, Lisa Finance DirectorSen. Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; margin-left: auto !important; margin-right: auto !important; } .fluid-centered { margin-left: auto !important; margin-right: auto !important; } } Tim Scott is a man of faith first & foremost, Peter. While Tim is known now for his stringent defense of the unborn, unwavering support of religious liberty, and constant use of bible verses, he wasn’t always as devout as he appears today. Tim’s faith journey begins with an unfortunate tragedy. HELP TIM SCOTT DEFEND FAITH IN AMERICA On August 22, 1981, an exhausted 16 year old Tim Scott was driving home after dropping his single mother off at another long shift as a nurse’s aid when he fell asleep at the wheel and suffered a near-fatal crash. While Tim escaped death with just a few injuries, the crash left his hopes of a football career in college fleeting. That is until the Lord led Tim to Presbyterian College in the form of a partial sports scholarship, the location where he would officially accept Christ into his life. After devoting his life to God, Tim’s purpose in life became clearer. From a successful career in the insurance industry to serving the people of South Carolina at a local, state, and federal level, Tim has been blessed with so many unique experiences that have led him here today. America needs a leader who knows the power of faith and Tim is the solution . Can you spare a moment to help Tim Scott’s Christian-Conservative Presidential campaign, Peter? name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: I smell fraud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
get a load of this!
| | | They’re calling it “the greatest grift in U.S. history”, Friend... An Associated Press analysis found that fraudsters may have stolen over $280 billion in COVID-19 relief funding, and another $123 billion was wasted or misspent. The appalling amount of stolen money is only matched by the Biden Administration’s apathy and absence of leadership. I’m not ‘shocked’ by this President, or his on-high D.C. cohorts who continually kick Americans while we’re down, and turn around and expect us to clean their muddy boots while they’re at it. No, not shocked ... I’m a southern dog on a bone and no one will stop me from digging into these **leftist Democrats’ financial failures**! Like this: 837 BILLION DOLLARS of funding. That’s how much money this IRS program had in total, _with a history of staggering incompetence when doling out our tax dollars to “programs” mind you_ , ended up paying out nearly $8 billion to “ineligible individuals”. Did you also know 60 people have been charged in connection with a scheme to steal more than $250 million from a federal program designed to provide meals to low-income children in Minnesota? _No, of course not!_ Because that would mean Joe Biden and his rank Democrats would need to answer to US, the American people for a change. These tyrannical top-down D.C. thieves must be held accountable for stealing from the American people, and together, I’m more than confident we’ll get to the bottom of this swamp, Friend. We’re only getting started! Back to work, Troy [p.s. If you’re able, please consider pitching in any amount of support to help me keep working to uncover the truth and bring these fraudsters to justice.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/47a7859374fcebdf/92b929d2c91ba271c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcr9nqs3h1t6hgbc6qnt2u13g8r8uqdj7vh39v7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli6eor4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zro2g15nn60v32o8gqn6t0pk25hidvevk5iml8uo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli6eor4c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6tb07rs1btdk02ibiecq1aoaeqo872u7g9oa2s0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cli6eor4c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Kevin Thomas
subject: My journey to Congress starts now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas
body:
Will you join me in building a stronger Long Island? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67764957/420779132/1420976906?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0NTRhOC1mNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z_95wT2th6bbcrkyOiTGf8qBQxuW4-vlYGDiX4cC_E=&emci=d7c5914e-4d35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=089454a8-f535-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
---
Team,

Opportunity. Hope. Community. Long Island has given me so much.

And I’m determined to give back. **That’s why I launched my campaign for Congress in New York's 4th district.**

My name is Kevin Thomas, and my story is a Long Island story. It’s a story of perseverance, defending the vulnerable, and a deep commitment to our community.

So, a few years ago as families struggled with the high cost of living and the increasing stresses of raising a family, paying the mortgage, and staying afloat – I embarked on a mission to do something about it.

I won a race no one thought was possible. I beat a 40-year Republican incumbent, becoming the first Indian-American to ever serve in the New York Senate.

And at a time of high cynicism about what can actually get done, I accomplished _real_ results for Nassau County families.

I’ve stood up to MAGA extremists and transformed Democratic beliefs into tangible legislation. I’ve fought to protect access to abortions, strengthen our gun safety laws, defend student loan borrowers from predatory loan servicers, safeguard our environment, and deliver justice for survivors of abuse.

But there is much more work to be done. And the stakes have never been higher in Washington.

**[I'm counting on your support in this journey. Please, contribute whatever you can to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for Congress — and let's come out swinging together!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67764958/420779133/22722082?refcode=em_KT_FR_Launch1_automation_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0NTRhOC1mNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z_95wT2th6bbcrkyOiTGf8qBQxuW4-vlYGDiX4cC_E=)** | **[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67764959/420779134/22722082?refcode=em_KT_FR_Launch1_automation_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0NTRhOC1mNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z_95wT2th6bbcrkyOiTGf8qBQxuW4-vlYGDiX4cC_E=)**
---
At a time when families need action, MAGA Republicans in Washington offer up extremism. Playing political games that make things worse. Putting our economy in jeopardy. Restricting abortion. And dividing us like never before.

These forces of extremism and division threaten our progress and the well-being of Long Island families. We need action, real results, and genuine change.

**The path to take back Congress starts right here in New York.** As a strong Democrat, I'll fight like hell for our shared values in Congress. I am ready to secure a woman's right to an abortion, pass meaningful and common-sense gun safety legislation, restore voting and civil rights, defend our planet from the ravages of climate change, and so much more.

**[But I can't do it alone. I need your support and your voice to help us win big in 2024. I would be immensely grateful if you could chip in today to become a Founding Donor of my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67764960/420779135/22722082?refcode=em_KT_FR_Launch1_automation_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk0NTRhOC1mNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Z_95wT2th6bbcrkyOiTGf8qBQxuW4-vlYGDiX4cC_E=)**

clean_body: Will you join me in building a stronger Long Island? | Team, Opportunity. Hope. Community. Long Island has given me so much. And I’m determined to give back. That’s why I launched my campaign for Congress in New York's 4th district. My name is Kevin Thomas, and my story is a Long Island story. It’s a story of perseverance, defending the vulnerable, and a deep commitment to our community. So, a few years ago as families struggled with the high cost of living and the increasing stresses of raising a family, paying the mortgage, and staying afloat – I embarked on a mission to do something about it. I won a race no one thought was possible. I beat a 40-year Republican incumbent, becoming the first Indian-American to ever serve in the New York Senate. And at a time of high cynicism about what can actually get done, I accomplished real results for Nassau County families. I’ve stood up to MAGA extremists and transformed Democratic beliefs into tangible legislation. I’ve fought to protect access to abortions, strengthen our gun safety laws, defend student loan borrowers from predatory loan servicers, safeguard our environment, and deliver justice for survivors of abuse. But there is much more work to be done. And the stakes have never been higher in Washington. = | = At a time when families need action, MAGA Republicans in Washington offer up extremism. Playing political games that make things worse. Putting our economy in jeopardy. Restricting abortion. And dividing us like never before. These forces of extremism and division threaten our progress and the well-being of Long Island families. We need action, real results, and genuine change. The path to take back Congress starts right here in New York. As a strong Democrat, I'll fight like hell for our shared values in Congress. I am ready to secure a woman's right to an abortion, pass meaningful and common-sense gun safety legislation, restore voting and civil rights, defend our planet from the ravages of climate change, and so much more. = = Together, we can build a campaign that empowers and uplifts the voices of Long Island families. name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Cook Political Report: The Most Competitive Open Seat in the Country
body:
CPR calls Democrat Curtis Hertel “the ultimate career politician” | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f%26ss_email_id%3D64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2%26ss_campaign_name%3DCook%2BPolitical%2BReport%253A%2BThe%2BMost%2BCompetitive%2BOpen%2BSeat%2Bin%2Bthe%2BCountry%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-08-08T14%253A22%253A34Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=0ODR6DZ23ownYNRZT19H-nctrPQ%3D)
---
| Good morning Peter Willis - Exciting news for our campaign. [The Cook Political Report](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cookpolitical.com%2Fratings%2Fhouse-race-ratings&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=xO8348TU1FsFtN-ZODUPWCVq8pk%3D) just declared Michigan’s 7th Congressional District **“the most competitive open seat in the country,”** rating it a **“pure Toss Up.”** We can win this seat and make sure Republicans hold our majority in Congress. Read the summary below. - Tom
---
---
|
---
MI-07: OPEN (Slotkin) (D): **Toss Up.** Democratic Rep. Elissa Slotkin's Senate run instantly made this Biden +1 district **the most competitive open seat in the country**. At this point, the race between GOP former state Sen. Tom Barrett and Democratic former state Sen. Curtis Hertel looks like a **pure Toss Up**.Barrett is running again in 2024, and Republicans are counting on a much more level playing field. Not only is he no longer up against the Slotkin fundraising juggernaut, he won't suffer from the drag of Proposition 3 — the constitutional amendment that rallied supporters of abortion rights (including in the college town of East Lansing), alienated independent voters from Republicans and propelled Gov. Gretchen Whitmer and Slotkin to victory.
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fcookreport&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=OMNEdHj6_KhmbqVsqeb_E2qvJts%3D)
---
The 2024 general election already looks set. After prominent Democrats including Ingham County Clerk Barb Byrum and Lansing Mayor Andy Schor passed on running, Slotkin and Democrats coalesced around Hertel. **Hertel is the ultimate career politician** : First elected to the Ingham CountyCommission in 2000 at age 22, he won a state Senate seat in 2014 and became Whitmer's director of legislative affairs after terming out in 2022.**Hertel's closeness with Whitmer ensures he'll be able to raise plenty of money.** But Republicans believe he'll be much easier to attack as a political insider than Barrett, who can at least tout his military service. In particular, Republicans argue Hertel “owns” this year's controversial push by Whitmer and the legislature to pass $175 million in tax incentives for Chinese-owned Gotion Inc. to build a $2.4 billion electric vehicle battery factory in northern Michigan.
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fcookreport&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=OMNEdHj6_KhmbqVsqeb_E2qvJts%3D)
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fbarrettbrigade%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=CdTXK_vbCVDrxp4heYzliQFn2lc%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fsquarespace&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=xLEmG0ugs5DP4V2hiZOWeA6-s8o%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftomformichigan&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=DZNexIw8YpSNK491NgPgqPghLPw%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=koLNM_dD-pZ5QbFurQPREgmEZCg%3D) | | [ ](mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com)

PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA
[ Unsubscribe ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64d24e0afa8d916cc37a1aa2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2F4S9XnKCATW3RnwGinWDtZpBjX1ExQkD46BkAxQWYO-ChiLz8P17fr8Cg4eZeWlHFWCDSdtH1rzm_4V_OhiCD0X1CfcHHcQPVKrHH9833eGmn9l9BiQlLpIXseyXFTTlFoXQD42aEFMn9GXxyc1gdGk8DTATGPz84M-lnBCwo4O5tHOWW4d06tbKB_FyjrXSog_j5FJXZy2Y3aGXbvCBz9Qdk9r0dnuP1yu8ztdhBDme2Gk6fj-0tj0rcFTD3Ea6_2thNwUEyDtKXgEVlAbD_pDh4ksxTwSXTAELwRMAmkGuXbWAEpAZK7AZ-AVRby16IW0plRue9dP3-SRjnWcbBpvVnquxT5dxNKX9QKP5gTv5FYy2q-bWANZk%3D&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64cfe1af0b4c880a0b059e6f&l=en-US&s=Sv5eTwoFfsyMpD2KosdbUWOTKig%3D)

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: 58 years since the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
In 2022 alone, eight states enacted 11 laws restricting voting rights.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67765566/420781428/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBiYTVhZWQtZjYzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b9R7J8c9LpnoqSms4CkZLizE-bKT01x8-wTSblGL8yU=) Team –

**It’s been 58 years since the Voting Rights Act of 1965 was signed into law by President Lyndon B. Johnson, protecting voting rights for millions of Americans.**

However, in recent years, we’ve seen the slow-motion erosion of democracy and freedoms – including our right to vote. In 2013 we witnessed the Supreme Court dismantle critical provisions of the Voting Rights Act, paving the way for partisan gerrymandering.

**Shockingly, in 2022 alone, eight states enacted 11 laws restricting voting rights.[Today, I'm asking for your help to stand up and fight back to protect our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67765567/420781429/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.08_b1_gs_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBiYTVhZWQtZjYzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b9R7J8c9LpnoqSms4CkZLizE-bKT01x8-wTSblGL8yU=)**

My parents grew up under communism. Democracy has always been real to me. And I know every generation must defend it – and expand it. That’s what brought me to work as a White House aide, sign up to serve in the military after 9/11, and actually start a magazine called “Democracy.”

Recent years have borne witness to an upsurge of anti-voter measures across states, some even going so far as to criminalize providing water to people waiting in line to cast their ballots. **Let me be clear: These statutes are designed to create obstacles for voters and to curtail their voices in our democratic process.

[I need your help to fight back. Your contribution will help fuel our campaign and allow us to promote the ideals that are crucial to our democracy. clean_body: In 2022 alone, eight states enacted 11 laws restricting voting rights. = Team – It’s been 58 years since the Voting Rights Act of 1965 was signed into law by President Lyndon B. Johnson, protecting voting rights for millions of Americans. However, in recent years, we’ve seen the slow-motion erosion of democracy and freedoms – including our right to vote. In 2013 we witnessed the Supreme Court dismantle critical provisions of the Voting Rights Act, paving the way for partisan gerrymandering. Shockingly, in 2022 alone, eight states enacted 11 laws restricting voting rights.= My parents grew up under communism. Democracy has always been real to me. And I know every generation must defend it – and expand it. That’s what brought me to work as a White House aide, sign up to serve in the military after 9/11, and actually start a magazine called “Democracy.” Recent years have borne witness to an upsurge of anti-voter measures across states, some even going so far as to criminalize providing water to people waiting in line to cast their ballots. Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

[Privacy Policy](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=10bde0d27561420b873db237f7c65250&_e=a2VDn_kvXM3XKsEcv8rub0a9Q8o05Qks4y1v2WaHTg59ObBzPgJQOcKIK9Ti3_azRKcpl2Oqa2LYUHN2lQxn4w8_As375f-Fb1LkycwV0D6HNfwoKNkcQY2C2rWTISftcJu8rVr4wUqagRoIVqf2tXR3hNEB3MYvFlJkuf6VR1sPDTILv6b4dQ5NIQflPDR7orD-AnOqqnP_YX2idkyGriv1UzefDeaqNbvUiMqreTE%3D)
clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
We’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum

---
| Peter,

We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → **✅ President Joe Biden
✅ Senator Chris Murphy
✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar
✅ Senator Raphael Warnock
✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth!** This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter.

_But listen, we’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum and crush any gun violence prevention legislation brought to the floor._

That’s why we’re working to do everything in our power to ensure a gun violence prevention majority in the House and Senate in 2024.

clean_body: We’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum | Peter, We’re so excited! Every top Democrat is rallying around gun violence prevention legislation and passing an assault weapons ban → ✅ President Joe Biden ✅ Senator Chris Murphy ✅ Senator Amy Klobuchar ✅ Senator Raphael Warnock ✅ Congresswoman Lucy McBeth! This is GREAT news! This is the support we need to pass gun safety legislation, Peter. But listen, we’re up against MAGA Republicans who will do anything to stop our momentum and crush any gun violence prevention legislation brought to the floor. That’s why we’re working to do everything in our power to ensure a gun violence prevention majority in the House and Senate in 2024. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government, but the NRA is already building a massive war chest ahead of the 2024 elections, so we need your help. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Stop Gun Violence PAC * | | = PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

What it will take
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JNhKC2UGhdStp5wBMd6W4VT2rI5rDzERPw_W2bVw1LiUtdpnII-1Dus_tDSp-xRYB-iZPZoImf9dOgTsARxwTDXONNVx9RDCeEmY3TIvGMpfC5C_Dnbh7J8oSE2nhPB5jVPxZx_Kb333f1Qy7_4lTg==&c=feTPOVFAiUOOnHEkWILJiOJLxmRmwPx6AqxqKO2Im-xMu-OmhZdrRw==&ch=XdUUpsFB_c0_1nr3XnsN22WuvSOdM9ndrdhQdCp7kucAhFq-fSN59A==)

| Peter,
---
Our great nation is at a crossroads, and it is VITAL to back leaders who are truly committed to putting America and her people FIRST.
Donald J. Trump has done that, despite every imaginable attack that has come against him, even to this day.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JNhKC2UGhdStp5wBMd6W4VT2rI5rDzERPw_W2bVw1LiUtdpnII-1Doa25_EIzMGChk6JGwrP-50Ek5esdt1WOvCUh_u6qXK6oap9YCKJzfY5cuXqWMBrJnjwvzXpfezG9zejj9vGVCHaFjpk98euU3vhzdggsEfJfP5HnD9nk_mQceeL4DKOgrCTfllYDu_2NYog0ushOH4kjSlgONNiRaDGkTAyH3mKDgHMEFQANHM=&c=feTPOVFAiUOOnHEkWILJiOJLxmRmwPx6AqxqKO2Im-xMu-OmhZdrRw==&ch=XdUUpsFB_c0_1nr3XnsN22WuvSOdM9ndrdhQdCp7kucAhFq-fSN59A==)

I respect my primary opponent's service and sacrifice to our nation in the military. Yet when he claims that he is not a career politician, the stakes are too high to overlook the fact that he has run for office multiple times while gaining the backing of proven DC establishment kingpins like Lindsey Graham who is an advocate for Trump only when it's politically advantageous.
My loyal support for President Trump and the America First agenda has been tested! Even though I've been vilified and defamed, I continue to speak boldly of the most heroic President our nation has known in modern times. That's because Trump's agenda is transparent and has no hidden motives: he truly wants to make America great for her people!
I would urge you to take my primary opponent's bid into consideration if he had the proven history and boldness of backing the MAGA movement. Given that's not the case, I strongly encourage the consideration of our nation's future, as it depends upon America First leaders who have stayed true to the cause.
Peter, [I am counting on you, my most dedicated supporters, to help us secure victory in this pivotal election. Your continued contributions and unwavering support are CRUCIAL in our fight to revive the America First agenda.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JNhKC2UGhdStp5wBMd6W4VT2rI5rDzERPw_W2bVw1LiUtdpnII-1Doa25_EIzMGChk6JGwrP-50Ek5esdt1WOvCUh_u6qXK6oap9YCKJzfY5cuXqWMBrJnjwvzXpfezG9zejj9vGVCHaFjpk98euU3vhzdggsEfJfP5HnD9nk_mQceeL4DKOgrCTfllYDu_2NYog0ushOH4kjSlgONNiRaDGkTAyH3mKDgHMEFQANHM=&c=feTPOVFAiUOOnHEkWILJiOJLxmRmwPx6AqxqKO2Im-xMu-OmhZdrRw==&ch=XdUUpsFB_c0_1nr3XnsN22WuvSOdM9ndrdhQdCp7kucAhFq-fSN59A==)

name: Rick Scott
subject: I'll be watching - will you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Friend, **I am looking forward to watching the first Republican Presidential Debate.**

I’m excited to see what the candidates have to say, and I’m looking forward to seeing fellow conservatives on stage giving their ideas for how to move our country forward.

**Now, I want to know what YOU’RE hoping to see during the debate.**

[**Will you take our pre-debate survey now and let us know what issues YOU want to see the 2024 candidates discuss?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=9de24f23063641979e36de940b6a8730&_e=7sfLxSXsWez34y_7Qjz5O08Z3u1cY5D544a_NjVVLIf7CmFzdsuNYFlud8Mqvt_uYhEjBhCqWfHKkMdKdcKRci6A2FCgY5olsE7ahB54vURbfb4VzWLrk0OM_5j_GbcxYIroT-Jv781Dgj_-xURF3L6Je_3qAP2NO2G81_QLSXy_e0TVf-jFg56zHVRYZSkjdNTgoOjJQaV3APhkfkG3AZog_cpeI2hUhcIa8spDna2wSjaeamutf4m1SGmqLmGARr1X9KtLUERyKYRMHkVE-ZPQ3ECY6rUcHnzQ3r--C6N35nxyeUv1uunBSaGUuD2g9K6kAJFf9NXIi1ZscBM7huwTYR_vjEHSKms8mICNO2KCUHfhPKYHvcz96ZheER0hosIDTRTYObAcfoHhAC8P_q_UQnSmEnIU8I9CQTPB9kc%3D)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd376f9bfa6e4e18883d30ef1480b479&_e=TVXbXxBxz16QKXcZETpKZfwQv_w4ybILBVKtOjtvfAGPEr2whzVeKOnbvnvK8_rIv14pI9p88VBCFjqCuz_Xftr1wVue5k3nWSfwx0sgz5TDkECW7_3c5FPBMwcpFao3iUS7xIwfbqqFvTuDuNr6V5KjJDh-K7AzLausl9oR3vTECfdrk-mmEm_-WpKPMCvG3Cqgi2vtmhGdj16su3PRzf_BpcEaof8eWZ0qrxBF6FpJZ_kO4cU7wMoDM8750iVns6vuTGkrOGeKGFZEeJYKWH4aBmQSfPRNPdksUvSr3brQwgEtsbQpniZE9LDCvMkB5S93FyO-1NKgC30P0OuldHHB7q3lF3iQWWxw_VS3z-fPBWrMaXjLHCzq5X8RWcMAA2SQ30j7sCVIt9rjYT75IKkxkoaG0pF1LOOpQo3zjKw%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd376f9bfa6e4e18883d30ef1480b479&_e=TVXbXxBxz16QKXcZETpKZfwQv_w4ybILBVKtOjtvfAGPEr2whzVeKOnbvnvK8_rIv14pI9p88VBCFjqCuz_Xftr1wVue5k3nWSfwx0sgz5TDkECW7_3c5FPBMwcpFao3iUS7xIwfbqqFvTuDuNr6V5KjJDh-K7AzLausl9oR3vTECfdrk-mmEm_-WpKPMCvG3Cqgi2vtmhGdj16su3PRzf_BpcEaof8eWZ0qrxBF6FpJZ_kO4cU7wMoDM8750iVns6vuTGkrOGeKGFZEeJYKWMWFJXH09bIWCc2paLkPoTQf7ATla9OXDf4twg4To2ufEUIFZ5btFEZ98fE67x6xkdqEcvFJj21qMmOQtX85IeqVqTM6gPjt7Elsepwerky76UfqHIt3t4KgM6GnoxjYQ2KAB9qeAHrzltGqJsTywrg%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd376f9bfa6e4e18883d30ef1480b479&_e=TVXbXxBxz16QKXcZETpKZfwQv_w4ybILBVKtOjtvfAGPEr2whzVeKOnbvnvK8_rIv14pI9p88VBCFjqCuz_Xftr1wVue5k3nWSfwx0sgz5TDkECW7_3c5FPBMwcpFao3iUS7xIwfbqqFvTuDuNr6V5KjJDh-K7AzLausl9oR3vTECfdrk-mmEm_-WpKPMCvG3Cqgi2vtmhGdj16su3PRzf_BpcEaof8eWZ0qrxBF6FpJZ_kO4cU7wMoDM8750iVns6vuTGkrOGeKGFZEeJYKWN2LRD8R3eAyji_lyDAkQys0Rq3jD9wJzlD5Sg5k0r6rrh17ceqD5ymyIZSojWZcQLhVkWraZY-TkZ1HQJIiRtEqNfE7WpAw4WtNqU7KcH551RHGmCWoJMC1jgYdDkWxCzppHEVkmVcdoXmyNHbHaDk%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd376f9bfa6e4e18883d30ef1480b479&_e=TVXbXxBxz16QKXcZETpKZfwQv_w4ybILBVKtOjtvfAGPEr2whzVeKOnbvnvK8_rIv14pI9p88VBCFjqCuz_Xftr1wVue5k3nWSfwx0sgz5TDkECW7_3c5FPBMwcpFao3iUS7xIwfbqqFvTuDuNr6V5KjJDh-K7AzLausl9oR3vTECfdrk-mmEm_-WpKPMCvG3Cqgi2vtmhGdj16su3PRzf_BpcEaof8eWZ0qrxBF6FpJZ_kO4cU7wMoDM8750iVns6vuTGkrOGeKGFZEeJYKWCG3tOXE4-Epfkx69lRxSGW6Gxk_EDFFEAzNt7ZnpOcqGp1E0zRLLpgPeq6OQ5zLDYjtLms8rzZJYeWgBBvISUx0fevsufe5ODd1oiqkwwCvhUSj8f449hzdSuAVGExbOYdr1oza4WJQlenPown8XLU%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Our schools are under attack
body:
Peter, The New Jersey Board of Education has GONE TOO FAR. They just made the decision to disregard biology and eliminate fu
|
---
| Peter, **The New Jersey Board of Education has _GONE TOO FAR._**
They just made the decision to disregard biology and eliminate fundamental gender-based terms like "male and female". Instead, schools will now refer to students with misguided gender-neutral terms like "persons". "Equality"? Now it's "equity". Sexual education classes? Based on gender identity, not biological sex. We can't stand idly by. _Our children deserve better._
---
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link002.com/v2/click/2d8a0bc48c67d8339b23c4c2afc74fa6/eJyNkMEOgjAMht-lZxQY6oEbMYQQ1IPRs1mgyhTGMoqohHd3qNGLJl7_fv2avx0QSi4pzsCHC90Y88ACjalQAiXNK0k8fUzZdOJ6rgWFkKdIV40Cv_u6_AaG2PWYYwFdFRpksw7mSbyKdot4lRhScW1u_OdxZh9PuAziBfT9TzGWgsKzcdfgk25waJQJ04q2ujB8TqRq37bbth0fKyEpx7045MQc5o3TqrSHcIQlF4WxcaVQZq9XJHh9Ovs7F6hm5A==)
---

---
| | [CLICK HERE TO JOIN THE COMMON SENSE CLUB](https://xtz223.keap-link002.com/v2/click/4e4011cb98e67003a3eb6d99c2b4a584/eJyNkMEOgjAMht-lZxQYymE3QwghqAejZ7NAlSmMZVZRCe_uUONJE69_v_9r2g4IlVCUFsDhSnfGAnDAYC61REVRo0jkzymbTvzAd6CS6piY5qyBd1_LH2CIbSV0gG4aLbJezaIsXSbbebrMLKmFsTv-83ih9_HEi1k6h77_KcZaUnyx7hNwMmccLiqkvYo2prJ8SaRP3HXbth0fGqmoxJ3cl8Q8FozzpnaHcIS1kJW1Ca1RFe9XZHh7OfsHG99m6Q==)

| Our children’s education is more than an experiment. It's their future. Their safety? It's now in question. Imagine our girls, subjected to shared classes with males based on 'gender identity' – not biological fact. It's discrimination.
Bad decisions come at a cost, and our kids are the ones who pay the price. **This is about more than just terminology — it's about our children's well-being, our parental rights, and the integrity of our education system.** [**Join us in the fight**](https://xtz223.keap-link002.com/v2/click/c15b510774723c2db15fd0e10fa72871/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnM2PtSK8iYiI1iHqHItOuaXrsk3ZB_731opOBV3fed5nmLkDoeSS0hICuNCNMR8s0FgIJVBS1ErixXPKJmPP9yyohTwkuj0pCO5fyx9giE1lZgFdFRpktQyjLF0kmzxdZIZUXJsd_3ncqfvxxPMwzaHvf4qxERSfjfsIAekTDheVwlxFa10bviJSx8Bxuq6z962QVOFW7CpiLvPtom2cIRxhw0VtbFwplOX7FRleX87-AR2PZus=) **to restore common sense to schools, New Jersey, and beyond.** Stay strong, Bill
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea

We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals. We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses. We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all. I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections. If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in! Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America. Thank you,Bill Spadea | | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

On this day in 1786, Congress passed a resolution establishing the basis of the country’s monetary system and just how the new “dollar” would be divided up. **That dollar would become the world’s most dominant currency.** But it’s been weakened by President Joe Biden's reckless inflationary policies, and Hoosiers and all Americans are paying the price. That's why it's so important that we defeat President Biden and the Biden-backed Democrats in 2024 to get our country on the road to fiscal sanity. That begins with keeping Indiana dark red, but we need your support to make it happen. **In honor of National Dollar Day, will you please chip in just $1?**

body:
Hey—

I’ll keep this quick.

I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And
I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month
fundraising deadline in ONE week.

National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on
their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19016?t=1001&akid=3476%2E346206%2EqQdDZf ]That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $25 between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the
number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money
we raise. Can you chip in today?

CHIP IN →

Thanks for everything you do.

—Jon Tester

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d39da864f2e4f2abc8d29a8462b8957&_e=jUdHRLMmfVOlzi68EF3mYS--9hjLgjZmBRn351YazT7SPSnASx-CBiqx2gjDK-NbdmJ2cS0vRvm_XPCTVBmR6LlihOxh68D7xRUx2yGj8CnBKUwSPE297vva2B4VX0InQbuTqOoOMqExfqENIUXFUY5YdLiZyI4Pcn0XEt5GMeT1b-GvpXkFarnXs5Wy09eT37rsG4HYqws8ujS7qxk9jB4uYHZGkA7s02Sm03MhuhDrwR5UixQP2VzyMPF-hu_su4dIPr84qrsL-bbs6W17Ww-U6yVyKjM4G7L-hVSabWBWB19BS8IW3Z16VHco0UBLhZuWkjfFPGtwomy77KZpi3ur4WQolE-2gLbwQK4EIkv6QamH71OgED6qHIhzNQbEgXdh6j6GavHJl59_oMoXbw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d39da864f2e4f2abc8d29a8462b8957&_e=jUdHRLMmfVOlzi68EF3mYS--9hjLgjZmBRn351YazT7SPSnASx-CBiqx2gjDK-NbdmJ2cS0vRvm_XPCTVBmR6LlihOxh68D7xRUx2yGj8CnBKUwSPE297vva2B4VX0InQbuTqOoOMqExfqENIUXFUY5YdLiZyI4Pcn0XEt5GMeT1b-GvpXkFarnXs5Wy09eT37rsG4HYqws8ujS7qxk9jB4uYHZGkA7s02Sm03MhuhDrwR5UixQP2VzyMPF-hu_sG_QniKtbpjwbcr0zc60ReaJwJQNHY82RGdp83gIpodGTHrvCWan_qnyOucQvBtDUKxJ5b4hhC7VaMdYLo0v5jcx3KUrUC66IUZARvPDcutPD8RgC-kbyfbXOtM_QR2d5I-orG6WT_YRlKv0Iahd07Q%3D%3D)**

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. [** SUPPORT THE _RIGHT_ CANDIDATE **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=8c0d24b84bde4abe99eb697669108419&_e=mvLHPnIYB3jK7RHKSEC0B4yQHh9RMV8s2YFlZP8rATGIYZrUANCQWCTZk9xyg7SA2PiO-qOYMk63g5uG2i25dFP1pqXOgaNVtgekIlDWq4ajDZSo2zn-7tu-7sjk5DuELYzTmpmNoo5OdeXQnxoEVJBcnGRuZoJIkRqoh7N0Wirj33aYANPFuqmF2Dyhk1RvhjhDA21GGHOkRxuEoWskA5b2yzMPildmUbuth21lhGGKJPywHoYoohJxngzNGvNc7EeQbnEExQbx677qAb0fsJxTuT2_3iq7x4aepWtii-yQAip4_W5BEvBDUbuCblOVmldiodEljbDgI7z12rdMjiwM4sbPldVVsFro5vrQwF7bFmcXMDDn8DB7c1yxT1Ll)

**Here’s the drawn-out version if you have a bit more time:**
My team and I have been going through the numbers line by line, and we keep coming up short. My Democratic opponent has millions stored up to take me down. _Not to mention, my anti-Semitic Republican opponent just announced a massive fundraising haul._

[**We’ve got our work cut out for us, and the next number we put out needs to blow things out of the water.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=8c0d24b84bde4abe99eb697669108419&_e=mvLHPnIYB3jK7RHKSEC0B4yQHh9RMV8s2YFlZP8rATGIYZrUANCQWCTZk9xyg7SA2PiO-qOYMk63g5uG2i25dFP1pqXOgaNVtgekIlDWq4ajDZSo2zn-7tu-7sjk5DuELYzTmpmNoo5OdeXQnxoEVJBcnGRuZoJIkRqoh7N0Wirj33aYANPFuqmF2Dyhk1RvhjhDA21GGHOkRxuEoWskA-upF5geZ49_8gjKXD8atYsebCzegRVeh_Sv5Aevt77vuv3ixyTGYBaO6xilOlKqbO1EVCfKaLrGZEyYzhxZIAdli5VgtGDbXFFlfVaAT5MFxT2bleSNt6URq1Xzd3-iHAuERLPK8qtYYrILMYGQIIV2XbtTJIuMuPynJKudAqXO)

I know you’re aware of how bad things are right now, but we are running out of chances to fix our country _before it’s unrecognizable._

**We are in desperate need of someone who will unite us,_not divide us,_ and I am the only candidate who can do that. **

[**DONATE TO MARK WALKER FOR GOVERNOR**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=8c0d24b84bde4abe99eb697669108419&_e=mvLHPnIYB3jK7RHKSEC0B4yQHh9RMV8s2YFlZP8rATGIYZrUANCQWCTZk9xyg7SA2PiO-qOYMk63g5uG2i25dFP1pqXOgaNVtgekIlDWq4ajDZSo2zn-7tu-7sjk5DuELYzTmpmNoo5OdeXQnxoEVJBcnGRuZoJIkRqoh7N0Wirj33aYANPFuqmF2Dyhk1RvhjhDA21GGHOkRxuEoWskA7fovbX-_bYPSWNOyxqKNlGYWSIEWIIs9-Jxc8BSDAgXQci2OyAWvBurRcSYzeF5AZeg3Sr1FwDxLuYV0Yx0QOj6EXRCkpZfXWGHOYIy10gesb8rhQH8Hte5LB0IbEAvNw_noD1n7FN2PNsFGR7U2-egS3MKKsbGEZ5mLep9qjdP)

With a race as competitive as the North Carolina governor’s race, **we can’t leave anything up to chance.** [**Now you see why I had to reach out today and ask for your urgent donation to my campaign.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=8c0d24b84bde4abe99eb697669108419&_e=mvLHPnIYB3jK7RHKSEC0B4yQHh9RMV8s2YFlZP8rATGIYZrUANCQWCTZk9xyg7SA2PiO-qOYMk63g5uG2i25dFP1pqXOgaNVtgekIlDWq4ajDZSo2zn-7tu-7sjk5DuELYzTmpmNoo5OdeXQnxoEVJBcnGRuZoJIkRqoh7N0Wirj33aYANPFuqmF2Dyhk1RvhjhDA21GGHOkRxuEoWskAy_LZw9UTc97srbc57UFG3eFN8Uw735z8vKLnh2qpNWdOSWG9t9JLfILEhRb33NKR3roWZM7V9PQJyO8Yn5ko5IFl_DNxC45j6BvZAjCfR0JNqSDn9sSPL0zfis0CIhy77YXOUxGozoqWNY6e7Vivrb9jbP40xQq_15xc7-A7kIR)

Peter we may have been outraised last quarter, but we _cannot_ let it happen again. [**Please, rush in a donation to help me stay in this race.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=8c0d24b84bde4abe99eb697669108419&_e=mvLHPnIYB3jK7RHKSEC0B4yQHh9RMV8s2YFlZP8rATGIYZrUANCQWCTZk9xyg7SA2PiO-qOYMk63g5uG2i25dFP1pqXOgaNVtgekIlDWq4ajDZSo2zn-7tu-7sjk5DuELYzTmpmNoo5OdeXQnxoEVJBcnGRuZoJIkRqoh7N0Wirj33aYANPFuqmF2Dyhk1RvhjhDA21GGHOkRxuEoWskA9Etch9QWh7OqPMDZ7lTOYh_TE7JoaHCEG9W6iyahfC4s1T0IdsyPyhK0sevDmrEyQxWiBqjnX4taXN7zvMNhdcui9AMF-KO1M-CJtZOtc7xFd_ot94mqhJw09QjKsEUGHBtERQq3HGLhcfq_UG7Zyqw76WnCTLcxPt6WZvhIauq)

I hope I can count on you.

God bless,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *
