clean_body: Peter, it’s Mark Walker (the only Republican running for Governor who has what it takes to flip North Carolina from blue to red). I need a quick moment. I don’t want to waste your time, so I’m going to give you the short of it: my biggest deadline yet is just around the corner, and I need to know if I can count on you. | | Peter, it’s Mark Walker (the only Republican running for Governor who has what it takes to flip North Carolina from blue to red). I don’t want to waste your time, so I’m going to give you the short of it: my biggest deadline yet is just around the corner, and Here’s the drawn-out version if you have a bit more time: My team and I have been going through the numbers line by line, and we keep coming up short. My Democratic opponent has millions stored up to take me down. Not to mention, my anti-Semitic Republican opponent just announced a massive fundraising haul. I know you’re aware of how bad things are right now, but we are running out of chances to fix our country before it’s unrecognizable. We are in desperate need of someone who will unite us,not divide us, and I am the only candidate who can do that. With a race as competitive as the North Carolina governor’s race, we can’t leave anything up to chance. Peter we may have been outraised last quarter, but we cannot let it happen again. I hope I can count on you. God bless, Mark Walker | Meet Mark Walker Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
If you want Safe Communities, send a Veteran to Congress |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

This week’s campaign theme is Safe Communities.

I enjoyed visiting multiple National Night Out celebrations in the Lehigh Valley last Tuesday to honor the uniformed public safety officers who work so hard to keep us safe. We all should be very grateful to the police, firefighters, EMS personnel, and other first responders who protect and serve our communities.

I took a break from campaigning last week to spend three days in uniform fulfilling my duties in the Air National Guard. I’ve been serving for 28 years, and I am proud to have earned the title of “veteran.”

Maintaining an effective national defense is the first responsibility of Congress. Half of all discretionary spending is allocated to military defense, and the threats against our nation increase every day. Yet only 18 percent of U.S. Representatives in Washington are military veterans. That’s just a tick above the historic low reached last year ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=95bf087722&e=1090c5c412)). It’s no wonder we have problems with our military readiness.

I’ve served in the Army and Air Force as an infantry soldier, intelligence officer, and military commander. I’m a graduate of Air War College and Air Command and Staff College with a master’s degree in military operations. I deployed four times overseas for the Global War on Terrorism and supported multiple domestic operations to protect the citizens of Pennsylvania.

I’m not asking you to vote for me because I’m a veteran. I’m asking you to vote for me because I have extensive experience in national defense and know how to defend our country. When I put on the uniform, it’s my job to deter our nation’s adversaries and win our nation’s wars. It's my job to keep you safe.

Let me do the same for you in Congress. I'll be a national leader in military readiness, serving my country in a new and different way. I'll apply my 28 years of military experience to ensure Safe Communities across the Lehigh Valley.

**Keep America Free!**

---
|
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=907a72384c&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---

---

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b238458379&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!

---

* **Carbon County Fair** | Wed. Aug. 9, 6-8 PM 3285 Little Gap Rd, Palmerton, PA 18071
* [**Slate Belt Meet and Greet**](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=29e9ef7f09&e=1090c5c412) | Thur., Aug. 10, 6:30-8:30 p.m. | Washington Township Pavilion | 970 Washington Blvd, Bangor, PA
* **Musikfest** | Various times during the weekend | Bethlehem, PA

Please check the campaign [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=43202c2a3a&e=1090c5c412) for the up-to-date schedule.

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=62950deade&e=1090c5c412)

| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13603%2E53494%2E5eH88I)

| | Friend, **What if I told you that there are nearly 2,000 gigawatts of wind, solar, and storage just waiting to be built?** That's enough to power the entire country on reliable, affordable clean energy. The reason for the stall? Slow-moving utilities and lack of transmission lines. **Fortunately, as of last month, this is about to change—****thanks, in part, to Evergreen advocates like you.** Thousands of Evergreen action-takers submitted comments to the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC)—the agency responsible for regulating transmission and power markets—calling for sped-up interconnection deadlines and penalties for utilities that fail to meet them. **And FERC listened.** Their new interconnection rule will do just that, meaning more clean energy on the grid, faster. If we want to fully decarbonize our grid and get to 100 percent clean power by 2035, the U.S. needs to triple its transmission infrastructure. **So while there's certainly more work to fully power our grid with clean energy, thanks to your action, we're on our way. ** We FERC'ing did it! 🎉 Charles HarperSenior Policy Lead, Power Sector Evergreen Collaborative
---
|
---
**P.S.** [Learn more about FERC and its role in our transition to 100 percent clean energy here.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4719?t=3&akid=13603%2E53494%2E5eH88I)
---

name: United We Dream via Blue Amp Action
subject: Demand Governor Greg Abbott be held accountable and impeached!
body:
Send a message to Greg Abbott
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb722e02-f01e-485d-8caf-c90ad8104924/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, [**Tell Governor Greg Abbott: Don’t mess with Texans!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e4819fe-f342-413e-923e-0665702f088e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In his nine years as Governor of Texas, Greg Abbott has continuously failed our communities by putting his political stunts and thirst for power above the well-being of our people. Just this month, horrific details were revealed about his inhumane treatment of migrants at the border. He ordered Texas troopers to deny water to migrants and push children back into the Rio Grande River. Human beings should be treated with dignity and respect, but as long as Greg Abbott continues to be in power, this complete disregard to human rights will continue. We cannot allow Abbott to continue targeting our communities and putting his self-interests above the dignity of Texans. Texas leaders need to hold Governor Greg Abbott accountable for his cruel and inhumane actions and initiate impeachment NOW. Otherwise, Abbott will continue using his political power to cause division in our state and inflict hate and violence upon immigrants and communities of color. [ADD YOUR NAME and demand Governor Greg Abbott be held accountable and impeached! Let’s give Gov Abbott the boot!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taea73e47-7733-4ce3-afff-dc1abbc2ff0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T785324fa-80fd-4e87-8c38-62ac30268e22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Friend,
Each month, we set a budget based on the resources we need to have Keith’s back as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect as Attorney General.

We need to raise $10,000 online this month to keep the lights on. Over the past week, donations have slowed down significantly, so we’re asking everyone who hasn’t chipped in yet this year to help.

People want “seasoned leadership” with the experience to hit the ground running and deliver for Rhode Islanders on day one – they know that Gabe has what it takes to do just that. We need your help to keep getting our message out – to keep our TV ad on the air and to continue building momentum with our organizing program. Gabe does not have the resources to self-fund his campaign, and he doesn’t have exceptionally wealthy family members, either. But, we’ve got people like you – supporters who believe in Gabe’s vision for Rhode Island. | Peter,

When the winter storm hit Texas in 2021, we saw neighbors helping neighbors, doing what they could to lend a helping hand to a fellow Texan in need.

**But Ted Cruz abandoned us and fled to Cancún.**

**Roland got in his truck and delivered water to a nursing home in desperate need.** Ted Cruz has only ever served himself. Roland is running for U.S. Senate to serve his fellow Texans – like he’s always done.

**Peter – TODAY is Special Election Day in Ohio.**

Our neighbors in Ohio are voting today on Issue 1, a ballot measure proposed by the Ohio GOP that would raise the threshold to pass ballot initiatives from a simple majority to 60%. **And why did they propose this?** Because abortion is on the ballot in November and polls show that it has over 50% support. When Republicans see they can’t win, they change the rules.

**Here’s what we can do to help today:**

1\. Call everyone you know in Ohio & remind them to vote on Tuesday, August 8. [**Click here to sign up to phone bank.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67771523/420803899/-1910491584?end_date=2023-08-09T03%3A59%3A59.999Z&is_virtual=true&q=Ohio%20issue%201%20&start_date=2023-08-07T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230808_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJkOTNiYWYtMDEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uff6ohBJIp5vgdfwVQVc8d6wSg9nZJLwj7X6-1GGp6Q=&emci=20c4309e-0136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2bd93baf-0136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)

2\. Make a donation to the Ohio Democratic party to help power them to victory in these final days! [**Click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67771524/420803900/-2100523189?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230808_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJkOTNiYWYtMDEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uff6ohBJIp5vgdfwVQVc8d6wSg9nZJLwj7X6-1GGp6Q=)

3\. Forward this email to everyone you know in Ohio or just everyone you know who may know someone in Ohio who can get out and vote. [**Click here for more information on voting in tomorrow's election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67771525/420803901/1498719018?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230808_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJkOTNiYWYtMDEzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uff6ohBJIp5vgdfwVQVc8d6wSg9nZJLwj7X6-1GGp6Q=&emci=20c4309e-0136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2bd93baf-0136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)

Ohio is currently up against a proposed six-week abortion ban. That’s right – six weeks – before many people even know they’re pregnant. This law is currently on hold due to a court challenge, but Republicans in Ohio are doing everything in their power to ensure they can restrict abortion access across the state.

Peter, Republicans know they can’t win, so they want us to believe that 41 > 59\. That's why they rushed this amendment to the ballot to make it harder for people-led issues like abortion access to pass. And if they succeed today, who knows what they will try next? While Republicans go against the will of the people, we need to help fight and make sure everyone’s voices can be heard – **which means helping ensure Issue 1 doesn’t pass in Ohio.**

Thanks for being on our team,

Team Liz

clean_body: Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Peter – TODAY is Special Election Day in Ohio. Our neighbors in Ohio are voting today on Issue 1, a ballot measure proposed by the Ohio GOP that would raise the threshold to pass ballot initiatives from a simple majority to 60%. And why did they propose this? Because abortion is on the ballot in November and polls show that it has over 50% support. When Republicans see they can’t win, they change the rules. Here’s what we can do to help today: 1\. Call everyone you know in Ohio & remind them to vote on Tuesday, August 8. 2\. Make a donation to the Ohio Democratic party to help power them to victory in these final days! = 3\. Forward this email to everyone you know in Ohio or just everyone you know who may know someone in Ohio who can get out and vote. Ohio is currently up against a proposed six-week abortion ban. That’s right – six weeks – before many people even know they’re pregnant. This law is currently on hold due to a court challenge, but Republicans in Ohio are doing everything in their power to ensure they can restrict abortion access across the state. Peter, Republicans know they can’t win, so they want us to believe that 41 > 59\. That's why they rushed this amendment to the ballot to make it harder for people-led issues like abortion access to pass. And if they succeed today, who knows what they will try next? While Republicans go against the will of the people, we need to help fight and make sure everyone’s voices can be heard – which means helping ensure Issue 1 doesn’t pass in Ohio. Thanks for being on our team, Team Liz = | Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom with a lifelong commitment to public service. Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights.** PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY PO BOX 733 GOLDENS BRIDGE, NY 10526 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Cooking isn’t as fun as whiteboarding witnesses, but I do love seeing happy kids when I make their favorite meal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)
Derek,
As a single mom with three kids and a budget, I cook from scratch a lot. And while cooking meals is honestly not nearly as fun as whiteboarding witnesses, I do love seeing happy children when they come to the dinner table. I have a big bell, with a wooden ringer, that I clang to summon the kids downstairs. I know they heard it because I hear the thundering down the hallway.
But when I’m in Washington, I cannot cook dinner, and in my first year in Congress there was a lot of complaining—even about pizza! **My kids want their mom’s cooking, and they want it nearly every night, regardless of where the demands of my job require me to be.**
The solution is aggressive meal planning. On the days I fly to D.C. for votes and hearings, I get up at 5:30 a.m. I quickly get ready for the plane and then prepare a dinner for the kids to enjoy that night. It’s always a slow cooker recipe or something that can sit in the fridge until the kids cook it. Favorites include pot roast, my grandma Doris’s meatballs, baked potato bar, chili, and a pepperoncini beef. [**(Contribute any amount through this email and my recipes will be included in your emailed ActBlue receipt!).**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808?refcode=EMAK08_1_REC_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27849_3422442_Y-sn8N&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808?refcode=EMAK08_1_REC_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27849_3422442_Y-sn8N&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)
As you see from this meal plan, I have learned to be specific. **Just like with government witnesses, I sometimes have to spell out how to do the job, even if it seems obvious.** “Take out bay leaves” comes from a past experience, where my kids were calling me while I was in Washington because they thought a tree leaf somehow got in their soup. And “wash the crockpot”—you guessed it, I’ve come home to it supposedly still soaking, three days later.
I know there are millions of other busy Americans juggling many responsibilities. If you’d like some of my favorite recipes, [**contribute any amount through this email and my recipes will be included in your emailed ActBlue receipt.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808?refcode=EMAK08_1_REC_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27849_3422442_Y-sn8N&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230808?refcode=EMAK08_1_REC_20230808_V1_F&refcode2=27849_3422442_Y-sn8N&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)
Happy meal-prepping!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK08_1_REC_20230808_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27849_3422442_Y-sn8N&akid=27849%2E3422442%2EY-sn8N)**

subject: Hi Peter, I’d love to get your eyes on this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
In the face of far-right extremism, I actively want to understand and advocate for what you care about most.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67772224/420806753/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.08_b1_yc_30do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjY3MTcxMi0wNDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvsrnPrTUFGJb8GWWuEemIQm0hgUm-9iqNl2nQZ7S5M=)
A few weeks ago, I asked my top supporters to let me know what they prioritized most heading into the 2024 election. _Here are some of the answers that stood out to me the most:_
**Debbie H. said** _“Restoring integrity to Congress, holding the Republicans accountable!”_
**Maria N. said** _“End Gerrymandering & Citizens United”_
**Lydia G. said** _“Please protect women’s right to choose”_
**Leonard L. said** _“Voting rights are the key to achieving everything else”_
My team and I put out surveys just like last month’s Priorities Survey because **grassroots Democrats like you are truly the heart of our operation**. Our progressive priorities - issues just like these - are on the line in this political moment.

But the truth of the matter is I’m up against a tough battle ahead. Rather than listening to the people, national Republican groups are beholden to corporate interests willing to spend millions to defeat me.

**[So please, will you help me continue my work in Congress advocating for working-class families and pitch in whatever you can afford at this time? clean_body: In the face of far-right extremism, I actively want to understand and advocate for what you care about most. | = A few weeks ago, I asked my top supporters to let me know what they prioritized most heading into the 2024 election. Here are some of the answers that stood out to me the most: Debbie H. said “Restoring integrity to Congress, holding the Republicans accountable!” Maria N. said “End Gerrymandering & Citizens United” Lydia G. said “Please protect women’s right to choose” Leonard L. said “Voting rights are the key to achieving everything else” My team and I put out surveys just like last month’s Priorities Survey because grassroots Democrats like you are truly the heart of our operation. Our progressive priorities - issues just like these - are on the line in this political moment. But the truth of the matter is I’m up against a tough battle ahead. | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=217765666b8e4137aba1783530cc0cab&_e=5fZ8vZKykiLpN_MQ6Xm5bIk2sYi-jqcSXZ1UToFHl8adAeqRTjXrP4pK7MlFVFAXz77o_gV_3aSaBahBnwKkOoZgz-I6NVz_xmnPb6k0Qp50ehqVbf_XI4bdinVX4hpULrslJEjs9-mQmEn5WUccwSiIwo66Q_M7aNygnu4VUrC0_M-9nYuQJCYeD6PCPZvJA6WpwLH86-kwRUfWzRriQ3Cka0X4F-eCsGMwEgwcr6Hf03MfE_EA0lV5G_yDuHPPo2iNH2BCTX6n_FEK7uZb2BdGX-2sODEj-mKDuj0zvMHy-f6wfQ8DSjT9IW7CLfQrz1n0Ka1LLPLi0PJnINlwpu300jbpEVV8f0cXLn3CnxU82vzg9at_l83yo_MCrrtVA0YDcrxAaJ_ctydwQWaJPiYgXP51UUFUilSoLke2wE1CKBC8CIdG9lC3OLHiWacrqENg6W4dfvSz0y75ZaRhYg%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa5e176b78549edbdeb19ceb6e8da2f&_e=G_kRrbc4bXJO9JEMl0AD6ZTglPn2DGk0bAxpcwGCdmNLvvtwb70DNUfOVYUe2sbAZ8X5H3uQFaxYYFOzCLCCOrdFhi7TxlHga5TCuxXarhAH02ib7hG3q9wo-UGfSumRgLmajRXdUrQEZAu4j4Xym6UEAx_T5OeYuWluTQcGgWZbHRL3EGDdpH8fEiwW1DObw2ed-mt5ipb5Sdu2nUTpbFzrBp6ZI_GnPjl98aKzp-nH2HE3DMftFmtr2ExO9fuIh8Rh-KatH39jMEB_N21xw5TdbYsGbJdaAyZ884gQUSnxKtP3F7UQnCu3RjA3Ssg5oIB_m5ctaTI5ZQny0pRQoRfrzXg56au29EbYnckXMdI0s3sgQISZQE5wMwpvhl0NBOvWSiUFc-HcD5KznE-wkGMZe8Xu82kK4F390M2og3M%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa5e176b78549edbdeb19ceb6e8da2f&_e=G_kRrbc4bXJO9JEMl0AD6ZTglPn2DGk0bAxpcwGCdmNLvvtwb70DNUfOVYUe2sbAZ8X5H3uQFaxYYFOzCLCCOrdFhi7TxlHga5TCuxXarhAH02ib7hG3q9wo-UGfSumRgLmajRXdUrQEZAu4j4Xym6UEAx_T5OeYuWluTQcGgWZbHRL3EGDdpH8fEiwW1DObw2ed-mt5ipb5Sdu2nUTpbFzrBp6ZI_GnPjl98aKzp-nH2HE3DMftFmtr2ExO9fuIh8Rh-KatH39jMEB_N21xw4_mxnvfloDY42TFjCt5jVIeqYCegZtNfBdnijTYWnhW2uS4X_x_n5e1Nu-nHGav5Ep0FXtrap1VCUAz6Ysw7kIZTDxm6wIl7u7OdIwZLwonwsS3NwYQVe1oHGwmk-kA5IorbsWs8qeeupY6TAFDLWU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa5e176b78549edbdeb19ceb6e8da2f&_e=G_kRrbc4bXJO9JEMl0AD6ZTglPn2DGk0bAxpcwGCdmNLvvtwb70DNUfOVYUe2sbAZ8X5H3uQFaxYYFOzCLCCOrdFhi7TxlHga5TCuxXarhAH02ib7hG3q9wo-UGfSumRgLmajRXdUrQEZAu4j4Xym6UEAx_T5OeYuWluTQcGgWZbHRL3EGDdpH8fEiwW1DObw2ed-mt5ipb5Sdu2nUTpbFzrBp6ZI_GnPjl98aKzp-nH2HE3DMftFmtr2ExO9fuIh8Rh-KatH39jMEB_N21xw9-nooC_ex0xC_6Rvup7eom62-cGt4vQS--78LqwzwRpHBXDCvLWk7NHX6uLVuVICm1AVAlzyrXEyrR8MGTTh4ecykDcw_YP1hQBKGX91VNn8luWsqgHE3K4TmSNTY7LLg38tODDAxUDfBVnuYD64T0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=afa5e176b78549edbdeb19ceb6e8da2f&_e=G_kRrbc4bXJO9JEMl0AD6ZTglPn2DGk0bAxpcwGCdmNLvvtwb70DNUfOVYUe2sbAZ8X5H3uQFaxYYFOzCLCCOrdFhi7TxlHga5TCuxXarhAH02ib7hG3q9wo-UGfSumRgLmajRXdUrQEZAu4j4Xym6UEAx_T5OeYuWluTQcGgWZbHRL3EGDdpH8fEiwW1DObw2ed-mt5ipb5Sdu2nUTpbFzrBp6ZI_GnPjl98aKzp-nH2HE3DMftFmtr2ExO9fuIh8Rh-KatH39jMEB_N21xw1X4sEqrIIOkPGVfl1T-42Wt9AiGLjqxSsoDkjIl_Ie07uaaOLgsQXy1JehVSxQ6muDyl8KAiM43OTevsfDznSHCn4tyrwGpM7J-ee4luQkvj5WVcG__6UejYA2jTNbHaQqgR_BpERQuAGBqmtF0H_s%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

body:
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxskDlPxDAQRn-NXUa-MrELFxSkAIkVaBF0Kx-D48g5SIxW--9RtqKgHT290ffCJUfLT2N6mc8fT6rgpxjleH58o9FyUNojRcvB8JazljOKk8vlUm8r2uCm1eU0_7kdMlAhgpEO0XMtvDJcKg8Q6WCBmSBAMuON54JF1YIx0nmuEVuFmmYrmJBMM82BcaWboAOqzimvg4YYgCg2paZuONe9upT2JiwTLXaodd2JfCCiJ6Lf67K5hE1allTQrfmOEdFPe9rnuBHRs_b2vZXX4fozjE6b55t-Px0AxuyI6I_lqkPj-FcnpeRSqtA5wGadEy3Lvdp_CrrZuF5zKXmHjiiWjjTH898AAAD__xu7cR4]

Hello Peter,

“Romney Challenger Garners Slew of Endorsements from Utah Lawmakers
[https://email.mg.trentstaggs.com/c/eJxMkDGP1DAQhX9N0nllOxNnXKSgIAVInECHoFuN7Vkni50sjk9h-fUoVNe-J33v6fPXJYzq5R6_rK8_PkHin_re3V8_fmvDqAyg45ZHZazqleyVbDnTkq71-eDRU37QEtd32Qkz4IOxHTE7hdqBVR04Y0I7j2FwaHtLEAaFxMEHo1Wn0YHrOy9tu4xa6k6iRGWkArx49AwDgUOPJnjTgMzxUguvda8U437xW27TONf62JvuQ6OnRk-R_nKtfHaNnlY-9kZPB_9p9FS2vPJT-JlS4jVyEZHKymUXe-JDbDfBa9jKzvmcELeyZfFWaRaJjky_uJwoKnXxia8DQDAaQbB0UvTeKmHBoFDDLUjJnUMMl7nm1Kbtv2jZP3-X9HU-3uY7of38xO8vbRnD41hSWnYzNCDjafO8_i8AAP__MO6EmQ]”

I hope all of you are staying cool out there because this race is heating up! As your next U.S. Senator, it is truly humbling to
receive the amount of support that I have received so far. To date we have now garnered hundreds of Team Staggs volunteers! I am
convinced now more than ever that Utah is ready to retire Mitt Romney for good. This week it was our pleasure to announce that we
had received endorsements from a slew of several lawmakers throughout Utah.

The Gazette writes, “A Utah mayor seeking to challenge Sen. Mitt Romney (R-UT) is positioning himself as the best conservative
alternative to replace the one-term incumbent in 2024, and a slate of local state legislators is rallying behind the movement.”
Our movement is growing and our momentum is gaining steam!

A lot of you have asked how you can become a delegate to help support our campaign which is very exciting! This link will show you
how you can run in your community as a state delegate. Delegates will be chosen at caucus night which is only a few months away.
Becoming a state delegate is one of the most important things that you can do as one of our volunteers. If you have any questions
about how you can become a delegate or if you can help in another way, please email james@trentstaggs.com or call 801-430-2046.

Once again, I am truly humbled by the amount of support we have received so far and am very grateful to each and every one of you.
Together we are building something special - and with your help - that will bring us victory come 2024! As General MacArthur said,
“There is no substitute for victory.”

Thank you all,

Trent

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Founded on TRUTH.
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHRYweDNk

Vivek 2024

Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on
truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of
these facts.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHRYweDNk

Fellow American,

TRUTH. There's only one. Not
yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic
political climate where spin is all the Administrative state
knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to
say them:

God is real.
There are two
genders.
Human flourishing
requires fossil fuels.
Reverse racism is
racism.
An open border is no
border.
Parents determine the
education of their children.
The nuclear family is
the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
Capitalism lifts
people up from poverty.
There are three
branches of the U.S. government, not four.
The U.S. Constitution
is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

CHIP IN
IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH

America was founded on these
truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths,
our standing as a nation would mean nothing.

If you agree with these 10
TRUTHS, I need you on my team.

This is about more than a
campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Will you
join me today by chipping in $1 or more?

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

STAND WITH THE TRUTH

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

The evidence implicates key figures within the California GOP, including Chairwoman Jessica Patterson, RNC national committee woman Harmeet Dhillon, and committee man Shawn Steel.

This disclosure sheds light on the secretive maneuvers within the California GOP leadership and their potential impact on the upcoming presidential election.

It’s our chance to shake things up, set the stage, and carry our momentum all the way to November when we go head-to-head against Tate Reeves! But let’s not get ahead of ourselves. = We're not just running a campaign. We're fighting for the heart and soul of our state. name: Giffords.org
subject: [SIGN ON] Tell Kevin McCarthy to let the House vote on gun safety legislation
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby
body:
The only place that gun safety is controversial is in Congress.
#

Friends -
Last week, the Congressional Gun Violence Prevention Task Force sent a letter to House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, telling him to stop canceling votes on gun safety legislation.
Although there have been over 400 mass shootings in the United States this year, the House has not been able to vote on a single piece of gun safety legislation due to Kevin McCarthy’s inaction.
**That’s because Kevin McCarthy would rather keep cozying up to the NRA than do the work to keep our communities safe.**
It’s shameful, and we’re fighting back. But we need your help.
[**Will you sign our petition today and join the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force in telling Speaker Kevin McCarthy to stop stalling and let the House vote on important gun safety legislation?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_mccarthy_pet_aug23/?source=em230808-1-15&refcode2=6298.3935704.xt4RDk&akid=6298%2E3935704%2Ext4RDk)
**[SIGN ON >>](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_mccarthy_pet_aug23/?source=em230808-1-15&refcode2=6298.3935704.xt4RDk&akid=6298%2E3935704%2Ext4RDk)**
The American people have made it clear that gun safety is a top-of-mind issue for them. The _overwhelming majority_ of Americans support commonsense gun safety legislation like universal background checks.
The only place that gun safety is controversial is in Congress, where far too many of our elected officials are bought and paid for by the gun lobby.
[**Enough is enough. Sign on today and tell Speaker Kevin McCarthy that we won’t stand for his inaction. Lives are on the line, and the House must vote on gun safety legislation.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_mccarthy_pet_aug23/?source=em230808-1-15&refcode2=6298.3935704.xt4RDk&akid=6298%2E3935704%2Ext4RDk)
**[SIGN ON >>](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_mccarthy_pet_aug23/?source=em230808-1-15&refcode2=6298.3935704.xt4RDk&akid=6298%2E3935704%2Ext4RDk)**
Thank you for speaking up,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6298%2E3935704%2Ext4RDk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Your support is helping make this top-targeted race competitive. | | Fellow Conservative, We haven't even been in this race for two months, but thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we have already made a HUGE statement. Inside Elections just ranked Montana's U.S. Senate seat a TOSS-UP. But, Fellow Conservative, we cannot take this for granted. Montana may be in the toss-up category today,but this race is far from over. This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column. After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer. body:
You’ve heard about this race – now we need to tell everyone else

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67780478/420820394/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230808PD_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI0YTkwNmYtMGIzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=spfJ9RGCw245ZwdT4skwFrWRuGhBmKrmh2gbRFoK8NM=) Peter – It’s primary day in Mississippi!

body:

| |

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **
| **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7201e4f10bb041cba6852e0670d3d139&_e=87vedEc2UQLiar2xvvdh5bISQXM37B86xSBrr853QVbsMA4NvPyuPxLtNMieuaapZqOwW11AdEuAFFuFnPNu476Dp0ot87R-HA_7gsvvOkC9Sj8ZLfmH4PkEEjJzvsMYDN8aGsG_ofycCXZKKpiqGrnTKXpvI9XQ6ZAPuwa9_AY7jbh6p-uYUqiiPPF2DaUyiHokwY-qNrggC6bkFY32NZHx3MlvLdnUbssHtbd0jFgRmzBG8fNjln5jj8jQnabzr9-Xto7YFDBc9ukppDZQ_wW7bxc6GbLlslROgoRCOV4X1ykAAOsjrXU4sIIvCs3mu0-iObCadYZeoh4L7om5t1Sd4oES_BnN6Oqpp_oFhW6o8tJuOAKcCmwFs28CYa8tYys2RftB4yb7gp6E1G4JdQ%3D%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7201e4f10bb041cba6852e0670d3d139&_e=87vedEc2UQLiar2xvvdh5bISQXM37B86xSBrr853QVbsMA4NvPyuPxLtNMieuaapZqOwW11AdEuAFFuFnPNu476Dp0ot87R-HA_7gsvvOkC9Sj8ZLfmH4PkEEjJzvsMYDN8aGsG_ofycCXZKKpiqGrnTKXpvI9XQ6ZAPuwa9_AY7jbh6p-uYUqiiPPF2DaUyiHokwY-qNrggC6bkFY32NZHx3MlvLdnUbssHtbd0jFgRmzBG8fNjln5jj8jQnabz0fyBJ9emQtivC_LNVPlzidgZ_5wlnhoAHzKCmEAQYkZ3xrX0flX8slg9fXFxZHpZJZ9Ccbe_TnNlW2OWjIl1tIW00U41Pqm1BT4s667K0nQ6ldJpKtQ_0JfoxSWhpZLi8qkJl5ywTiop631rapEjAA%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. | | | | | | | Friend -- I wish things would have gone a different way... This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation. After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, and I had to concede my race. | Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control. Everyone expected me to just walk away - but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up. I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again. The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up. My stomach is in knots - the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do). That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?" I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work. The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me. The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. Forever. I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out: | | | God bless you, and God bless America. Mayra Flores America First Candidate Texas Congressional District 34 | | Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. name: Durbin HQ
subject: The results are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Here are the issues you care about most:
#
Peter,
We recently sent our online supporters a survey about the pressing issues we’re facing today.
We wanted to report back and let you know what issues made it to the top of the list—and what Senator Durbin is doing in Washington to make progress in the face of Republican obstruction.
**[But first, can you make a quick contribution right now to keep the Senate blue in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67782054/420823136/-1075861288?refcode=dd_em_230808_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0MzgwMy0wZDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AGY4C3rc0q5ufgunVdSz4slsYBZdsUkYDq_36cq8DHU=)**
1. **Climate action**
We’ve all seen the news that 2023 has been the hottest year ever recorded. That may be one reason that climate action was the number one issue for most of our supporters. Last year, Democrats passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , the largest piece of federal legislation addressing climate change ever adopted by Congress. This issue is one of the most urgent of our times and Senator Durbin is working hard to meet the challenge.

2. **Gun violence**
In 2022, the Senate passed historic, bipartisan gun safety legislation that improved the background checks system, supported red flag laws, and closed dangerous loopholes. But Senator Durbin knows that is far from enough. That’s why he is still pushing to get military-style assault weapons off our streets. Most recently, he’s introduced legislation to ban marketing of firearms to children and reduce gun violence from stolen firearms. He also helped successfully block the GOP’s efforts to weaken the _National Firearms Act._

3. **Voting rights**
As states across the country restricted voting rights over the past two years, Democrats in the Senate responded by introducing the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act._ Unfortunately, Senate Republicans filibustered the bill. Senator Durbin is still working on solutions to strengthen the constitutional right to vote and protect the very bedrock of our democracy.

**[Senator Durbin is hard at work in the Senate on these issues and so many more. Pitch in $5 now to help him keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67782056/420823137/-1075861288?refcode=dd_em_230808_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0MzgwMy0wZDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AGY4C3rc0q5ufgunVdSz4slsYBZdsUkYDq_36cq8DHU=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67782057/420823138/-1075861288?refcode=dd_em_230808_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0MzgwMy0wZDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AGY4C3rc0q5ufgunVdSz4slsYBZdsUkYDq_36cq8DHU=)********

name: Andrew R.
subject: Why I stand with Will Hurd
body:
... it's a better way| | | Do you feel the same, my friend? I'm tired of self-serving leaders who are more concerned about making a name for themselves than serving their constituents. The performative politics are playing to the extreme fringes of the parties and pitting Americans against one another. **That's why I stand with Will Hurd.** He knows that _**we're better together.**_ When we're divided, nothing gets done and Americans suffer the consequences. Will believes in the American dream in our shared values of freedom, justice, and equality. [_**Chip in $1 and help get his message on the first GOP debate stage in August! He's got to reach 40,000 donors by the 21st.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=1bad21e8254f4a529508c58ab471b836&_e=dHkN-R8p96S6SPmb9wAOAyCzTIzUnAJvuBotZsDcNEkFB-gugQ6PfTxegtz5htXlkG-dGRdWWlcp18sUowPUBJMQsGxtKaZiepAywNrvQORvAAuvYPFAmzU-DkQgOHqGKKz4yYUFubA9lxdIzZxdKpm5M3iqwJut_NZbVeNoFi8fPbXYDg8Www_ycXa8loL4e6IgteG4ojNPV0AYaK9Iq04fUiIK4aslm5pdxdYEFk8kAiQuRUOzoWHnnUIbHO-f3vjNpmHxk2Jqji2P5h5fAQBPSzZLXpqj0zduhxbJQ7fzp4o8CIeIdBwtyuU87KbmC70lHQpz5VCg7UyriyvjIODPZ1r5paLYG4aiX7v6MzL3Ur5R2jiBQ7j5QvtkQlvZ57wMT3Ue5jb2gsTTlLalIg%3D%3D) Options are better for America – and I think Will Hurd is the best choice for our country. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl]
Even though Lizzie was in D.C. for most of July working to get things done for our district, our team was out and about all across TX-07. We were meeting and working with voters, volunteers, and Democratic leaders and organizers to make sure we’re ready for 2024. After all, campaigns are year-round efforts!
Check out the photos from our meetings with the Fort Bend Tejano Democrats, West Houston Democrats, Clubs in Action and the West U/Bellaire Dems Club.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl]
Our interns have been hard at work this summer helping us stay organized and expand our campaign’s reach.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl]
As part of our Democracy Summer fellowship program, our interns are getting the word out about Lizzie, her work in Congress, and why it’s so important that we send her back to the House next year. They’re also sharing our message across the district about what’s at stake in the 2024 elections—from the future of voting rights to reproductive rights—and the importance of getting involved in races up and down the ballot.
We want to tell you about a new leadership role Lizzie is taking on in Congress—she’s leading battleground fundraising efforts for 2024! In this role, Lizzie will work to make sure Democrats facing tough races in 2024—races that will be key to deciding control of the House—have the financial resources they need to run strong campaigns and win.
We’ve talked a bit about our efforts to not only re-elect Lizzie but to also help other strong leaders like her win their elections, too, and Lizzie’s battleground fundraising efforts will be key to making that happen.
We need good leaders at every level of government—that’s why it’s so important to elect Democrats at home, throughout Texas, and across the country. As a dedicated member of #TeamLizzie, you’re essential to that work and we’re so grateful for all you do. We’ll be in touch soon with all the ways you can help support Lizzie and more Democrats in 2024!
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230808nl?refcode=folf230808nl]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

Friend,
At a time when the Deep State is out to get to me in full force, I'm turning to the people I trust more than anyone in the world - my grassroots supporters like YOU.
_**I 'm hosting a lovely dinner in Nashville, Tennessee this month - and I'm leaving two chairs open for a grassroots donor and a guest of your choice to join me.**_
At a time when Biden's weaponized Department of "Justice" is trying to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man, there's no one I'd rather be surrounded by than my loyal supporters like YOU.

name: President Biden Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: President Biden’s agenda
body:
From safeguarding abortion to investing in infrastructure, defending voting rights, and funding public education, the Biden-Harris agenda is all about creating a better future for every American. | | |
---
| | President Biden's agenda is nothing short of transformative. From safeguarding abortion to investing in infrastructure, defending voting rights, and funding public education, it's all about creating a better future for _every_ American. **NEW POLL DATA:
Support for the right to choose at _RECORD-HIGH_**
Friend: Voters have made it crystal clear where they stand on reproductive rights.
A majority of voters believe in legal abortion. A majority of voters support Roe v. Wade _._ A majority of voters disapprove of extreme abortion bans. A majority of voters disagree with the Dobbs v. Jackson ruling. **And in 2022, that majority showed up at the polls and voted for a pro-choice Senate majority.**
Americans are UNITED in our support for reproductive rights. But far-right extremists are pushing increasingly extreme abortion bans and legislation to further undermine our reproductive freedom. GOP senators even introduced a bill to ban abortion NATIONWIDE.
**We _cannot_ let this extremist minority win. But we need reliable Democrats like you to raise your voices. [_So please, will you help us show the strength of our pro-choice movement by responding to our new poll before midnight tonight?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67783168/420827075/399922902?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4339-su-nd&refcode=jtk4339-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdkMDhiMS0wZDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gm02wEvz_9B83VNxRg63_zpmTGCX9aNpJIe7pBTkVAA=&emci=0d0650fd-e732-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a07d08b1-0d36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67783174/420827080/1575385346?code=jtk4339-su-nd&refcode=jtk4339-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdkMDhiMS0wZDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gm02wEvz_9B83VNxRg63_zpmTGCX9aNpJIe7pBTkVAA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: | | | NEW POLL DATA: Support for the right to choose at RECORD-HIGH Friend: Voters have made it crystal clear where they stand on reproductive rights. A majority of voters believe in legal abortion. A majority of voters support Roe v. Wade . A majority of voters disapprove of extreme abortion bans. A majority of voters disagree with the Dobbs v. Jackson ruling. And in 2022, that majority showed up at the polls and voted for a pro-choice Senate majority. Americans are UNITED in our support for reproductive rights. But far-right extremists are pushing increasingly extreme abortion bans and legislation to further undermine our reproductive freedom. GOP senators even introduced a bill to ban abortion NATIONWIDE. We cannot let this extremist minority win. But we need reliable Democrats like you to raise your voices. Do you support reproductive rights? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Bob Casey
subject: Not many people know this about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I used to coach basketball (and I played a little, too).
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)
Hi Peter, it’s Bob Casey.
Not many people recall but before taking office, I used to spend a bit of time on a basketball court. After college I coached eighth grade basketball in Philly, and played myself during high school.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230808-1?refcode=em20230808-1&refcode2=425_552475_EHqrH9&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)
_You can’t sink a shot like this without practice._
If there’s one thing I have learned from basketball, it’s this: You have to keep your head in the game from tip-off to the final buzzer.
I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the truth is, **this might be the toughest matchup in the country in 2024.** Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are targeting PA, and we need to build a campaign that can take them on.
I know that with you on our team, we can run the court. With every donation you make, you help us put points on the board that will help us defend our Senate majority.
[**Please, Peter, can you chip in $5 or more today to help us build an early lead as we fight to defend this Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230808-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230808-1&refcode2=425_552475_EHqrH9&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230808-1?refcode=em20230808-1&refcode2=425_552475_EHqrH9&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)**
Together, we’ll build an all-star team that will keep the Senate blue.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

* * *

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=425%2E552475%2EEHqrH9)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. ---
| | |
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now → ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfb79ae27ea44f91b9789a19ca959ad6&_e=Wya50tt9lO0xk_bRHXnJTaZ3LXyIgf4lRSodbp7yyDXGnmsfWJDErmuSEZ3Hv4U9GRYTXZPhQP2eF40E2QqrhbCFAbKwqRhblt024VleRu5TKwG2yND5yTIDj6OKnxysYNA1HikG3zGyBu5ZY2wHipxnoB1AehgI-eKUJbK90tXpb3bTCw7NEqrpIz4x4Ls7wKeaGAE3HUn_17Qv8iwb3dMnJb_iDQmAFPgrbsd21059qto4yka7GzxlHERt9sdcXipzfZ0zE7aURmJCfAuCNiQi5-SVAospXNZQ4YAfMcpym7VNwae4AnSdb_SxTJrp)
---
| | |
---
Alan Dershowitz
Columnist,
The New York Sun

body:

---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=657e7f41b33144fa88bcaed3d5eb0dbb&_e=eHxO0O_sdDfdFVICO7zDjO8P0j3Pil2dYr_tHXJk2aZSFef1mamTSODHZQhkf84-sBijVPcz29UipCE00nfheJDr1JMHM6RInBxX9LJeOI9Z9_MGQ5xEgaPxSr_U7SMdVnDWaFkulaPYQ1-XvESb_AlaZ6DDbjBZk0uoB2tCtp1jw460lKNyXZ4vhXIb2gJEy-kxxY4bOAEOjcSMx_ZOrSgpDAh6Z5UCAqE8xdUVfdH1rWJ5MQdC1FVV2xxcEepgOF48Z50FMS3Gj1qEBqzgp0S7_kooPbuBd4W7OgQlk__vOl9vlbAmvqQo2vUuOQyeW4VEes7Y4YQSCAyYjfZqJl1Vi9Zz7s9pyDtsKHf6bgeQxcDmxqINs9KMAAs1qosnKXA-btEwXPWNjkeuKWFW8A%3D%3D)
Peter, On Wednesday night, **"Just tell me when and where"** was the phrase heard 'round the country. **_Gov. DeSantis and Gov. Newsom are going head-to-head to debate two visions for America._** _When Fox News' Sean Hannity brought up a debate between California Governor Gavin Newsom and Governor Ron DeSantis, he didn't hesitate to rise to the challenge:_ **_"Let's get it done. Just tell me when and where." -- Gov. DeSantis_**
---

This debate boils down to freedom vs. failure, FNAME. Gov. DeSantis is ready to make the case for the future of our country. Let us know: **_who do you think will win this debate?_**

| | | | | [VOTE DESANTIS](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=657e7f41b33144fa88bcaed3d5eb0dbb&_e=eHxO0O_sdDfdFVICO7zDjO8P0j3Pil2dYr_tHXJk2aZSFef1mamTSODHZQhkf84-sBijVPcz29UipCE00nfheJDr1JMHM6RInBxX9LJeOI9Z9_MGQ5xEgaPxSr_U7SMdVnDWaFkulaPYQ1-XvESb_AlaZ6DDbjBZk0uoB2tCtp1jw460lKNyXZ4vhXIb2gJEy-kxxY4bOAEOjcSMx_ZOrSgpDAh6Z5UCAqE8xdUVfdEX0m38gMpcN3GnwaVfOHsWwFmoucw41DJZOUzsgS9GBLno8d9U3ATfiFV7QUofP40l9KxmjYSowDH5jbzrvQavSzIFhAvZ8en9bVQ063xntc9gnXsTTL45Qh4nYu2UX5EqLppdWV_uIhjwaZu7BAN0Pscgb0KFXu2Q9F1t7wlg6ZYUqfbMiQVZbhXAEXQVQBb_bTPXAXYXarxcIRn__krP4Rwcevqr8OECqt_9iiIirw%3D%3D)

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis
