|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=657e7f41b33144fa88bcaed3d5eb0dbb&_e=eHxO0O_sdDfdFVICO7zDjO8P0j3Pil2dYr_tHXJk2aZSFef1mamTSODHZQhkf84-sBijVPcz29UipCE00nfheJDr1JMHM6RInBxX9LJeOI9Z9_MGQ5xEgaPxSr_U7SMdVnDWaFkulaPYQ1-XvESb_AlaZ6DDbjBZk0uoB2tCtp1jw460lKNyXZ4vhXIb2gJEy-kxxY4bOAEOjcSMx_ZOrSgpDAh6Z5UCAqE8xdUVfdH1rWJ5MQdC1FVV2xxcEepgiMU-5YsDfWQeU0WIgl_xxJsme_y9hhI8qUG3kfeLoVfEAchdhECF5gSFjlUxD-gN5JGUkQ99S_gAPhcYlk_wuSyNONyxU5QDEEVaj8yviUHMu6N17B56_Kk3hM2Izxf4UKEe1WNT_HTGXuBDRyjjLA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

Thank you for standing up for democracy,

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Trump's trial should be televised!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Televise the Trump Trial. Support the House Democratic request to make this happen](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d8c79ac-d669-4cdf-9988-ccf3569660bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7505733-2d6e-49d9-b1d2-8557952193df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump faces federal criminal charges, and when he is tried, the American people should be able to see it live on television. House Democrats have formally requested this in [a letter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18a78ea7-89ca-4015-bc68-d4e43bbc479a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to the Judicial Conference, saying it is essential for the health of our democracy, and we couldn't agree more. We've all had more than enough of Trump rallies and lies getting nonstop airtime, so it's time to show him as he really is -- a criminal forced to sit and listen to the charges against him in a venue where his lies are not tolerated. [**Add your name, and ask that the Trump federal trial be televised.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T948c3320-d58f-4d7a-93e1-d4ad88c98658/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d80e577-f0a1-4e00-9e38-034c624c0d45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|

subject: Standing in Solidarity with Striking Hotel Workers and Condemning Egregious Attacks
body:
Dear Supporters and Community Members, The dedicated hotel workers represented by UNITE HERE Local 11 are on strike to advocate for better w
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d4OdM8Qj4/c?w=ZweBfMCsI6tdqH7Emx_9IQkQEbawY6zfyOvcDbCJ2yY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Q0T2RNOFFqND9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjRhZWQ3NDRlLWRjM2EtNGUwYi1hYWY1LTZhZmMxNzc0ZGZlMyJ9)_**

| | |

| |
# Standing in Solidarity with Striking Hotel Workers and Condemning Egregious Attacks

---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Supporters and Community Members,
The dedicated hotel workers represented by UNITE HERE Local 11 are on strike to advocate for better wages, safer working conditions, and the respect they rightfully deserve as some of the hardest-working people in Los Angeles County. I want to express my unwavering support for these courageous individuals who are standing up for their rights and fellow workers' rights across the industry – especially the hotel workers at the Hotel Maya in Long Beach, who are strong-willed neighbors and constituents of our campaign.
Last evening, I joined striking workers at Hotel Maya to hear more about the tough working conditions they experience on the job and stand in solidarity with their strike efforts.
Let me be clear: I’m saddened and outraged by the news that[ security workers from Hotel Maya, the Fairmont Miramar, and the Laguna Cliffs Marriott egregiously and physically attacked striking workers](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d4OdM8Qj4/c?w=pG_qzaT5sPZ1naCIpajoFU9fXc9_MXVPRq2CZwsi5Bg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9maW5hbmNlLnlhaG9vLmNvbS9uZXdzL2wtc3RyaWtpbmctaG90ZWwtd29ya2Vycy1iZWluZy0xODMzNDgxMzIuaHRtbCIsInIiOiJkZWQ4OTQ4MS03NjI4LTRiMDAtMTdmOC1iM2VjMzFkMmEwYTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0YWVkNzQ0ZS1kYzNhLTRlMGItYWFmNS02YWZjMTc3NGRmZTMifQ).
Such behavior is utterly unacceptable and goes against the principles of justice, fairness, and human rights we value as a campaign. I strongly condemn these violent actions and believe every worker has the right to express their grievances peacefully and without fear of retaliation.
In standing firmly with the striking hotel workers, I am committed to ensuring their voices are heard and their concerns are addressed. We must recognize these individuals' crucial role in our community, often working tirelessly behind the scenes to ensure guests have a comfortable and memorable experience. Clearly missing from the picket line and conspicuously silent in expressing any form of support for the striking workers is Robert Garcia, the frequent guest of Hotel Maya and the current Representative of the 42nd Congressional District.
You either stand with workers, or you don’t. So my question is: Where is Congressman Garcia?
Furthermore, as a candidate for Congress, I am dedicated to fostering an environment in which the rights of workers are protected, where justice prevails, and where economic inequality is addressed head-on. The struggles faced by the hotel workers at the Fairmont Miramar, the Hotel Maya, and all striking workers reflect broader economic issues within our society, and it is our duty to work together to bring about a local economy that puts working people first.
I invite you to join me in expressing solidarity with the striking hotel workers and condemning any acts of violence or mistreatment. Let us send a strong message that our community stands united in support of fair labor practices, social justice, and the well-being of all its members.
Thank you for your continued support as we work towards a better future for our district and nation. In solidarity,
Nicole López

---

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email]Oh hey - I hope this email finds you all purr-fectly well. As you may already know, today is a very special day – it's International Cat Day! A day dedicated to honoring and appreciating the wonderful companionship and unconditional love we furry friends bring into your lives. But they tell me I’m not allowed to email JUST to ask for treats. So, today, on MY day, I want to recognize the work my human, Wiley, does for me and everyone around him.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email]
I may just be a cat, but I know everything. (duh!) I see the hard work and dedication Wiley puts into making the world a better place for all creatures, big and small. From the moment Wiley decided to run for Congress, his passion for serving the community and making a positive impact on the lives of others has never wavered.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email]
As a cat, I have my own unique perspective on things, and let me tell you, our home is filled with love, warmth, and a strong sense of purpose. (Also, a little too much Ted Lasso but honestly, that means more naps for me) I may not be able to vote or directly contribute to their campaign, but I can use my adorable charm to rally all of you amazing supporters on my human's behalf!
So, here it goes: can you chip in $1 or $5 to help Wiley continue spreading his vision of a brighter future? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-fireball?refcode=230808-email]
Thank you for being a part of our incredible journey and for helping my human create a brighter tomorrow for all of us. I'm sending you all my sassiest meows!
Fireball 🔥

name: Jon Tester
subject: Whether we pull off a win could come down to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map. It’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

| Peter,

Roll Call ranked me as **the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running for reelection in 2024.**

That’s on top of _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ and _Inside Elections_ calling this race a **toss-up.** And it’s why Mitch McConnell has made Montana his top target. Not to mention, national Republicans are already hammering me with political ads that distort my record.

Look, I’m not panicking— _but I am sounding the alarm._

A wave of outside money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be one of the most expensive and competitive races on the map. It’s up to us to build a team strong enough to win.

**Montana is a top battleground this cycle, and whether or not we pull off a win could come down to you. We’re $17,612 behind our mid-month fundraising goal. That’s why I need your help, especially today:**

[_**Split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Fight for Progress to give us the necessary grassroots resources we need to stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate majority.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67784639/420833049/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230808-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODMyZjE2LTE0MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DONUdcE6sjSkBk-hGhfaA1ZvRn62SCHf5ee6t7SlVtE=)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e752e714a55f4d42b563a38bf2e35070&_e=pkwNw9FXHKTn8Ns57MwUMC5HximJaoOO2hWUTxzA-W2RZz33cL0xNX1MzYT7O2VJ_geFYoEsMskpVFvyFvbzIzRwoik6LyAbh3lkYP8bTEJSPosM3a4_XkvGaGY-VuzKEx15TT2sIMWmt0GxmhYomS0HiBn6pzQiz642yGPpVx0sP8SDTPw5tDl9AbiP9I65OLARduDAp8KMAIlJV_ip6sKLJdMFql1eGsE6KXuJpO5ZWqk8rtc2KmhF0zYYGcJGP9tb_Ed3OdP_qB7wxdi1z__Jlbz2qwZs6tLHU5YNjUovmkLWBLcxUx0-ZLccQos6zS8PgozYBDWv--Tiq6p1f9kVGB96CO_jjJyKwRGN65bh7NBU25kWpKrjIuUKisyPl4vGLMzrxRfaFgQqL09Abyak4u2dNVnJhtoz0-5P814%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. name: Chrissy
subject: Gun violence is a bipartisan issue
body:
| | |
---
Derek, as a third-generation veteran, former teacher, mother and proud Pennsylvanian, I know the topic of gun violence brings up a multitude of deeply personal feelings for many people.

Just over halfway through the year, we’ve already seen more than 420 mass shootings in the United States. Like me, I’m sure you’ve felt outraged, heartbroken, or hopeless at the cost of this senseless crisis – and that’s why I’ve been so keen to continue fighting for a solution.

I’ve been an outspoken champion of bipartisan legislation like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the first gun violence legislation passed in the House and Senate in nearly 30 years.
**With so many lives at risk, bipartisan compromise is the most effective way to keep our homes, schools, and neighborhoods safe.**
Since the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act went into effect one year ago, we’ve seen significant investments in mental health resources and school safety that have worked to address gun violence at its source. It also strengthened restrictions on those under 21 and those convicted of domestic violence when attempting to purchase a firearm.
I’m honored to be in a position to make a difference – but frustrated by the magnitude of violence still left unaddressed. More than ever, we need commonsense, bipartisan gun safety legislation and increased coordination between federal, state, and local governments.
**Together, we have the power to end this crisis. That’s why I’d like to hear from you today, Derek. Before our live poll closes at midnight, please tell me:**
**Do you support commonsense** **gun safety legislation?**
| | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67785164/420834949/-282735917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk849-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNmODI2MC0xNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vv01VJAypZ6wenx_EIWiV2baXngkPujU5BqWbqs1Mvk=&emci=5cf555e2-e832-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6e3f8260-1536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)

| | [No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67785166/420834951/-282735917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk849-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNmODI2MC0xNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vv01VJAypZ6wenx_EIWiV2baXngkPujU5BqWbqs1Mvk=&emci=5cf555e2-e832-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6e3f8260-1536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)

Thank you. There’s still work to be done.

Chrissy

Devon, PA 19333

body:
We can win the fight for affordable healthcare. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67785198/420835076/1122453752?&refcode=E3664-20230808-Underwood-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZjkwN2ExLTE1MzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3LKCY5aqts1nL6ZMfdXB3c13YR0Cliw_ZOczq6bfQ4Q=) Hi Peter, My name is Lauren Underwood and I’m extremely proud to represent Illinois’ 14th district in Congress. Before I was elected as the youngest Black woman to serve in Congress, I was a registered nurse who just wanted to care for people. But after serving as an HHS Senior Advisor to President Obama during the Flint Water Crisis and helping implement the Affordable Care Act, I knew I had to run for Congress when my Republican Congressman signed on to the American Healthcare Act, which would have made it cost prohibitive for people with preexisiting conditions, like me, to receive health care. **We overcame that challenge - and now I’m leading the charge in Congress to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs. I believe access to high-quality care is a human right and no American should struggle to find affordable coverage.** [**We can’t do this work without you! clean_body: We can win the fight for affordable healthcare. = Hi Peter, My name is Lauren Underwood and I’m extremely proud to represent Illinois’ 14th district in Congress. Before I was elected as the youngest Black woman to serve in Congress, I was a registered nurse who just wanted to care for people. But after serving as an HHS Senior Advisor to President Obama during the Flint Water Crisis and helping implement the Affordable Care Act, I knew I had to run for Congress when my Republican Congressman signed on to the American Healthcare Act, which would have made it cost prohibitive for people with preexisiting conditions, like me, to receive health care. We overcame that challenge - and now I’m leading the charge in Congress to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs. I believe access to high-quality care is a human right and no American should struggle to find affordable coverage. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In the past, I’ve been able to rely on grassroots supporters to help me win one of the top 10 closest races in the country - and 2024 will be no different. We have to win my seat and take back the House so we can pass the health care reform our country desperately needs. = Together, we can make sure everyone can access and afford the care they need! \- Rep. Lauren Underwood, RN Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

name: Team Trone
subject: Quiz: How well do you know David?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
How much do you know about David Trone? Take our sixty-second quiz to find out, Peter! >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/7nN9aPvlykSZq_UWGOmn3Q2

David knows what Maryland families need because he’s been where they are – growing up working long days on his family’s farm – and facing financial insecurity when his father lost the farm to the bank. He’s carried those lessons throughout his career in business and in Congress.

From criminal justice reform to mental health funding and medical research, David has a proven track record of progressive success. He’s spent his career turning your calls for bold, lasting change into legislation that uplifts our communities.

David knows how important it is for Maryland to have a Senator who is ready to make bold, progressive change – but how well do you know David?

Today, we thought it would be fun to give you a short quiz to find out. It should only take a moment – let’s see how well you do!

Take the Quiz >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/7nN9aPvlykSZq_UWGOmn3Q2

Thanks!

– Team Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

The August 8th Special Election in Ohio is upon us, and we need grassroots heroes like you to rise to the occasion and make a difference, not just in Ohio, but everywhere fair representation and accountability are on the line! = = You have been the driving force behind our significant strides. And because of our grassroots supporters we have made significant strides in our organizing efforts: = Your unwavering commitment to our movement has already yielded incredible results. Former President Trump's defense strategy includes not only contesting the 2020 election but also attacking the election system itself. He is doubling down on claims of a rigged and stolen election, threatening the credibility of our electoral process.
Strategists from both sides of the aisle agree that Donald Trump's persistent focus on election fraud and the events of January 6th is harmful to all of us. The latest criminal case against him highlights his apparent intention to perpetuate false claims about the 2020 election.
[**This is a critical moment to sound the alarm and take action. As we approach the 2024 elections, we have to stand united against false statements that seek to erode public trust in our democracy. | Dear Jefferson County Republicans,
This Kentucky State Fair is almost here and we are asking for your assistance in volunteering at the Cameron for Governor booth at the Kentucky State Fair!
The dates are August 17 - August 27 and we are looking for 2 volunteers for each 3-hour time slot during the week and each 4-hour time slot on the weekends. All volunteers will receive admission to the fair!
Please sign up using the link below if you are available. We need your help to ensure that Daniel Cameron is the next Governor of Kentucky!

name: VoteVets.org
subject: We name our Military Bases after Patriots
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
A bunch of losers are upset about that. Let’s show them what we think.
#
Hey there Derek,
A long overdue change is happening. For way, way too long a ton of our most important Military Bases were named after Confederates.
Now, they’ll be named after patriots and patriotic values.
And surprise, surprise: A bunch of losers are upset about that.
Let’s show them what we think.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-august23-bases.auWHb4&refcode=em230808-1-30&t=1&akid=14273%2E3013755%2E3RNEdh)
[**Donate any amount — any at all — and we’ll send you our brand new “Bases” sticker. If you can’t afford much, that’s okay. And if you can afford $10, $20, or even more, your donation will cover the cost for several other peoples stickers.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-august23-bases.auWHb4&refcode=em230808-1-30&t=2&akid=14273%2E3013755%2E3RNEdh)
We wanted to touch on a couple of these.
Fort Johnson used to be named after Leonidas Polk, a traitor who fought against the United States in the Civil War. Now, it is named after William Henry Johnson, a Harlem Hellfighter who was awarded the Medal of Honor and the Croix de Guerre in World War 1.
Fort Moore used to be named after Henry Benning, a traitor who fought against the United States in the Civil War. Now, it is named for Hal Moore, a decorated Army commander who led a battalion of Air Cavalry in the battle at Ia Drang in Vietnam and later wrote the book, _“We Were Soldiers Once... and Young.”_
These are the types of people our bases should be named after.
Not Confederates. Not traitors. Patriots.
If you agree, get your sticker today.
| [GET YOUR STICKER ](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-august23-bases.auWHb4&refcode=em230808-1-30&t=3&akid=14273%2E3013755%2E3RNEdh)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it's election day for our slate of Black champions in Mississippi! We've always been committed to electing Black progressive champions up and down the ballot and across the country, supporting candidates just like these ones. Republicans hold a SUPERMAJORITY in both chambers of Mississippi’s legislature, making it even more critical that we elect Black champions who are ready to fight to protect critical freedoms. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed. | | | | | | Thank you for your support — in Mississippi and around the country. The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. I'm reaching out because Sarah's birthday is just 2 days away, and her dad Dave and I wanted to make sure _all_ of us who care about her get to celebrate! 🎂🥳🎊 [**Dave and I want to give Sarah the _biggest_ birthday card of her life – add your name (and a note if you like) to help us celebrate the big day!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67788544/420847905/-1321815936?contactdata=Vdee5Z+o/253dDhiWcHw/XEWyDoJyAgp9iZG8o48hxpIBpwkqo9WGzVPQ4/p+2ujYSEpQ4xHI91MuJGaCsJF91WnW8BawMQq0VsUvc1p4fvcMWRRBdsWpMdplhWWEC26w/r8ukya4tWac28hrvprYg==&ms=EM_FL_MCB_20230808_pt_bday2_surr_mf_act_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI3ZjJmNC0yMTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwt1VCgNqXThjysfXSDe98eINBjWgp6F8nIlAFGu9hM=&emci=c8e2331b-5a35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4327f2f4-2136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936) Birthdays have taken on a new importance in Sarah's life after coming out and especially since her husband Andy passed away in 2014. She's never been one to want a super expensive or flashy gift. Though she does love gathering with friends and family for a party (such a typical Leo). But what really matters to Sarah on her birthday is celebrating another year of an authentic life on this earth and all the amazing people she's connected to. **So I really can't think of anything better to give her than a card full of hundreds (even thousands!) of notes from all of us, the team that has her back as she runs for Congress.** | [ADD YOUR NAME ✍️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67788545/420847906/-1321815936?contactdata=Vdee5Z+o/253dDhiWcHw/XEWyDoJyAgp9iZG8o48hxpIBpwkqo9WGzVPQ4/p+2ujYSEpQ4xHI91MuJGaCsJF91WnW8BawMQq0VsUvc1p4fvcMWRRBdsWpMdplhWWEC26w/r8ukya4tWac28hrvprYg==&ms=EM_FL_MCB_20230808_pt_bday2_surr_mf_act_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI3ZjJmNC0yMTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wwt1VCgNqXThjysfXSDe98eINBjWgp6F8nIlAFGu9hM=&emci=c8e2331b-5a35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4327f2f4-2136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=36397936)

Thanks for supporting Sarah and having her back. It means so much to me as her mom to know she's not doing any of this alone.
Sal McBride

clean_body: Hi, everyone! I wanted to reach out one more time to invite you to sign Sarah's birthday card before the big day tomorrow. | Hi, everyone! I wanted to reach out one more time | I can't wait to show her all your names and notes. I know it's going to mean so much to her just to see how many of us care about her. Thank you, Sal (Sarah's mom) \- - - - FWD - - - - From: Sal McBride To: You = Hi everyone – Sarah's mom here. I'm reaching out because Sarah's birthday is just 2 days away, and her dad Dave and I wanted to make sure all of us who care about her get to celebrate! 🎂🥳🎊 Birthdays have taken on a new importance in Sarah's life after coming out and especially since her husband Andy passed away in 2014. She's never been one to want a super expensive or flashy gift. Though she does love gathering with friends and family for a party (such a typical Leo). But what really matters to Sarah on her birthday is celebrating another year of an authentic life on this earth and all the amazing people she's connected to. So I really can't think of anything better to give her than a card full of hundreds (even thousands!) of notes from all of us, the team that has her back as she runs for Congress. | Thanks for supporting Sarah and having her back. It means so much to me as her mom to know she's not doing any of this alone. Sal McBride | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. Box 1904 Wilmington, DE 19899 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

name: Lateefah Simon HQ
subject: [New Endorsements] Ella Baker Center Action Fund + Courage California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re so humbled by the momentum we’re building and by the trust placed in Lateefah and our team as we fight for progressive change.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)
**Campaign work isn’t easy**. Being a scrappy, grassroots campaign means that we’re constantly working to grow our broad, community first, movement — and to ensure that this movement has the resources to stand up to the corporate war chests of our opponents.
CA-12 deserves Lateefah’s voice — her drive, her passion — in Congress. And gifts from people like you, yes you, will help us send her there.
That’s part of why we send emails like this one — [**and we hope you’ll considering giving what you can today**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/262?t=2&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc) — but we also send these emails because even if today isn’t the day you give for the first time, you’re an invaluable member of our team and we wanted to share a huge win: **We’ve been endorsed by the Ella Baker Center Action Fund and Courage California**
In the hard work of campaigning — this is a moment to celebrate!
[**Will you help us celebrate these endorsements and build on our momentum by making a contribution right now? It’s critical that we continue to strengthen our movement!**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/262?t=3&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230808?amount=10&refcode=em20230808&refcode2=81_1163_IHZ3Vc&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)**
We’re really proud to have earned support from people like you and organizations that share our vision for a bold, progressive voice fighting for CA-12.
Adding **The Ella Baker Center Action Fund** and **Courage California** to the community standing with Lateefah is an honor.
**The Ella Baker Center Action Fund** works to build political power amongst people who have been impacted by institutions of punishment and policing. Lateefah’s work on to empower folks who have interacted with the system and her commitment to criminal justice reform truly aligns with EBC Action Fund’s vision of a liberated future.
**Courage California** is a grassroots advocacy organization that provides the tools needed to unite with communities organizing for progressive change — the kind of change Lateefah has dedicated her life to realizing in her community. Their support, and understanding of how courageous Lateefah has been as she fights for the voiceless, only affirms our knowledge that she is ready to lead on behalf of CA-12’s communities.
**Moments like this are a reminder that our work is resonating with folks, that our momentum is growing, that our hard work is getting real results, and that Lateefah is**** _the_****progressive candidate with the experience and support to win this race.**
[**Now we want your help****. Your contribution today will go directly towards our work to build momentum and reach as many voters and community members as possible. Can we count on your donation today?**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/262?t=4&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230808?amount=10&refcode=em20230808&refcode2=81_1163_IHZ3Vc&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)**
Thank you for your support,
Lateefah Simon HQ
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230808&t=5&refcode2=81_1163_IHZ3Vc&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=81%2E1163%2EIHZ3Vc)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

clean_body: the South is depending on us | | | Derek, Virginia is the South’s final hope to protect access to abortion. = Every other Southern state has either banned or rolled back access to reproductive health care. I just read an article talking about how abortion providers in Virginia are feeling the strain as patients from neighboring states like Georgia and Mississippi are traveling to the Commonwealth to get their procedures. But regardless of the stress caused by the influx of patients, these providers know that residents from Southern states are relying on the Commonwealth to safeguard abortion access. Right now, until my colleagues and I in the Senate can codify Roe v. Wade into law, our only option is to stop Republicans from taking control of the General Assembly and enacting a 15-week abortion ban – or worse. = Thank you for your support in this fight, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Throwing in the towel
body:
I’m reaching out to my most loyal supporters with an urgent ask| | | __**CLICK TO JOIN TEAM WALTZ**__
---
It may be time for me to throw in the towel.

The Biden Crime family has too much power, too much influence, and too many insider connections that can bankroll any radical-left candidate in the nation. **And right now, they’re aiming to knock me out of the fight.**

Just between you and me, my fundraising operations have taken a dip during this year’s summer slump. And with the Left’s eyes on our Florida Freedom, we can’t afford to take _any_ hits.

**This is Col. Mike Waltz. I served as a Green Beret in the most dangerous corners of Afghanistan, and now, I’m serving the people of Florida in Congress. If Joe Biden can take me down, no one is safe.**

I’ve led America’s bravest warriors on the frontlines of Afghanistan in the most miserable of conditions. If the Democrats can beat a battle-hardened combat veteran like me, they can beat _anyone_** _._**

There’s not much more I can say. If I don’t get reinforcements soon everything I do from here on out will be for nothing. But if you can **[guarantee a gift of $5 right now,](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0b1e8c8c0e6640968308607ad75ccbfa&_e=EaZcwu1gb8W_CroymfvXNEByY4Q3rs7UW2pjtLFmNrKs0LPpA1LQbWI_jABZcB-H2mi7pR76OmEt3FopEMHWmfUcwzRHveICeE1tpSRK_BD6EA9rTDRL3VF63Q0azn2L9v5Y4y0nnlugh_Qnp-shjI7BCOJ4fLCSOTKX1hTpcqGaNROJ_H1en81BbnbofgOSCfGaX-2Ykzb3BipARlGEVHkYjy8Y3WD2kx-4jVfx-jBR3uoYgukkXepmNxFNHdZZZTw_WgAlW-vQxaCof0LDanBK9vqQDf5Tmf555k4zN2mVVZVO0OTJJOkSYXAfc9YwanrNGcufvsSBass1BE6WoJ_3pYRLL0mzPW4d4sE7Rg45Zrk-8Puyjqddbjt7g5Ce)** you have my word that it **_will_ **put my fundraising back on track.

As a veteran who spent years serving our country and protecting its borders, I’ll promise you right now that I will continue to defend America in Congress.

**[Can I count on you to help me out today?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=0b1e8c8c0e6640968308607ad75ccbfa&_e=EaZcwu1gb8W_CroymfvXNEByY4Q3rs7UW2pjtLFmNrKs0LPpA1LQbWI_jABZcB-H2mi7pR76OmEt3FopEMHWmfUcwzRHveICeE1tpSRK_BD6EA9rTDRL3VF63Q0azn2L9v5Y4y0nnlugh_Qnp-shjI7BCOJ4fLCSOTKX1hTpcqGaNROJ_H1en81BbnbofgOSCfGaX-2Ykzb3BipARlGEVHkYjy8Y3WD2kx-4jVfx-jAH8qVd93Cb22poajOfzzA3JDcxVqQb7SyJKcooRePgNGRvaH1u7ZmiE0JlciuN2L0q7bFv1SYZMgTV3_kpfYmgTIt5DDq5QipOUDE60JRaNMInI6xE_goSBX5HYH3iEuko_hTGqP3Kpc0w41urTFIW)**
---
| | Thank you,

subject: Biden’s big lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
Caught red-handed
| | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=351156a440d346a4a5c780b131b090ab&_e=0JBzRC69LMwOZPi4zm78NQiHQpdU8QUe0O_dGanZ2puDBzfT64ZaeL1YXqIdftIC088qeN36nm6s00ztX6vBJUTkwu-lCpBU2rvy9hZQ30Z80ByBf3DN89ALU0h-tGwVU_fPcTics3JIyAmQv2V9gqp8RR-kFDESgdiN87Mrez-jhpzAkbuo44dFY1W7dpkKET1-f1hYUYj_U8W5vYNNxv8tDVu8L2-5e3ShHJR3Fbi4OqDdmvRl6293PJSxlrJLUukqvTeFElGA8l3sNhRcf8nBB44GuZJSuRPmelN5rrNSiGsdOd50HQDax6g3uiHlYk9ijtm38TfYRuqyhaGyknPnnAhFCST4lCJMELXZPaw%3D)

_**" I've never spoken to my son about his overseas business dealings"**_ _ \- Joe Biden_ You and I knew it was BS when he said it, Friend, and now we have sworn testimony to prove it. **Star Witness Devon Archer testified that Joe Biden called into Burisma board meetings *before* Joe Biden got Ukrainian Prosecutor Shokin fired!** The case against President Biden has been blown wide open and as a result, the entrenched powers in Washington, D.C. are furious. **Now I'm facing the wrath of the most powerful triumvirate in the history of the United States: Biden's Democratic Party, the mainstream media, and the weaponized federal government.** I'm standing in the breach facing this unholy alliance, and I can't do it alone. [**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to stand with me in this all-important time****.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=351156a440d346a4a5c780b131b090ab&_e=0JBzRC69LMwOZPi4zm78NQiHQpdU8QUe0O_dGanZ2puDBzfT64ZaeL1YXqIdftIC088qeN36nm6s00ztX6vBJUTkwu-lCpBU2rvy9hZQ30Z80ByBf3DN89ALU0h-tGwVU_fPcTics3JIyAmQv2V9gqp8RR-kFDESgdiN87Mrez-jhpzAkbuo44dFY1W7dpkKET1-f1hYUYj_U8W5vYNNxj6qOcJ63shSk3ApPbXJ6GQqFXEJ-uglAhPcq6NuCWB0bdF-fwP1JlhK3oxDMuQirk2oucrTMkJPvJamBUlr1tKm9Duze5rWYARbLkTp8ry13o5cvVr3RxRZoNGPBFUh5zoRIxOFVGyFfazB5bvHDks%3D) I'd be lying if I said this wasn't hard, but nothing worth doing is easy. name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: A small sense of deja vu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, I've always been ready to serve our communities, and to really drive that point home, here are side-by-side clips from my campaign for Indy City-County Council in 2019, and my campaign for US Senate this year:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Then: I fought for inclusive economic growth and safer neighborhoods. In my time as a Councillor, I've worked hard to level the playing field for small businesses and prioritized public safety.
Now: I'm running for US Senate because I've seen how far we can go when our government is willing to show up for our residents.
While folks in DC now are worried about cutting Social Security and limiting our freedoms, I'm more concerned about investing in our community, expanding our freedoms, and protecting our democracy.
Friend, whether I'm in Indy or in Washington, the message will be the same: my top priority is and always will be working in the best interests of our people.
But just like when I ran for Indy City-County Council, a strong coalition of grassroots support is key to getting my team and me through Election Day. Please, will you donate any amount you can spare today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230808_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to

Indianapolis, IN 46260

name: Chris Christie
subject: I just met with Zelensky...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS CHRISTIE FOR PRESIDENT, INC
body:
I can't believe what Putin is doing.| | | I just got back from Ukraine, folks. As I met with local leaders, it really hit home just how much devastation and pain has been wrought on the Ukrainian people by Vladimir Putin.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=168948efe6d74cf8a808d870d14b3a78&_e=kXhys4lUwE7TvJtIY0WhhKIn3EAIC05iPoXcft8c1MLlA_8bIZVUPjgAvd0b_EZzAyGkGq4C2qBIY756vOZmknrUpLDVrQOHQ_We6tC48XXRA09s5H9fYQ_iUUAB_fdgfHn9umFen1VafQv-eCC_pOSlnIzyOPl2mvyb8TkgdZ7dF6UKpZ__p0cVEmHGnrjMRJoNfBjvMEtMb7rVayOvZRNAwA-p283fimJZVJIsrwiUiLCbtM9yBTmQ9DxZ-gIcT5gfCfh6mYGIwBCj2FMDAw%3D%3D)
---
The truth is that years of failed leadership are responsible for Putin’s reign of terror in Eastern Europe. And it's only going to get worse. He took Crimea under Barack Obama, buddied up to Donald Trump, and knows that Joe Biden can't stop him from committing countless war crimes in Ukraine._ _ **[I want to hear your thoughts on this: Do you think we need a president who will stand strong against Putin and his evil agenda?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=168948efe6d74cf8a808d870d14b3a78&_e=kXhys4lUwE7TvJtIY0WhhFhQS9uxa0k_xCW55xJaiBwNyu-NjRbQb_K6HHWI0Cb6BkV-G1tgKOeUSGN2isYjMS6xxTIIygR9QA6wlru86Oro2YT6bkDazCk4udoGyTKTV8xOWeLrGY0O9BtR56hPoPnuCOOQBIT-iN5I7SE6BAmm_Uajw1Ujy6rC8D53_A__JfsGlMgqvw6IPuqezD7vqVDj3ILdTrjM37bZRfbuk_dRK17tn50fl3hjgttSxeRC0K0L1lKzwPAr6It4UDqJwXzChERcQUjaAE1cH2oq0cicibQPHSFxWoLWXDTFDcG1HA1nXFC8am2gsKnZeLjg3zbdw9emvpw0kg9GyVYo88uz_zT5z4bT4glxSlFMFVbP218wFdx3yBWdvT5xsbpz5YCY2eAhMfXggNB13a2htHK5H_hKl0BjMnm_DrWDx3y_loTpNKe6mXG0DXL8NMjdfHPOkJwHQOEyqFsJhrg6k2BpbferEwYBTVGJ_RqPLOGsP01MMxNO9YuxBWXy8M2rGxv36bUdTPJTtcWWecrJ1e-xvYVR206omRIVXWQ22MOgjLvT7GZa8YdYK1zbTtGLlc6MEYDguKaRbF8UPrPIJ6_Z_z_pctO41d7gKsVhOZpYOf6fQ8O7VqP1WxLT416PMZsKq1hwhlEVdfDYexLTm8Z6YhgrbLKvRSwWftmtpzVJR0WQy_pwTx4_qA7SYcGOdG_8s7uik5bbRrpMM36LaWBDwCytDPm4Y9WHY4hTPRsVmi93xa1h6pUga_k1YGrF5TqRLb-d_BO8lII-ATBLvL0EJR7PtvE933iiyJuOAzzh8PwZurrF9XiVw7bgNjCGm7rmvVF1331GMBCY48JiC3gaZjVShdWNvYLeAjaRIIuIPzv-lmMwex0m53BsdtYYH_BfoMa0FV7KnTM9SUUAfaAhzQIEcGD3WXNH_uMHt_1rs9Qh_35WjyiPjFEafQP6SW-0iy3pmo6GS0Qkzh7aUGAUheotjLNVb-cQjwBcY3J4knHsJNav_fEA7qw67H-DXvgQyDH7hjLF9Tqbixqp__w20DJmL1nHIONLLGgYXLZ9LjpoqFCfg9BTOWmhLEsZxWAcOgEAaFaibekxzOEtTJSB5ATbUf5zsWYb52ltytqnUD6vZKgwBi7fEQYz_SIYiMqzLEibXSVueTEmjbJLJkGRq9o2E6K0vysgtL7miFddsjRlYNKmCHQYGckvb8vAiQNwTQaIC-tXzPqZX9w2HURweCpV9sP1BxxTISdunXtNzYGSQNmjUAV5xQybmpyN8Q%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I can't believe what Putin is doing.| | | I just got back from Ukraine, folks. As I met with local leaders, it really hit home just how much devastation and pain has been wrought on the Ukrainian people by Vladimir Putin. The truth is that years of failed leadership are responsible for Putin’s reign of terror in Eastern Europe. And it's only going to get worse. He took Crimea under Barack Obama, buddied up to Donald Trump, and knows that Joe Biden can't stop him from committing countless war crimes in Ukraine. The days of letting Putin walk all over us are over. As president, I won't give Putin an inch . The world is watching, and now more than ever, we need to lead by supporting our allies and sending a message to our adversaries. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Dr. Debby Burnett
subject: Peter, you are so appreciated.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://www.burnettforcolorado.com/ [https://www.burnettforcolorado.com/]
We’ll never be able to address regular folks’ concerns until we elect them to Congress. Our current election systems are dominated by those born with wealth, connections to others with deep pockets, and the ability to afford full-time political candidacy.
Peter, I was raised in Greeley by a stay-at-home mom and a water engineer dad. I’m a mom, a veterinarian, and a small-business owner. My family cannot make ends meet without my paycheck, and running for Congress isn’t something you can do part time — especially if you aren’t wealthy.
As frustrating as it is to say this, I can’t see a path forward for my candidacy under our current system. I’ve made the difficult decision to withdraw from the race for Colorado’s Third Congressional District.
I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who worked with me to help us get this far. To everyone who gave what they could of their hard-earned money, worked on our team, pitched in as a volunteer, or shared kind words of encouragement, please know that your support continues to mean the world to me. You are so appreciated.
Growing up in a Democratic household, I cast my first vote as an 18-year-old against the construction of a new shopping center that was wrong for our town — and I’ve done my best to fight for what’s right ever since.
Lauren Boebert is wrong for Western and Southern Colorado. She’s more concerned with building her extremist brand and prepping for her next right-wing media appearance than doing her job and addressing the needs of her constituents.
From accessing safe abortions and protecting our vital natural resources to keeping our kids safe in schools and defending our democracy, there’s too much on the line to let Lauren Boebert win again. I’m urging the remaining candidates in this race: Please put in the work to understand the needs of working-class and rural Coloradans so we can finally fire Lauren Boebert once and for all and elect a representative who will get results for the people.
In solidarity,
Debby
Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
Burnett for Colorado
PO Box 1761
Gunnison, CO 81230
United States

Hi friends, Today's a very important day in our household: It's the first lady's birthday. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67789749/420855311/-1171116802?ms=EM_FL_WES_20230808_pt_dawnbday_cand_mf_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg2NTY0MC0yODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XurmRKVQfee70mshqQHJ280U9H3spNqt5fjnBKaJY3k=&emci=bdd307a7-1e36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e865640-2836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
If I wrote out every amazing quality Dawn has, I'd never stop. She is my fuel, my motivation, and my greatest protector.
To be at her side in life is a privilege. To parent our two amazing kids together is humbling. And I can truly think of no one better to be first lady of our diverse, beautiful state.
I won't lie that it's a bit hard to top Dawn's celebration at Beyoncé's concert this weekend. **But I also know it would mean so much for her to hear from the folks of Maryland today.**
**[So will you help me celebrate the love of my life's birthday by signing her birthday card? I can't think of a better way to celebrate the amazing partner, mom, friend, and first lady she is than with all of you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67789750/420855312/-1171116802?ms=EM_FL_WES_20230808_pt_dawnbday_cand_mf_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg2NTY0MC0yODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XurmRKVQfee70mshqQHJ280U9H3spNqt5fjnBKaJY3k=&emci=bdd307a7-1e36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e865640-2836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67789751/420855313/-1171116802?ms=EM_FL_WES_20230808_pt_dawnbday_cand_mf_180da_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg2NTY0MC0yODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XurmRKVQfee70mshqQHJ280U9H3spNqt5fjnBKaJY3k=&emci=bdd307a7-1e36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e865640-2836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)

Wes

That’s why our friends at One Person, One Vote have fought hard to get the vote out to defend direct democracy and the right to choose. If you or someone you know is an Ohio voter, make sure to get out to your polling place today and vote NO on Issue 1. **Unsure where to vote?[Check the Secretary of State’s website here and be sure to show up on time before the polls close.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67789739/420855297/1652841836?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjg2NTY0MC0yODM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGgQ7Gd3p85K5Y43Ozw_O4tu80etuQ7pWsRMo0tZA7w=&emci=6685ad2f-2036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0f865640-2836-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=561582)** Thanks for being in this fight with us, FP Team

clean_body: Everything you need to know before the polls close >> | | This is it, team. Today, Ohioans are heading to their polling places to vote in one of the most important special elections this year. What happens today will chart the course for direct democracy not only in the Buckeye State, but across the country. That’s why our friends at One Person, One Vote have fought hard to get the vote out to defend direct democracy and the right to choose. If you or someone you know is an Ohio voter, make sure to get out to your polling place today and vote NO on Issue 1. Unsure where to vote? Thanks for being in this fight with us, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: CADEM
subject: You're Invited: “Cafecito VOTA” on Saturday, August 19 from 1:30PM - 2:30PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
Democrats,
The Central Valley is my home. Raised by my grandmother and mother, both two strong women, I learned the value of hard work and determination and eventually became the first in my family to graduate from UCLA. Now, as the first Latina Organizing Director for CADEM, I am honored to work with our vibrant Latino community that strengthens the Democratic Party.
Field organizing in the Central Valley will be crucial in the 2024 elections where Latino voters play a pivotal role in determining the outcomes of key House races that impact the leadership of our country. It is our responsibility to invest early in our targeted regions, engage with communities and get voters to the polls in November 2024.
To achieve this, CADEM is proud to announce our VOTA program that will launch in the Fall of 2023 and focus on Latino outreach and organizing in key regions of California.
Join us for “Cafecito VOTA” during this year's Executive Board Meeting in Visalia. The kick-off event features esteemed panelists and moderators, including Assemblymember Esmeralda Soria, Bakersfield City Councilmember Eric Arias, CADEM Organizing Director Cassandra Chavez, and CADEM Executive Director Yvette Martinez.
Cafecito
Date: Saturday, August 19
Time: 1:30PM - 2:30PM
Room: Charter Oak A
RSVP TODAY [cadem.org/cafecito]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5153646B75396C4E35496D7A436770436C77466A5655652B6979463849642F4A414B5175736842302B48536650697743725A3170792B44575A724C6F50366B44/editor_images/CafecitoVotaFlierAug8.png]
See you there,
Cassandra Chavez,
Organizing Director,
CADEM

| Hey Peter,

It’s Susan Wild, Democrat running for reelection in Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District.

Even though the election seems far away, there's still a substantial amount of work ahead of us to raise enough resources, build a winning campaign, and win back our House majority in 2024.

**This begins by listening to supporters like you, Peter. Your input is crucial in devising a winning strategy for this highly competitive seat.**

While it's impossible to personally meet every voter in PA-07, I still want to hear from my supporters and understand what issues matter most. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We have no other option.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we need you
to see this headline 😱

[1]Headline: GOP megadonor gives $1m to AIPAC SuperPAC, likely to fuel
friction with Democrats

We just found out that GOP billionaire donor Bernie Marcus gave AIPAC $1
million dollars in May. This right-wing billionaire is radically
anti-union and has funded one of the major efforts to legally challenge
student debt cancellation.

Bernie Marcus was also a Donald Trump supporter and donor in 2016! AIPAC
and their billionaire donors will stop at nothing to tear down our work
and challenge our candidates because they’re terrified of the leaders
we’ve helped get elected who stand up and speak out for Palestinian human
rights.

We need your help to fight back,
Peter. Moderate PAC has already
pledged to spend $20 million against us and now a major GOP billionaire
just made this huge contribution to AIPAC.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136854?refcode=em20230808-30277&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY ]Will you help us fight back against this GOP billionaire donor by
rushing a $3 contribution right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136854?refcode=em20230808-30277&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY ]Donate $3

We have no other option but to fight back against groups like AIPAC who
continue to go after our incumbents when they stand for crucial issues
like Palestinian human rights. The way we do that is by recruiting and
electing even more progressive leaders.

When we each chip in and stand up for what we believe in, our movement is
powerful.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136854?refcode=em20230808-30277&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY ]Will you do your part and make a $3 donation right now
to help support our work fight back against AIPAC and this GOP
billionaire?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230808-30277-footer&t=1024&refcode2=30277_1203867_kfRJvY&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=30277%2E1203867%2EkfRJvY

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: A crucial first step to ending voter disenfranchisement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Equal access to the ballot box is an indisputable right of citizenship. But for far too long, our country has weaponized incarceration status and permanently denied voting rights to those with criminal convictions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67789929/420855955/-344990004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230808-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ1Y2EwYy0yOTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNSCc9AbPE8-gX-q7Mm3XIcWGLh-BivbZ8CQziTn7qY=)
---
| Peter,

Last month, I joined my Democratic colleagues in introducing the Democracy Restoration Act – a historic legislation that would restore voting rights nationwide to individuals with criminal convictions.

**_Equal access to the ballot box is an indisputable right of citizenship._** But for far too long, our country has weaponized incarceration status and permanently denied voting rights to those with criminal convictions.

Our prison population disproportionately impacts people of color, and Black adults are five times more likely to be incarcerated. It’s clear that stripping voting rights from those with criminal convictions is a remnant of Jim Crow-era voting bans aimed at disenfranchising communities of color, and it must end.

The Democracy Restoration Act is a crucial first step in combatting voter disenfranchisement. As Republican legislatures move to make it harder to vote, we must ensure our voting rights are ironclad.

I will never stop fighting to protect our fundamental right to vote. I will not hesitate to fight back against the Republican party’s regressive policies. But to do it, Peter, I need your help in this fight. [_**Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help pass critical legislation like the Democracy Restoration Act, protect our voting rights, and fight back against Republican extremism?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67789930/420855956/-344990004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230808-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ1Y2EwYy0yOTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNSCc9AbPE8-gX-q7Mm3XIcWGLh-BivbZ8CQziTn7qY=)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We'll quickly explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Grassroots donors just like you power our campaign.
#
Derek, we're sure you're busy -- so let us quickly explain why we're reaching out with this message + **[asking for your contribution to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230808-1?refcode=em20230808-1-8496&refcode2=8496_434096_Wzkst1&akid=8496%2E434096%2EWzkst1)**
Grassroots donors just like you power our campaign and were how we flipped PA blue 🔵 and sent John to the Senate. **We seriously couldn't have done it without your help.**
But the work isn't letting up, and there are big fights on the horizon. The GOP is gearing up to cut programs like Medicare and Social Security that help working folks make ends meet. They're coming for abortion rights at the national and state level. **And right-wing commentators are *still* making personal attacks against John and his family.**
John is up for this fight, but he needs each of us in his corner. **[If you're able to, we hope you'll consider donating $5 to keep up the fight and power John's work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230808-1?refcode=em20230808-1-8496&refcode2=8496_434096_Wzkst1&akid=8496%2E434096%2EWzkst1)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230808-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230808-8496&refcode2=8496_434096_Wzkst1&akid=8496%2E434096%2EWzkst1)**
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!
Together,
💛 Team Fetterman

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Todd Rokita Just Said That
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, **** Attorney General Todd Rokita today called the separation of church and state a “myth”. We cannot have an attorney general that does not respect the First Amendment and the fundamental freedoms of Hoosiers. Todd Rokita and his culture war agenda is an embarrassment for Indiana. [**We can work to defeat Todd Rokita next year, but only if we have a strong grassroots movement across the state. Chip in now to help us send Rokita packing in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790161/420857090/405560545?refcode=230808-Rokita&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNkMTg1Ny0yYTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mXi6Ndcf1vGvnyQtdPZG_Ze5KPOYVJUKmHSDqKR-yLo=) As we see each day, Indiana has pressing issues that we must address. We need an attorney general that takes our teacher shortage seriously, and treats educators with the respect they deserve as professionals, not one that denies the law. Peter,

I’m running for Governor of North Carolina for one reason: to serve my country.

After a career as a pastor, I know the first thing that comes from a good leader is the ability to listen. Which is why I’m coming to you today.

[**Would you spare a moment to provide input on what matters most to you?**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9f68c4fe411941b7a2930add7bdb910e&_e=GCo7kl9MQ3LN_vA2J-WP6zjQeBxsRK3xrpOL2Y_UP9a59a3Wm6vDe3rOSVmKGHmMcW89Rq0F46-oDK9ke_BRgakBiOw6zkmWPpOxqLgoIN5ulOSGSttOmr1IfDXYemNuJn_CIzBaZSmBgpj93SelYJvVZm8ruZbYSO8tLr3C_MxpwRfa_0G8vMOmuF1phHb4-1lvWHRrfMm3wm1WySh7P4c2Mm8txiiSKCd0dv9zzsUHfQ8qNAMXnJx7HHop2ub2Ms92BIlkvvxI5yhGmjN6e1qFwKAgqE_jF4zLeY_y7TDtd_C6dufL9nySgzgXJ7rgjxXhJkbFKO27Fx_F-fWF_ipkhUfc_W8V2MMCkiewv7nueTxaU_IAzSvZrkPZLwvapfbK0eFZYa7vlJb3cUlGb3-fLLAwgNeaU1Eso4Ygnkvh8F1WeMot-emyEBF73jZBHeoNELM0kRmC_pi433DIQQQVri_BTGVGUvm6VkTk-bldAIvR6SMRElqUz7jrFByz)

[** LAUNCH PRIORITY SURVEY **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9f68c4fe411941b7a2930add7bdb910e&_e=GCo7kl9MQ3LN_vA2J-WP6zjQeBxsRK3xrpOL2Y_UP9a59a3Wm6vDe3rOSVmKGHmMcW89Rq0F46-oDK9ke_BRgakBiOw6zkmWPpOxqLgoIN5ulOSGSttOmr1IfDXYemNuJn_CIzBaZSmBgpj93SelYJvVZm8ruZbYSO8tLr3C_MxpwRfa_0G8vMOmuF1phHb4-1lvWHRrfMm3wm1WySh7P4c2Mm8txiiSKCd0dv9zzsUHfQ8qNAMXnJx7HHop2ub2Ms92BIlkvvxI5yhGmjN6e1qFwKAgqE_jF4zLeY_y7TDtd_C6dufL9nySgzgXJ7rgjxXhJkbFKO27Fx_F-fWF_sRbeGF4cEo_24vCSzdJ79ulEqAS7_cuFzPsunwdRS0wOg8ZbPEfKgHZmbr3BmHa2lUmimb5kYBG_lE4gQr58Pemr45_g9yS3M6hh99ZxLp5lvOohctMcURbiht7vnyQxfBP3Ar8jGqJInxyRahqqrh-ib7Uu5Lw-fRBA_Aah7qT)

Supporters like you are the only reason I’ve gotten this far, _which is why I want to hear from you directly._

[**Please, share your two cents so I can focus on the issues that mean the most to you.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9f68c4fe411941b7a2930add7bdb910e&_e=GCo7kl9MQ3LN_vA2J-WP6zjQeBxsRK3xrpOL2Y_UP9a59a3Wm6vDe3rOSVmKGHmMcW89Rq0F46-oDK9ke_BRgakBiOw6zkmWPpOxqLgoIN5ulOSGSttOmr1IfDXYemNuJn_CIzBaZSmBgpj93SelYJvVZm8ruZbYSO8tLr3C_MxpwRfa_0G8vMOmuF1phHb4-1lvWHRrfMm3wm1WySh7P4c2Mm8txiiSKCd0dv9zzsUHfQ8qNAMXnJx7HHop2ub2Ms92BIlkvvxI5yhGmjN6e1qFwKAgqE_jF4zLeY_y7TDtd_C6dufL9nySgzgXJ7rgjxXhJkbFKO27Fx_F-fWF_qdArT4_nhP2z-xWKLm8tdcgD7ho80IprQUE3OjaS7SLzQB8Gtltvsy4_1LHE1jXYSbDHmYX4BywQYZxZzJZJdeMcHEKcEUKYrEn-MgWsxXew_pPBE3C5QVxomcDrM-aLKXlRbE-6bMlDu-JVHu-_n7y5ipAd2PbSJoHhCiUw88r)

Thank you,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

Friends —
Since Robert was sworn into Congress, he has made one priority very clear: holding lawmakers publicly accountable. And that includes Q-Anon extremist Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Over the year, Robert has not been shy about responding to Marjorie Taylor Greene’s anti-democratic, homophobic, and racist remarks. Just take a look:
Earlier this year, when Marjorie Taylor Greene, a sitting member of Congress, suggested a red state secession, Robert was quick to call her out.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790362/420857800/1133484937?refcode2=9db464f9-2b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=em230808-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGI0NjRmOS0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WqfQoC1rGl4MvQa-DXswSvUSqzPWcVvXr44BLZJ8w=)
During a House hearing in April, Marjorie Taylor Greene told the president of the American Federation of Teachers that being a mother by marriage does not qualify her as a mother.
To disparage mothers across the country who do not have biological children — including adoptive mothers or parents through marriage — is disgusting and shameful. And Robert immediately shut down that kind of inappropriate rhetoric during the hearing and on the House floor.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790363/420857801/1133484937?refcode2=9db464f9-2b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=em230808-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGI0NjRmOS0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WqfQoC1rGl4MvQa-DXswSvUSqzPWcVvXr44BLZJ8w=)
And to this day, she continues to be a danger to our democracy as she attempts to undermine our Justice Department, a foundation of our democracy, to protect her fellow extremist buddies.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790364/420857802/1133484937?refcode2=9db464f9-2b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&refcode=em230808-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGI0NjRmOS0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_WqfQoC1rGl4MvQa-DXswSvUSqzPWcVvXr44BLZJ8w=)
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s thrives on hatred and division, messages that go against our democracy itself. She is dangerous. But not once has Robert shied away from holding her accountable.
But the reality is going to bat against the far-right is not an easy job. MTG has millions of dollars in MAGA money behind her, fueling her campaign and motivating her to continue her horrific antics and spread hatred.
And Robert holding her accountable makes him a prime GOP target.
