name: Fair Fight
subject: James was purged from the voter rolls in 2017. Read his story.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Ahead of the 2024 election cycle, Brad Raffensperger is working to cancel over 191,000 voters’ registrations. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790353/420857789/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230808_f_voterpurge4_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y5MTJlNy0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YE7NW4H_s6UY430m2sUP3do27CenXKQrOVlKWSAWDU8=&emci=d0568876-2b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9cf912e7-2b36-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | **Voters like James are why we continue fighting to protect the freedom to vote.** In 2018, James decided to cast his vote for Stacey Abrams in the neck-and-neck race for Governor of Georgia. This candidate and this race felt different to him — he was excited about Stacey Abrams and felt motivated to elect a leader who vowed to be a people’s governor. The last time he voted was in 2008, when he felt a similar drive to elect Barack Obama as our next president. He drove to the same polling location in suburban Atlanta where he’d last voted, along with his mother and brother. When he got to the front of the line, an issue came up: Poll workers couldn’t find James in their database of registered voters. He waited for about 45 minutes while poll workers urgently looked to locate his registration. When they couldn’t, he filled out a provisional ballot. Thousands of other Georgians would find themselves in the same situation in the 2018 election, and about 75 percent of those provisional ballots would later be rejected. After James did some research, he learned that in July 2017, then Secretary of State Brian Kemp removed about 560,000 voters from the rolls overnight, with over 100,000 of those voters being marked as “inactive” as a result of the state’s “use it or lose it” policy. They hadn’t moved, died, or been incarcerated — they just didn’t vote in every single election. At the time, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that Kemp’s voter purge may be the largest mass voter disenfranchisement in U.S. history. Since then, Georgia Republicans have continued to stage mass voter purges in every election off-year. **In fact, this is happening right now as you read this: Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is working to cancel over 191,000 voters’ registrations ahead of the critical 2024 election cycle. Over 51% of voters on the “purge” list are people of color.** This is one of the core reasons why Fair Fight was founded — and why we need your continued support. We’re currently calling and texting impacted voters to notify them of this purge and help them maintain their registrations before the August 13 deadline. [_**On behalf of James, and every voter who has been unjustly denied access to the ballot box in Georgia, will you make a donation to our Prevent the Purge Fund today? Donations will help reach impacted voters ahead of the August 13 deadline, and help mitigate the impacts of mass voter purges in the future.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790355/420857791/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230808_f_voterpurge4_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y5MTJlNy0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YE7NW4H_s6UY430m2sUP3do27CenXKQrOVlKWSAWDU8=) | [ DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67790356/420857792/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230808_f_voterpurge4_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y5MTJlNy0yYjM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YE7NW4H_s6UY430m2sUP3do27CenXKQrOVlKWSAWDU8=)
---
Thanks for everything,
The Fair Fight Team

subject: Help me surprise Vivek 🎂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:

My name is Apoorva, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy's wife.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team AOC
subject: Over $11 million against Alexandria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s why your donation today would mean so much
#
We wanted to take a moment to explain why your contribution today would mean so much to our campaign to re-elect Alexandria:
1. November 5, 2024 might sound far away but our campaign organizes and operates year-round. We’re investing in deep organizing — both locally and nationally — to build long-term organizing power with our neighbors and allies.
2. Alexandria’s Republican opponent spent over $11 million dollars to try and stop our movement in 2020. We have to be prepared for millions more to be spent against us again this election.
3. Alexandria is constantly the target of vitriolic campaigns from Fox News and other right-wing media outlets. Your contribution will help us counter these attacks by getting her real message for a better world out over the constant stream of disinformation.

**Alexandria doesn’t accept a single dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists.** Instead, we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to donate what they can, when they can.
Our fundraising has been a bit slower so far this month than in July, but there’s no reason to panic. [If you can afford it, will you contribute $5 to help sustain this movement for the long term and make sure we have the resources to re-elect Alexandria?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023808.XKYOfA&refcode=em20230808-4768-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023808.XKYOfA&refcode=em20230808-4768-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)**
We completely understand that not every person can donate to every email we send. No matter if you can donate today or not: thank you for being a part of this movement for economic, environmental, racial, and social justice for all.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-2023808?refcode=em20230808-4768-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=21&refcode2=4768_2526796_USooRn&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230808-4768-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4768%2E2526796%2EUSooRn)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] UNTIL POLLS CLOSE IN OHIO! RUSH $10 NOW >> () Peter Willis, Diane Morgan here, National Mobilization Coordinator for Our Revolution. I’m writing to you from my home state of Ohio — where we have 48 hours to win a crucial fight against anti-abortion extremists. Will you rush a contribution of 10 right now so we can mobilize our supporters and defeat this right-wing attack? () FIGHT BACK >> () Right now in Ohio, anti-abortion politicians and their billionaire backers are trying to change the state constitution in order to block a November ballot measure to protect abortion rights — and the mainstream media isn’t paying any attention. The vast majority of my fellow Ohioans oppose our state’s draconian abortion ban, but that hasn’t stopped our opponents from spending MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars to call a special election to try to change the rules. They’ve intentionally called this special election for this Tuesday, in the dead of summer — in the hopes that nobody is paying attention, because they know that their extremist, anti-abortion views won’t win if a majority of Ohioans turn out to vote. Now it’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it. We’re on the ground turning out voters, but it’s going to take a MASSIVE PUSH in these last 48 hours to win this fight. That’s why we’re counting on you to chip in $10 or more today to get us over the finish line >> () If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. CHIP IN $10 NOW » () CHIP IN $27 NOW » () CHIP IN $50 NOW » () CHIP IN $100 NOW » () CHIP IN $250 NOW » () CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » () Here’s the thing, Peter Willis: If these right-wing extremists win the day in Ohio, they won’t stop. They’ll report back to their billionaire donors and ask for more money to fund their new template to tear down democracy and abortion care in other states. The buck stops here. It’s up to us to win this fight and show anti-abortion extremists across the whole country that there is unified, mobilized opposition wherever they go. Will you chip in $10 or more to stand with us in this fight today? ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | We know you missed the first reason, but now you can get the first TWO. | DEADLINE EXTENSION: You missed the #1 reason Donald Trump is afraid to take the Presidential Debate Stage, Friend. | Reason #3 will be on its way soon... Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. TELLITLIKEITISPAC.COM]() Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible. Tell It Like It Is ALERTS 3804 Wilson Blvd, Arlington, VA 22203 \- =

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-wTypBECiOkyKHc0AdSo2lAMYYrVwvyEvgdXYnCIeSmlK8iZfn2WMxN4V1EySTP6nx5tHz7FzKwaBrwHN_f7pozElSlXnXiGEev9Nm4_q9D_bv3x4VvI-6w4pjF2vYV6cNt4gaVij2wgnGepwaidov0%3D)
| **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-wbHP_chA5ef1YPbMj1WmJSbsLa8U20JWJpG-NkcmAD-GA2yQVBda9s5rhX99SGHA7HVVnNn4HiwWTArTGPgarS9Slfc1jpcpr4cRs0UtpnoimyQZZ0vxt4zCUcXmz_OUy8Zz_e_OkLd5dJor0hXd94%3D)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-6y5JMZV7mYYjBYwtLzS78JgQHSc0fjlkA_JArJLetZkdnR3VutNKdNNqHiEKl3WQJTAh3Z7rvsVU0wE252Kmj9FbzY4-Af_mViASJWvwPjw9IKMRjr2YeSiAF67YxrJa30eMVwZWVa5_p85PcoRBgU%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, **[yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-3Dq_3VLGwNypGVWIGF8IbzEfNctbjw0DYOdEqre0mDdh95ilvmPtrPXJFc9c3MOlmnMk96eqWspOCAYlsgm7GRwORoBFu8W95nkIKB9oZmjupEOA1e2_5b5P5JViDDn3HwgdglWGNEA3otlTItr0Gc%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $23](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-7lJT1PZHedSefbOdtxEzPyY8Gi3mWNJoIQuRA-r5NiFXQ54tp4KjKqRrp0lnd0EYuN2r0Y7UVciZVlAmksmFDPOZDvmvO--pfTfce48vAwAepf1yb5wH3es1d2rAKxwa_r8tBBcYxG1Et7ZFq8-hSE%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-23RyCI45Chg0UUEwUVvQNfrq5jlsxdLGsfNsf7KeiuUlGTVQTo4-qoEL6OcMxoVfjx_zbseUi8_IQbWsd04I03dX3j7cfEPqBXuuN0OtZj6JehXiLiuv7ZMXbMDO_zkS5-b_z7g5d_TjKLv1R1_tVc%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our 5-seat House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the July average of $23, every contribution counts](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-whkUg88Y9C8GcSRBG76BnF8JgCnbdvqkkYxXwj0P-vbrqfTO0UEh2lxhJLqiS7M9eP3p-P69Cuqzp4QGMr5gylUWZ8irk46MB3vqDApI8rAIcruuIxwPQvqRerCievrP_E_8hp1jIYfZ0cKI1sA4XA%3D)** - every single contribution matters.

**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=254bef47d3f14dbcaeee16fea9c99996&_e=WV6_rUZY16KAhMRk3VOIC9S-xFXM_WXVdcq64yIXTBE_8AS4ygBJRK5m-hBaMczK9RS5XbtEWxz0rGWbv_diAfMr2Nmxu7WN1Jgd7qUm1Jq5GLdTQVtbiQhGBO7or1cpqT6jDA2BzGeIFBlFdMNs3Kg2RpvrGpy1fH9iFqIla6spF2_5D02flmEYim3kqKud904q_xpvmBAeaL3kygb35m3vwJ-SkKWa3O4wdLPGTIW0UM-nam4SyNVrNec5ZkyMoXw5hyOg8FEJF7_O0kqm-yGaD1Qm3dpoVWkf-byI6ZRR8JuTBByO7oLZTR88WZQEpEkbEo2N10vmhmK01JJxQbIEPXPrkdIstwHEvoIRuS-Aw8w7n4oF4uysenTui8lPPQBw2S7W10uPhAkP0djsUJpajRm1PjfN6glQAbyW3NA%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Andrew (Fair Courts America)
subject: How Hunter Biden *almost* got off…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
This is the REAL reason Hunter’s sweetheart plea deal blew up... | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fb00d823b7a240598db88e6a339f53b1&_e=Mrnk9O7DVAYbjRC2Geot4hWz-kEmW9y0NdQZoQSQMIGpBIFGDRc0YaynLZPYfzhBj2u43jioVeC10LcDAOqraIMi0TQYWk7GwXq5VG95qF3i8zNj4KvEK0JJ8QBZaZUB97ytv_UMD75uzj_risHnCQDzhWab2viHchrn7JvBPc-ZUXl_-lv3EgFSBokAI4VcZMifd7EiMHanYrqU4luw1r73AMUW_bd-dP9qTE4vewKXUQVHYIpjTI8xtIH4T3lmUIYC1KIyNXihPo8UxY9zQW-k8AoVL2amvbJS2Vaxyj9tq6QjJ2TgVeYKAH0Uf0BUJMn_iXqei9HjmT3We1rCcB2rT5RVV2sxXNz-xxc13uHCRlR56BZcRfg1leRNA3IA7cBR3LjAb1uflLdXiSerCw%3D%3D)
---
_How do we know the judiciary is so important?_**One brave, honest judge stood for the Constitution and sunk Hunter Biden’s sweetheart plea deal.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR OUR JUDICIARY WITH US**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fb00d823b7a240598db88e6a339f53b1&_e=Mrnk9O7DVAYbjRC2Geot4hWz-kEmW9y0NdQZoQSQMIGpBIFGDRc0YaynLZPYfzhBj2u43jioVeC10LcDAOqraIMi0TQYWk7GwXq5VG95qF3i8zNj4KvEK0JJ8QBZaZUB97ytv_UMD75uzj_risHnCQDzhWab2viHchrn7JvBPc-ZUXl_-lv3EgFSBokAI4VcZMifd7EiMHanYrqU4luw1r73AMUW_bd-dP9qTE4vewKXUQVHYIpjTI8xtIH4T3lm5ELGLoMMVKc4p7yaywnX8T7VCy9TK3pVIDQLzJ9z0PV2hygExi9sh8rS9SW1gM1BVMMqWeqImFfsyzl--xvsJ_1xIoigo0EyU2lLr5ZpxNw65E1hz5__sbrj4TgMnHTsIfL7lA5TCReUptvTzzlWJw%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, Not a soul alive believes Hunter Biden is a model citizen. Between his gun charges, known drug habit, and foreign influence peddling, the president’s son can’t seem to stay on the straight and narrow. **So why did the DOJ offer Hunter Biden a sweetheart plea deal that promised a broad grant of immunity for unspecified “other” charges if he just pled guilty to the two tiny tax misdemeanors?** _The DOJ did not want to embarrass the White House with Hunter’s legal troubles._ So, they tipped the scales of justice in his favor. **And they would have gotten away with it, too, if it weren’t for****one honest judge****.**
Judge Maryellen Noreika ripped that sweetheart plea deal apart. She read all the documents deeply and sniffed out the hidden protections buried in Hunter’s plea deal. _And then she threw the plea deal out the window!_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fb00d823b7a240598db88e6a339f53b1&_e=Mrnk9O7DVAYbjRC2Geot4hWz-kEmW9y0NdQZoQSQMIGpBIFGDRc0YaynLZPYfzhBj2u43jioVeC10LcDAOqraIMi0TQYWk7GwXq5VG95qF3i8zNj4KvEK0JJ8QBZaZUB97ytv_UMD75uzj_risHnCQDzhWab2viHchrn7JvBPc-ZUXl_-lv3EgFSBokAI4VcZMifd7EiMHanYrqU4luw1r73AMUW_bd-dP9qTE4vewKXUQVHYIpjTI8xtIH4T3lm2Q3BaIUlN6T1D2ELGs9vpDlH7oMbWa76whHDZ5puV2rVSVbIrYNDWYcQh8K3bZq1K1t_4tc50wvCr7MgKYyfIuJ3LT8EPJYwx8s1HtoyfQMbaRay3KIAO78K9eJ0o9Xe6c2elxAXv3TNyUJ2V7Mq7Q%3D%3D)
---
If the left has a prosecutor unwilling to enforce the law and enact an arguably illegal and unconstitutional plea deal, Judge Maryellen Noreika is the kind of person we need on the bench to protect and preserve the rule of law. **This story perfectly illustrates why our organization,[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fb00d823b7a240598db88e6a339f53b1&_e=Mrnk9O7DVAYbjRC2Geot4hWz-kEmW9y0NdQZoQSQMIGpBIFGDRc0YaynLZPYfzhBj2u43jioVeC10LcDAOqraIMi0TQYWk7GwXq5VG95qF3i8zNj4KvEK0JJ8QBZaZUB97ytv_UMD75uzj_risHnCQDzhWab2viHchrn7JvBPc-ZUXl_-lv3EgFSBokAI4VcZMifd7EiMHanYrqU4luw1r73AMUW_bd-dP9qTE4vewKXUQVHYIpjTI8xtIH4T3lm__ACcIDMzYxx4FBt9VcPAKVQ9qgRZbiK_vY4F_liiZ0h63-UMKpo3QdShggOy8NmOvfHDiB73U2sSRxE0wnL5aRClqkoB1NzBnHMm5jeSxvBqv8ohP0Gtc33wqUjLSKve0Xftr2awXun5NMzbf8H6Q%3D%3D)****, exists. ** _We fight to get good judges and prosecutors elected to ensure that people pay the price of committing crimes — no matter who their father is._ That’s what the rule of law is all about. And that’s what America is all about. **We’re working hard now to secure solid judges and prosecutors in races across America—and we want you on our team. Want to join us in the fight for free & fair courts?**
---

clean_body: This is the REAL reason Hunter’s sweetheart plea deal blew up... | | | How do we know the judiciary is so important?One brave, honest judge stood for the Constitution and sunk Hunter Biden’s sweetheart plea deal. | | Peter, Not a soul alive believes Hunter Biden is a model citizen. Between his gun charges, known drug habit, and foreign influence peddling, the president’s son can’t seem to stay on the straight and narrow. So why did the DOJ offer Hunter Biden a sweetheart plea deal that promised a broad grant of immunity for unspecified “other” charges if he just pled guilty to the two tiny tax misdemeanors? The DOJ did not want to embarrass the White House with Hunter’s legal troubles. So, they tipped the scales of justice in his favor. And they would have gotten away with it, too, if it weren’t forone honest judge. Judge Maryellen Noreika ripped that sweetheart plea deal apart. She read all the documents deeply and sniffed out the hidden protections buried in Hunter’s plea deal. And then she threw the plea deal out the window! If the left has a prosecutor unwilling to enforce the law and enact an arguably illegal and unconstitutional plea deal, Judge Maryellen Noreika is the kind of person we need on the bench to protect and preserve the rule of law. This story perfectly illustrates why our organization,, exists. We fight to get good judges and prosecutors elected to ensure that people pay the price of committing crimes — no matter who their father is. That’s what the rule of law is all about. And that’s what America is all about. We’re working hard now to secure solid judges and prosecutors in races across America—and we want you on our team. Want to join us in the fight for free & fair courts? Thank you, Andrew Wynne Executive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Friend — As a labor advocate and trade unionist her entire career, Nikki came to Congress to strengthen unions, protect the rights of workers and invest in career and technical education opportunities. Every single day, she works across the aisle to expand opportunities for the thousands of working families she represents in Central and Southern Illinois, and at the end of last month, she was proud to introduce the _Tools Tax Deduction Act of 2023_ — bipartisan legislation to make it easier for apprenticeship employees and construction workers to afford their equipment. The upfront cost of buying tools has deterred too many folks from pursuing careers in the building trades, and as we work to expand access to good-paying union jobs, ensuring folks can afford the equipment they need to succeed is critical. **[We need to have Nikki’s back as she works across the aisle to stand up for working folks. name: Team Becca
subject: July was the hottest month on record.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

Now more than ever, we need a united, 50-state solution to fight the climate crisis.

That’s no longer the reality — we’re seeing the impacts of climate change _right here, right now._ >From record-breaking temperatures to devastating storms like the ones we saw right here in Vermont, the consequences of climate change are here. We’re one month away from sending our kids back to school and I hope you took advantage of all that our great state had to offer! And now that we have an entire fundraising quarter under our belt, we know where our strengths are, and that is with our grassroots donor base.Our numbers compared to John James may seem little, but at the end of the day - we received thousands of new contributions, and most of our donations were small dollar donations. Only 12% of John James’ donors were grassroots supporters. I’m so proud of that.Now, as we head toward fall and really shift this campaign into gear, I need you by my side more than ever before. **[Can you add another donation to our growing grassroots momentum?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=03f8d25808c74d81bce7d568d89834a8&_e=XbwUo4AzVgvfJqai8dwbuthBB5PhtymLnjnfIY9XRKlaPlpo1XC9Ht-yZzsi4VuYVpk9wgTPSh32xV5Sn1R_uTf1DUGGZdx-74ulmbbYFFhyYRKpzWKq2PefTbjomOd48jljUzASALCAu8794S1itAgfuqpLzN-0fM76HTogZkBbWiJAIrjUVT6cOqbnlrRpnU9iOobHNk3hMpz7XN7IOs88EyqsU3IqhmcA6EjMUS1lR19iA_BC6dPUGf7xxcVHj8ATJcwrUNjxpJzGuWwiSNm8axvWyO45xRBEEInPHBnhDaTZIzvXUzHtOR8CLRnU9Hcfpdir3JsH7KffcuzjWJocGNBRYUrqEdfhvD4EdmvJ0ZqpEUk0VeHTcHtUMfE4MUhCx_7itzTUbM8ZyhIcLo8BKjjv02fYsyGlq2vJR0o%3D)** I know things may seem real tough now, and being over a year out from election day, you may want to just tune out anything to do with politics!_But this election is crucial_. We have an opportunity to replace John James, flip the US House, and get to work on critical gun safety legislation to keep our kids safe. We can’t sit on the sidelines this year!**[So, if you can, donate even just $1 today to help us continue to gain the strength needed to flip this seat and oust John James!](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=03f8d25808c74d81bce7d568d89834a8&_e=XbwUo4AzVgvfJqai8dwbuthBB5PhtymLnjnfIY9XRKlaPlpo1XC9Ht-yZzsi4VuYVpk9wgTPSh32xV5Sn1R_uTf1DUGGZdx-74ulmbbYFFhyYRKpzWKq2PefTbjomOd48jljUzASALCAu8794S1itAgfuqpLzN-0fM76HTogZkBbWiJAIrjUVT6cOqbnlrRpnU9iOobHNk3hMpz7XN7IOs88EyqsU3IqhmcA6EjMUS1lR19iA_BC6dPUGf7xxcVHlHiAR_n6CkhS37pBgjbApaNLDWyIsIB8QgzScYw0tko8Ik3IEkc1a4LG8QE0qd9raWNZlJUXAdKIZBmF-k7dL1ce_M2zm8l5NSg2iNRx-YCMYXHn8oPPL874dWVKuy9Zbh8euYSsxBFx4COYtMRSUWoCG59ynbsFJ3c_b3_s81s%3D)** I appreciate you more than you will ever know.– Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-asiyld-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
**Biden Lied** A Gold Star mom **[accused the Biden administration of lying to her about the circumstances of her Marine son's death](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-y/) **in Afghanistan in August 2021. **Chinese Smugglers** Federal authorities are growing **[increasingly concerned about a route Chinese migrants are utilizing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-j/) **to make their way to Florida illegally. **Main Stream Media Ignores Archer Testimony** The four liberal Sunday morning news shows, which historically recapped the biggest political news stories of the week**,[completely avoided the Devon Archer testimony](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-t/).** **If Biden Was an Animal** The New York Times asked readers **[what type of animal Joe Biden would be](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-i/)** , and the answers are brutally honest.

**The Fight Isn't Over Yet** Two think tanks are**[urging a federal court to block the Biden administration's scaled-back plan to cancel $39 billion in student loans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-d/), **arguing that the plan exceeds the administration's authority. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-h/)!**
* So **[dumb](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* **[Load up the truck](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-u/)** , Pa!
* **[Choose Fun](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-p/)**!
* It's **[true](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-asiyld-trhiujldw-x/)!**

name: Deya at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA is under attack
body:
| | | Peter — there’s no way around it: DACA is under attack. DACA recipients have been in a state of legal limbo for years now, going from one court case to another, never knowing if they will lose their work permits and protections from deportations. While the future of DACA may be uncertain as we wait for Judge Hanen’s decision, we haven’t stopped fighting to win permanent protections from elected officials in Washington. It is time for Congress to finally act and provide certainty to ALL 11 million undocumented immigrants. **Rush in a donation to support our fight for permanent protections. Our livelihoods and our futures are in jeopardy as long as the fate of DACA remains in the hands of anti-immigrant courts.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8woUN_Ab65s2rQh9LDLPy4yw2kbh0G90EmZCal6ZYZjnhW74R1-PIHqNw2NGXS0hVC5lo1hfj1lRZcyuQyoSG7LFJJN4_AyvHlqh_AzXRSogl_HeYlVAeEE8sLBGmXJelC_vgupH4sgpeiwwnOd-Sqo0fNat1vXgvunmtrjXwhYdh-hBRo7tBE_gB_vBn9SHdiyUXJElgy1GAF3O3MBnzBw-egmvs3GV-Vxi3Eh53Yt2mk8VacO9-paqjvLpX2qEyNP0hARnbT2oa5By1Qh12b-MVdP3NjHgzM6UQ-rZcTalGUQNIogtVz9eZRAgPBRpjuZ_HuhtgspxkTtZXWMGX9N1W-Wpgkh9xouBrF_A8l7Y/3yk/EbuKveZmS0iIdJttRjoQag/h0/xojQ1RYsmiM3U6DwFL0kMdNwMi2Rd6o53G8KOpwz_Po)

Republicans have been obsessed with ending DACA and deporting hundreds of thousands of immigrants who call our country home. With the future of DACA resting in anti-immigrant Judge Hanen’s court, and Congress refusing to take action, DACA recipients have been left in limbo.
But do you want to know the hard truth? DACA was never and will never be an adequate solution. It was always temporary and left people behind.
The only pathway forward is for leaders like President Biden and members of Congress to take urgent action and push forward a legislative solution for permanent protections.
We refuse to take silence and apathy for an answer. But to keep our political advocacy efforts moving forward at full force, we’ll need the support of allies like you, Peter.
**Make a donation today to support United We Dream Action’s fight for permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people.**

clean_body: | | | Peter — there’s no way around it: DACA is under attack. DACA recipients have been in a state of legal limbo for years now, going from one court case to another, never knowing if they will lose their work permits and protections from deportations. While the future of DACA may be uncertain as we wait for Judge Hanen’s decision, we haven’t stopped fighting to win permanent protections from elected officials in Washington. It is time for Congress to finally act and provide certainty to ALL 11 million undocumented immigrants. Rush in a donation to support our fight for permanent protections. Our livelihoods and our futures are in jeopardy as long as the fate of DACA remains in the hands of anti-immigrant courts. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Republicans have been obsessed with ending DACA and deporting hundreds of thousands of immigrants who call our country home. With the future of DACA resting in anti-immigrant Judge Hanen’s court, and Congress refusing to take action, DACA recipients have been left in limbo. But do you want to know the hard truth? DACA was never and will never be an adequate solution. It was always temporary and left people behind. The only pathway forward is for leaders like President Biden and members of Congress to take urgent action and push forward a legislative solution for permanent protections. We refuse to take silence and apathy for an answer. But to keep our political advocacy efforts moving forward at full force, we’ll need the support of allies like you, Peter. Make a donation today to support United We Dream Action’s fight for permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing in support for our movement, Deya, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Time-Sensitive Signature Request (protectvoting.org)
subject: re: Lauren Boebert’s latest scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need YOUR help to stop her
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51167?t=6&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th) Folks, MAGA Lauren Boebert has been an absolute DISGRACE to our democracy ever since she was elected — **_it’s long past time for her to GO!_**

[**But now, an extremist Republican group is POURING money in to save her vulnerable seat! We REFUSE to let Boebert buy her way to victory, so we’re sending a MASSIVE letter at 8am tomorrow to tell her we’ll NEVER stop fighting to defeat her »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51167?t=7&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th) | [98 SIGNATURE SPOTS REMAINING: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51167?t=8&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th)
---
TO: Rep. Lauren Boebert
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’ll never give up on this fight. **_To MAGA Lauren Boebert — you are a disgrace to our democracy!_**

**Not only did you DENY President Biden’s hard-fought victory in 2020, but you continue to DEFEND Donald Trump’s treasonous crimes.**

_You even said his latest indictment will WIN him the presidency in 2024!_

It’s no wonder you only won your last election by just **_546 votes..._** and now, you’re TIED with Democrat Adam Frisch in the polls. The people are fed up!

**We know you and the GOP are TERRIFIED of losing this seat and your fragile 5-seat House majority!**

[**While you lean on a warchest of dark money to buy your way to reelection victory, we have something you don’t: a grassroots army of strong Democrats ready to defeat you! So today, I’m signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect incredible Democrats like Adam Frisch and kiss your MAGA majority GOODBYE once and for all! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51167?t=9&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51167?t=10&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
Thank you for signing our letter!

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9770%2E878179%2E5Xe0th)
---

They are working overtime on Capitol Hill to expand the market for assault weapons and prevent lawmakers from enacting any safety regulations.

| | I'm running for Arizona's 1st Congressional District because I'm sick and tired of political extremists playing games with the essential functions of government. When Congress returns to session from this August recess, we're going to see a fight over the next government funding bill. **Already, members of the House Freedom Caucus (which my opponent David Schweikert co-founded) are indicating they'll demand harmful cuts to programs that millions of Americans count on — or they'll trigger a government shutdown.** If David Schweikert wants to be serious about putting his constituents first, he needs to denounce the Freedom Caucus and pledge support for a clean government funding bill. **[So I'm asking you to sign my petition and show Schweikert that Arizonans want him to put aside extremist grandstanding. Tell him to do his job and make sure the government stays open!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792150/420864905/-2099903121?contactdata=qHShj5HsHSJL4r5QkBonpX7CVl0yprCgJZo5TndW7JVBZQnp/hOqpkAo+CiW84EaHOnNoHpkdQDES8nEbt0zwkVs2GqJC4CrrXyLO1cNYvYImODxoEG878eaog9rbiOZrf+QUcX9hO7ZYKlkze8Xtuqv5RvvFm67hnjHWNTgJ0Y=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQwYmVjODctMzQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_V2UosRj_CXDHMtjsZq3vSDj8uNZ1aPRyjH0lRBKVz4=&emci=7855745b-2436-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ed0bec87-3436-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491)** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792151/420864906/-2099903121?contactdata=qHShj5HsHSJL4r5QkBonpX7CVl0yprCgJZo5TndW7JVBZQnp/hOqpkAo+CiW84EaHOnNoHpkdQDES8nEbt0zwkVs2GqJC4CrrXyLO1cNYvYImODxoEG878eaog9rbiOZrf+QUcX9hO7ZYKlkze8Xtuqv5RvvFm67hnjHWNTgJ0Y=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQwYmVjODctMzQzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_V2UosRj_CXDHMtjsZq3vSDj8uNZ1aPRyjH0lRBKVz4=&emci=7855745b-2436-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ed0bec87-3436-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491) Government shutdowns harm federal workers (tens of thousands of whom live in Arizona). They end access to national parks and can hit local economies that depend on tourism. And they send a terrible message about the stability of our system. It's simply outrageous to me that members of Congress could casually play games with our government's essential functions. _And to play these games because they want to cut Medicare, Social Security, or food stamps is all the more outrageous._ David Schweikert has voted multiple times before to shut down the government. clean_body: | | | | I'm running for Arizona's 1st Congressional District because I'm sick and tired of political extremists playing games with the essential functions of government. When Congress returns to session from this August recess, we're going to see a fight over the next government funding bill. Already, members of the House Freedom Caucus (which my opponent David Schweikert co-founded) are indicating they'll demand harmful cuts to programs that millions of Americans count on — or they'll trigger a government shutdown. If David Schweikert wants to be serious about putting his constituents first, he needs to denounce the Freedom Caucus and pledge support for a clean government funding bill. Government shutdowns harm federal workers (tens of thousands of whom live in Arizona). They end access to national parks and can hit local economies that depend on tourism. And they send a terrible message about the stability of our system. It's simply outrageous to me that members of Congress could casually play games with our government's essential functions. And to play these games because they want to cut Medicare, Social Security, or food stamps is all the more outrageous. David Schweikert has voted multiple times before to shut down the government. He may not listen to what we tell him today, but we can certainly make it clear that Arizonans are fed up with his schtick and are ready to turn the page in 2024. Together, we can end the insanity and make Congress work again for Arizonans. name: Jon Tester
subject: Can you do this for me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Hey,
I’ll keep this quick.
I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline next week.
National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.
That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $25 between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. Can you chip in today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for everything you do.
—Jon Tester

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792245/420865321/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjgzNDg3MWItMzUzNi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H98pu9G7PUdMRBsFKAYc4rhuV1wki-98CqReKocQVcE=)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our HOT labor summer is proof we need CHANGE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter, temperatures are scorching my home state of California, but workers refuse to wither despite the oppressive heat and the oppressive greed.
They’re taking to the streets to demand fair wages and working conditions in a long overdue surge of labor power.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792250/420865355/2101316952?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230808_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM3Njc1Ny0zNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG_ctMT7LKkRFVE1GFcGizsimB_PV_M7CmiVQvWEL2I=)
Hollywood actors and writers, Amazon drivers, LA city employees, and hotel workers are all on strike, and the list of striking unions is expected to grow as things heat up, quite literally.
**As California shatters temperature records and workers struggle to sustain their families, I’m fighting for liveable wages and a liveable planet. **
[**In Congress, I’ll protect our planet and fight for worker’s rights. Chip in to support my people-powered campaign today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792251/420865356/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230808_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM3Njc1Ny0zNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG_ctMT7LKkRFVE1GFcGizsimB_PV_M7CmiVQvWEL2I=)

Record breaking heat waves caused by man-made climate change are happening simultaneously with labor’s struggle in response to man-made greed.
It’s just another day of hot labor summer!
My opponent Jay Obernolte can’t be a champion for the climate if he’s being funded by fossil fuel magnates, just like he can’t be a fighter for the working class when he votes against protecting workers’ rights to organize.
**It’s a no brainer. Democracy and the promise of America only work if we have a healthy planet and a healthy workforce.**
**[Help me fight back on both fronts! Make a contribution to my campaign today to support my fight for the planet and the people!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67792253/420865358/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230808_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM3Njc1Ny0zNTM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG_ctMT7LKkRFVE1GFcGizsimB_PV_M7CmiVQvWEL2I=)**
In hot labor summer solidarity,
Derek Marshall

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us! | | Will is worried. We are losing the battle to secure our borders, my friend. Texas is experiencing an endless flood of lawlessness and illegal immigrants at our southern border. This crisis is the one that gets the attention of Washington, the press, and most Americans – but there's another border crisis that demands our attention. Our northern border has quietly become a real threat to homeland security. Cartels are using the Northern Border to flood our communities with fentanyl and other dangers. **_Add your name to your growing list of Americans who are concerned about the growing national_ _security_ _risks at our Northern Border._[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=411a5d139d254f0f8483e579799d54cf&_e=m8d2YHu5SKMyD4zvSxok_K39pn8HWf-wgBphtBjWRkgvdWh-KEUJmZCylhJS0EZ6-bbtWoiqLZbHgDcNUJp0uYp2SJWPFSA_gfvWH25vcosBqTRq5QjqyRP8lkER53_0WAHaYPVKFDa9Cclm1LcDLPDLAyKwoLfXDA9k9WLud0bcknCaUOwKtKQy6ZSZPdu3nLhrz-1Jbz55LhAWACEO2xAGZ48ZpLZif_-m9jU9QphgCM1jka5GU1vdX201Zw20XIAIbVfSFFpCYL_aeCrIUtYMnv_hbGuyCprg76htf50x0i2fbTzksK8O5J9JOr8YRlLk_6BUEYVzRqsMChq4Y2wOHHvIHvoir8PLDz8HbgqdSQ2MLfpeWlT2OQXxO6cA)**

Drug traffickers are using the gap in our vision to push their deadly products, creating a new wave of drug addiction and death in our northern border states. _**Our northern border crisis must be addressed! **_ Will Hurd represented the single largest southern border district in Congress. He also worked in U.S. intelligence overseas for years to defend our nation's homeland security. Over the last few weeks, he's spent significant time with northern border security officials and local Sheriffs to discuss what they see on a daily basis. [_**Add your name today to be a part of the solution.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=411a5d139d254f0f8483e579799d54cf&_e=m8d2YHu5SKMyD4zvSxok_K39pn8HWf-wgBphtBjWRkgvdWh-KEUJmZCylhJS0EZ6-bbtWoiqLZbHgDcNUJp0uYp2SJWPFSA_gfvWH25vcosBqTRq5QjqyRP8lkER53_0WAHaYPVKFDa9Cclm1LcDLPDLAyKwoLfXDA9k9WLud0bcknCaUOwKtKQy6ZSZPdu3nLhrz-1Jbz55LhAWACEO2xAGZ48ZpLZif_-m9jU9QpiVu22EbRuYvU-nSVfd78f4ye6VF8SWOsvhc5W1GLV6nKH8s_Wq_akk2hg1jzO9tXqOs41RDDjGOeoj4pPy_keS5AD27nmHNvPOi4LxRD9wvmkhWMojMoRQlegwCq8sISYR2f2jZtkhjgvo1g1H2IBC) Thank you,**Hurd for America**

clean_body: | | | | | Will is worried. We are losing the battle to secure our borders, my friend. Texas is experiencing an endless flood of lawlessness and illegal immigrants at our southern border. This crisis is the one that gets the attention of Washington, the press, and most Americans – but there's another border crisis that demands our attention. Our northern border has quietly become a real threat to homeland security. Cartels are using the Northern Border to flood our communities with fentanyl and other dangers. Add your name to your growing list of Americans who are concerned about the growing national security risks at our Northern Border. Drug traffickers are using the gap in our vision to push their deadly products, creating a new wave of drug addiction and death in our northern border states. Our northern border crisis must be addressed! Will Hurd represented the single largest southern border district in Congress. He also worked in U.S. intelligence overseas for years to defend our nation's homeland security. Over the last few weeks, he's spent significant time with northern border security officials and local Sheriffs to discuss what they see on a daily basis. Thank you,Hurd for America | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=63a2be2c4d0f4c84b5485f57f0b34915&_e=kOt4oNcjIpDvfgcc5nelF9pCqdlEF3M-eL-JZTLdWTDakJO9G9mn3fC_HmnXF-0L4Zlf556uvRNg1Jubz9igVROfVQCnHOWVSMb8NNN00ZJB0xudsc8g0-0lg9Jvfiqmc8p3mshAf0779qde5-9sgUWgPK5uz2PlpeGaB-hGwW4Yun7U7KrX-I4DeMgXQSYJbrtMhdkcyFb3gVLDb6iGcEaM0_pS2bXgGkYBVc587s7zffhyVu1DeesnGO4bC5Ez6dTSHOFR5OVc9xOrGeyexw1ue-XiTyOl-sX3wH9075BXs3gi585Wl_MoTJl2XAnsVk9gilzC8IgAjlIrz3W2Q6MvD6AP4ffG8ULsJGKLjWAxRwinDhxw2f7vBWpmSLPSYW-GWiL_T8pdm6Igz3Mkycv_Te08fvCBauiHUh6gBcrWmVsPEYPzULOS7uJo9lDL)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

| Hi there,

body:
Tomorrow is Vivek's 38th birthday. I hope you'll help us celebrate
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_t=OzTqnsO3fd_5zQlvVRjmGSpc95Bz8CCHioJTcn9l3SiYUDhCWKo-KJnsJwLEsFLlbMC15YueN94t5h3ZYiBe5tJ8RJ8TPrAsg2KSPeFjGCQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_t=OzTqnsO3fd_5zQlvVRjmGSpc95Bz8CCHioJTcn9l3SiYUDhCWKo-KJnsJwLEsFLlbMC15YueN94t5h3ZYiBe5tJ8RJ8TPrAsg2KSPeFjGCQ%3D)

Peter - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Apoorva, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy's wife.

I am sending my first campaign email to you because there's something very special happening tomorrow - _**Vivek's birthday!**_

With the debate only a few weeks away and little time to celebrate I am hoping **[you will join us to wish Vivek a happy birthday and give him words of encouragement!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_e=Ms14xh5tWShb45vP9H1J9AqYsA1yWVkc93PUcOIFHW7oakEb34fDZSUQyR0fv7czCqf5A1N85vMuBmxg__hBECCPeQqLb9SQa1s8EO3NpYdf-HVrC8LngGRtR4SfwTJY8Q04Mhz2Q1RuLM0_cMgyXWoR1o7A67oSt8rd7OiRUvDbyfpVfJb2FeyiKliCw4WRF0k6nCwtNFHkpSXyjX9UJwuddEjmOUZuU0aTnLe8q0ChR9hSZBw0gD4vTgiKPQNY1CrIWUZo3xj48ORHiBZD36J1fSDy7zsuIOMRetAVnIZw_XobEaqMBsBziU2YK4bIKBxW_2t8xrdw9TG68fQBV-neZ7swAViLSEGv01RcZTVdc8P47YnS0zOROCZKJXxnd4Xvmtr7ivN8VfvYSNS9c16HGhNcsq2YJvP9R0L9meArzgKvucjIb8Jw6H2sYzQNsDm_q669oayzYQdVCSEoY8qvdfurS51nvPEoHuIBpWp17exDfv_9VhvQIv28XwGd2FyNuMExUIC1iHIQn7umYA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_e=Ms14xh5tWShb45vP9H1J9AqYsA1yWVkc93PUcOIFHW7oakEb34fDZSUQyR0fv7czCqf5A1N85vMuBmxg__hBECCPeQqLb9SQa1s8EO3NpYdf-HVrC8LngGRtR4SfwTJY8Q04Mhz2Q1RuLM0_cMgyXWoR1o7A67oSt8rd7OiRUvDbyfpVfJb2FeyiKliCw4WRF0k6nCwtNFHkpSXyjX9UJwuddEjmOUZuU0aTnLe8q0ChR9hSZBw0gD4vTgiKPQNY1CrIWUZo3xj48ORHiBZD36J1fSDy7zsuIOMRetAVnIZw_XobEaqMBsBziU2YK4bIKBxW_2t8xrdw9TG68fQBV-neZ7swAViLSEGv01RcZTVdc8P47YnS0zOROCZKJXxn66HfZ9ce42oGiVUyeW64LtISvssUgtl51VQyQpH5_RxSSHUY8EZVbo867kmRpl9-osnOFWcXSNbLaB8-qzZuDYyWwrqdvfgVi7sUSUIpKuiNsTiSPpYLBL5XWJx4ZfCNBg1FkWCd31RKT2pxDu8P7Q%3D%3D)
Next year's election isn't a normal election - it's a revolution for American unity. Vivek is working tirelessly to ensure that revolution is not in vain and built on a foundation of your support. That's why his birthday to-do list is very short but important:
1. Decisive win at the first Republican Presidential Debate
2. Restore value in TRUTH and an American Identity our country can be proud of
3. Defeat Joe Biden in the 2024 election for president

We're counting on you to help make Vivek's day a special one! **[Please take 30 seconds to sign his card, send birthday wishes, and help Team Vivek!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_e=Ms14xh5tWShb45vP9H1J9AqYsA1yWVkc93PUcOIFHW7oakEb34fDZSUQyR0fv7czCqf5A1N85vMuBmxg__hBECCPeQqLb9SQa1s8EO3NpYdf-HVrC8LngGRtR4SfwTJY8Q04Mhz2Q1RuLM0_cMgyXWoR1o7A67oSt8rd7OiRUvDbyfpVfJb2FeyiKliCw4WRF0k6nCwtNFHkpSXyjX9UJwuddEjmOUZuU0aTnLe8q0ChR9hSZBw0gD4vTgiKPQNY1CrIWUZo3xj48ORHiBZD36J1fSDy7zsuIOMRetAVnIZw_XobEaqMBsBziU2YK4bIKBxW_2t8xrdw9TG68fQBV-neZ7swAViLSEGv01RcZTVdc8P47YnS0zOROCZKJXxn0wO9fENkrfsD9KBKkP1EqZagKlkYIEGKgbKZTz7hfnakYfno2v1MrT1XSz6xXUm5TP_ePE0FgC_sqhD_4RB_du2XYnFDcAXIHoJax1mNfbxwvPaoLsLEAzqFGdg5rsKbqLSImIs9Jbdc8_V-fiNdMA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

Apoorva Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f449705639b640d7b16dde1b1d60db21&_e=Ms14xh5tWShb45vP9H1J9AqYsA1yWVkc93PUcOIFHW7oakEb34fDZSUQyR0fv7czCqf5A1N85vMuBmxg__hBECCPeQqLb9SQa1s8EO3NpYdf-HVrC8LngGRtR4SfwTJY8Q04Mhz2Q1RuLM0_cMgyXWoR1o7A67oSt8rd7OiRUvDbyfpVfJb2FeyiKliCw4WRF0k6nCwtNFHkpSXyjX9UJwuddEjmOUZuU0aTnLe8q0ChR9hSZBw0gD4vTgiKPQNY1CrIWUZo3xj48ORHiBZD36J1fSDy7zsuIOMRetAVnIZw_XobEaqMBsBziU2YK4bIKBxW_2t8xrdw9TG68fQBV-neZ7swAViLSEGv01RcZTVdc8P47YnS0zOROCZKJXxnW2xg1T9hmts4LDwKSXF8QAukmwBpzrB80gfKFDRcpEywpOo88WuC3PjedPJgPNsFK16_7Gkze8l7Xu915kW6s-SLzhjHD3DJz0t0pPJaxyEv3PttPE7Q__5n7Z48OLdswEdhCpqX4fG0WquhJGs7tg%3D%3D)

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: We can’t afford to lose Tammy in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends - I am humbly asking you to support my friend and mentor, Tammy Baldwin, in her reelection campaign for Wisconsin’s Senate seat today.
[**Can you please contribute $3, or whatever you can give, directly to her reelection? 100% of your donation will go to her campaign. She is counting on our support.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.TAFWeP&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=1&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2) [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.TAFWeP&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=2&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
Plain and simple: Our country would not have made the progress it has without her continued leadership in Congress.
She is a trailblazer in the Senate — making history as the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history. She paved the pathway for women and members of the LGBTQ+ community in Congress all while working long and hard to protect and fight for equality and working families nationwide.
Tammy understands the extraordinary opportunity she has to make a difference and has fought relentlessly to lower prescription drug prices, protect same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, and so much more. Time and time again, she has gotten the job done.
But Wisconsin is a purple state and experts say, that Tammy’s seat is going to be critical in protecting the Senate majority in 2024, and I have no doubt that’s true.
But Tammy’s progressive record makes her a huge target for the GOP, and they will be pummeling her with dark money attacks.
We saw how Republican mega-donors and super PACs spent over $77 million on my race last year, yet only managed to win by a thin margin. I have no doubt they are prepared to double down and spend more this time around to try to defeat Tammy.
The stakes are high and we cannot afford to lose Tammy’s leadership in the Senate.
[**So I am asking, can you contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, directly to Tammy’s reelection campaign to protect Wisconsin and the Democratic Senate Majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.TAFWeP&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=3&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to Tammy Baldwin immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.e_kV1X&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=22&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.mc7sop&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=23&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.kCLp4Y&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=24&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.ZknFp6&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=25&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.KywlSs&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=26&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.TAFWeP&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=27&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
Thank you in advance for supporting Tammy.
\- Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-baldwin-solo.TAFWeP&refcode=em230808-1-t1&t=28&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=4719_196590_cnhzp2&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=4719%2E196590%2Ecnhzp2)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Dear Friends,
This campaign has been going quickly. And it is only getting faster. There is just one week until ballots drop for the primary. That’s right: we are SEVEN days away from votes beginning to come in for this race.
**Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $500 to help us ensure Becky will be our next member of Congress?**

subject: Witchcraft, blood sacrifices, and more…
body:
Last year, our Democratic candidate only lost this district by 25 votes. But this year, we’re planning earlier, fundraising harder, and pulling out all the stops. | | |
---
| | Let us introduce you to Jim Guzofski, the Republican nominee for a special election in New Hampshire next month. Guzofski is so out there he’s equated abortion to _“blood sacrifices,”_ thinks Biden is an illegitimate president, and called vaccines _“witchcraft.”_ **Is that someone you want writing our laws and voting on legislation that could affect you and your family? We certainly don’t think so, which is why the DLCC is doing everything we can to defeat him next month, but we need your help.** [Will you rush $7 to help defeat extremists in states like New Hampshire and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOqdByigWrn0C46IIpC9qFm_Gp5VpYErxJolLEVw3rQOCFey91VEsL1uwM4NuVYbsVv-nvK3WXI7GqLWrgh40SRj_cnumVuC5zjn9dJH-yHMfVkiG3C9BeNCv2W3KscGrQaZqEAJhIyTxA39Ts-FgJWkfzxNmU3kuGSF3Ys4Fios_0Gpx1hJvMFFMzpIIjI6uIFC-3X-IgIgfDtzwvZDoUvi1_7xJEAA7wZRef56Y0mnpQp1OhM1iJoC7GtLjJJYCZQcUE_WmPrp-icAklaRP_VCp0uhN6MzgTdymE_sjosgk4KuNIhnmfjvJCsk5bHdUes1F4D9ODBYXiYGoR5osyTfII1-XH8osf-n7_ZxTYw_x/3yk/wYQ-VSO3Q7mCx3VEbv_Rag/h0/f0m_XUKpDnaWV9WEjQ4blUSpOIWTjTTl1UjMp1Zn7gA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I be honest?
body:
Hey -
I’ll keep this quick.
I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline in just one week. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10]
National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.
That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. Can you chip in today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=10]
Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=5]
Chip in $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=25]
Chip in $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=50]
Chip in $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=100]
Chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-tester-split-august23?refcode=em_fr_b2_080823_Tester-surrogate_30AC&amount=5]
Thanks for everything you do.
— Jon Tester

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions.
Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_Ask_06132022&amount=5]

clean_body: Hey - I’ll keep this quick. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline in just one week. [] National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you. That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. Can you chip in today? >> [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] Thanks for everything you do. — Jon Tester Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [] CHIP IN $5 >> []
