Our campaign hit a new milestone today!

Big news to share, Peter – I’ve officially qualified to be on the ballot this November! I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who helped our campaign get to this point — we’re one step closer to making our vision for a stronger Louisiana a reality. subject: Saturday morning with Max?
body:
You could make a real difference. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, our campaign is making a BIG push this weekend to spread our message...and you could make a real difference.

As part of our grassroots effort to reach as many voters as possible, Max is organizing volunteers to knock on doors with him this **Saturday, August 12 at 9 AM** in **Newport Beach.**

[_Can you spend a couple hours with us on Saturday morning to knock on some doors and connect with actual voters?_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=f0e784371a&e=86e91e802d)

[_**> >> RSVP HERE**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=13f754f6a7&e=86e91e802d)
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=799015c915&e=86e91e802d)
---
| Talking to voters face-to-face isn't just the most effective way to win over supporters to our campaign...it's fun:
* We'll have donuts, coffee and water.

* We'll give you a list of doors to knock on and a script.

* We'll even do a quick training to make sure everyone knows what to do!

Volunteers are at the heart of everything our campaign does. Every door we can knock on brings us one step closer to bringing new leadership to Orange County.

**[_Please RSVP here if you can join us for a few hours and knock on some doors this Saturday, August 12 at 9 AM._](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=827beeff7d&e=86e91e802d)**

See you Saturday!

\- Max Ukropina for Congress

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Kevin is a game-changer
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This Marine and mayor is exactly the leader we need in Congress. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=c1318a3992a0455aac8023eb729659d6&_t=KG-KOLHg0Z5L-GlDkynib3m5DqDQVlYt8qOK3XufvHTNhNZXa9t7tPhU1P3MLPyx7TaAGvvhBOsz9D94_HVVIK6EADuLsaAwVeyzVEwpDJU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=c1318a3992a0455aac8023eb729659d6&_t=KG-KOLHg0Z5L-GlDkynib3m5DqDQVlYt8qOK3XufvHTNhNZXa9t7tPhU1P3MLPyx7TaAGvvhBOsz9D94_HVVIK6EADuLsaAwVeyzVEwpDJU%3D)

Fellow conservative,

Congressional Democrats won’t know what hit them...

**Kevin Lincoln** just announced his candidacy for California’s 9th Congressional District – one of the top seats we’re targeting to flip in 2024.

The latest Republican polling shows us within the margin of error against McConnell’s protégé, Daniel Cameron. My opponent and his allies will spend and say whatever they can to try and defeat me. We cannot let them stand in the way of the progress we are making for Kentucky. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- The outside groups supporting my opponent have already spent over $8 MILLION to try and buy this race. As we inch closer to Election Day, they will spend millions more to fill up the airwaves with attack ads. Peter: It won't be easy, but I believe we have what it takes to compete with their spending and secure a win this November. But I need this grassroots team to show up strong in the final months and help me keep making progress for Kentuckians. Are you ready to keep fighting with me? = Thank you, Andy = | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

JD Vance is one of the few patriots in Washington that's focused on actually delivering: making our country safer, making necessities more affordable, and protecting the foundation of our country that the Left is trying so hard to destroy. | JD Vance is approaching the most important deadline of 2023. He needs the support of grassroots patriots LIKE YOU to push him through to the top. If you have a few spare bucks, can you chip in to push patriot JD Vance over his goal? JD Vance really can't fend off the radical agenda on his own. He needs you to step up & take responsibility, are you up for the challenge? Thank you, Team Vance Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

clean_body: | | | All of our country’s problems would be solved if we had better leadership. If you agree I need you to keep reading. This is John with Team Hung Cao. Just last week Hung announced he’s running for U.S. Senate in Virginia \- and things are starting to rapidly escalate. If you don’t know him - here’s a quick recap. His family escaped communist Vietnam where he fought uphill to make a name for himself. He fought for our country for 25 years in some of the most dangerous corners of the world. Now, Hung is fighting to save our country from the wrath of radical-socialism And he’s got his work cut out for him, our opponent is Tim Kaine, Hillary Clinton’s former running mate in 2016. Hung Cao isn’t afraid of a fight, he’s been brawling his whole life, and he’s seen what happens in countries when leaders don’t step up. Hung is ready to fight for us, just like he did for 25 years in the military. The only way we can do that is through the support of Patriots like you. Would you please chip in to help him out? **Here’s why we’re excited.** The Supreme Court’s recent ruling in _Allen v. Milligan_ struck down racially gerrymandered maps in Alabama and required the state to draw new, fair maps before the next election. According to experts, the Court’s reasoning could also lead to maps being redrawn in states like Arkansas, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas.

**But here’s why we’re worried.** Instead of complying with the Court's order, Alabama Republicans instead passed a second map that also violates the VRA. If GOP lawmakers run out the clock, they could keep manipulated maps in place for the next election!

[**_Right now our movement faces both a critical opportunity and a significant challenge – and that means your grassroots support has never been more important. Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting nationwide for fair maps and a strong democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67794912/420875255/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230808_FR_7T_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTQxNmE4LTQxMzYtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cFj6V_fSUQXXAjmGZIbUUUViaWTFBh7aXyXJT4Cgkx4=)

clean_body: | Team, did you see what A.G. Holder said? | “Ahead of last November’s elections, our movement helped secure what the New York Times called ‘the fairest House map of the last 40 years.’ Now, we have an opportunity to secure even fairer maps before the 2024 elections – but we must act quickly. ” = Here’s why we’re excited. The Supreme Court’s recent ruling in Allen v. Milligan struck down racially gerrymandered maps in Alabama and required the state to draw new, fair maps before the next election. According to experts, the Court’s reasoning could also lead to maps being redrawn in states like Arkansas, Georgia, Louisiana, and Texas. But here’s why we’re worried. Instead of complying with the Court's order, Alabama Republicans instead passed a second map that also violates the VRA. If GOP lawmakers run out the clock, they could keep manipulated maps in place for the next election! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks to this Supreme Court ruling, there could be a major shakeup of congressional maps across the country. According to FiveThirtyEight , “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.” But it’s not a done deal, team. Republicans are fighting like hell to protect their gerrymandered maps – and if our movement loses steam, they could get away with it. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Team Pramila
subject: They want to make us afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
They’re spewing horrific attacks against trans youth and the LGBTQ+ community.
#
Peter,
Extremist groups like Moms for Liberty are a danger to some of the most vulnerable people in our communities. **They’re spewing horrific attacks against trans youth and the LGBTQ+ community** in general, and they’re even going as far as to incite violence. It’s unacceptable and it has to end now.
Make no mistake, these extremists want to make us afraid to support LGBTQ+ rights. **But Pramila Jayapal can’t be bullied** — she’s not afraid to stand up for human rights here at home or anywhere around the world. She’ll never back down in the fight for justice, and that’s exactly the kind of fighter we need in Congress.
[**If you stand with Pramila in this fight, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can today? Anti-LGBTQ+ forces will spend big to advance their agenda in the next election, and we need to be ready to fight back.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44042?refcode=em20230808-2787&t=1&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44042?refcode=em20230808-2787&t=2&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)**
Powerful right-wing, anti-equality forces are incensed that their bigoted views are no longer informing our laws, and they are fighting with everything they’ve got to reverse the progress we’ve made on trans rights and LGBTQ+ rights in general.
We can’t assume that the progress we’ve won will endure, especially with a Supreme Court captured by right-wing interests. We need public servants **at every level of government** who are committed to defending our LGBTQ+ neighbors, and Pramila has always shown that she has the courage to do just that.
[**Now more than ever, with extremist groups like Moms for Liberty on the rise, those who stand for equality like Pramila need our help to keep up the fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44042?refcode=em20230808-2787&t=3&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)[**Peter, c an we count on you to pitch in $3 or any amount today to support this important work?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44042?refcode=em20230808-2787&t=4&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44042?refcode=em20230808-2787&t=23&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)**
Thank you,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230808-2787-footer&t=24&refcode2=2787_420207_aOaGxw&akid=2787%2E420207%2EaOaGxw)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

The Biden administration is revving up for [another attempt](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e5c6c4b098b248b3acfd49d77b434ef1&_e=8Ud8COkV4E7FelAXeDmWhYsEVb8TwjUYTNhBx08S6MkfCmpBfpi2hcoT_Po5bBz8mlWUcha-1Xh39PC4HFMxRQqPnS6u0n33-DelcKHikWd_1DsfE28wWVCN_CU-u4VwaEBnDaJB02GHwJA5SLL0ikQQdydqb9PLK7YY-3IDgt9CHhLCINMf-Eesn58JLvMFV5YsuTmqMlaxKNpTaeCCbTezxI5oXBYLC1y6FdhOWVG_0ZDc59tHv67x1skIVf2cyOTuRGpAZnsgicTcceQPE087scZl3rZCbfEVAhqy57kOq1RWxEMiRq6H6QCjlHpu) to control what you drive. As someone who’s parents fled similar failed policies in communist Cuba to seek freedom and the American Dream, I’m inspired by Bernie’s story.

He came to America from Colombia with his family in search of the American Dream, eventually achieved citizenship, and became a successful businessman who created thousands of jobs in Ohio.

**Becoming an American is one of the greatest honors of Bernie’s life** , and now he’s running to save the American Dream for his children and future generations.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to stop funding fossil fuels and stop climatechange’s deadly impacts like extreme heat

body:
I introduced two policy solutions to stop the climate crisis: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvRLOtceFZ9DYnhss1_uWkAG85t31TmYK7uPe9H0_4T7yW4oOq71PRukghWLPCR3pW3P0wz5vV5ptJepKjw3sjHIVZp2-0HJnPWXuaMZNJ1eetntgVT-u8R1IYJURyzb4Y7vvjHynX4sWgbSOQjJ_HFWvvzPqwAgAu_8wGvSHH3gI2MCiSinzHpDaCcF3PGwi_DIF4SHuiAOuWtkR-p0PE1Rlb6cc0dK36ChIpuK7zeggSsUv385Zb4Ng0324Rq4vbwwr9HL87-_nk6fseJe2hFkjdGxCd3aNgBjf5UWawmucKAEJ6GlrkwDixNRciTv5w/3yk/-oYzYa9zRASE1DvICaDrmg/h0/0hgmDOFKzvfSl71PjGFGxo1YP6LQjXrbIRTdrSyWUrE)

Friend, The Earth is burning. July was the hottest month ever recorded, with long stretches of extreme heat. **These deadly heat waves will continue through August, and will keep getting more intense and more frequent because of climate change.** To have any hope of avoiding the worst impacts of climate change, we must take immediate and drastic action to stop burning fossil fuels. This year, I introduced two policy solutions to meet the scale of this crisis by pushing financial institutions and insurance companies to stop funding fossil fuel projects: the **_Fossil Free Finance Act_** __ and the **_Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act_**. [**Please sign the petition now to support the**** _Fossil Free Finance Act_****and the**** _Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act_****so we can urgently protect our communities from the climate crisis.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QL7FUppoF6PQ6vvutqw0DjGfSuE-zs-fAl1RDuxwwEgBSNStRVUNUVvaZ645JXgprqWvSgukxPrj20Qdtk1LvK3CyRam_IKltAD07TLmbHH7qvUjlBUraN5ZypBOF49j2BBH0yf0RzKyKd2rVTdU-1vshfHmEVcqBoB91loN0lhhU_HZ2GhBvsJjk6M02jUPn619Nx8r7MnW8Phjbm5dU1SBeACOidtbhNVMfUPYTPdGn8bnOUSQzp0y6vGysxCnmBq1SpQAEiFgqtE1bkkezeQZ_fx40neqf7lW_KZdnBW8e5vjqHtgbRHihD3CX6Ko53qqsDj1BsUWqjAxNuNxxJ5fP_oCGtJmlvGSITlb2jkBfkT7jZrVIAu7WYualEh5pDYJZwVzUIzeTNNakfTcdzmxL_Bf8CmUw27NTgQBBZSHjBF-e8PvXx8KyfGwTJCwAUWgCBn5xefsoclYw55fptQ/3yk/-oYzYa9zRASE1DvICaDrmg/h1/nZwXqxCVaWiuR5PjN_eQ81dhy4GLksit_XThMMXs2sw) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QL7FUppoF6PQ6vvutqw0DjGfSuE-zs-fAl1RDuxwwEgBSNStRVUNUVvaZ645JXgprqWvSgukxPrj20Qdtk1LvK3njeY4fqJF77bd_tmFxmYBJCytA1Qa9yQDoegjVsDtn86ZK782qopHbEnWBvWEGlHnois6KRGLxUF4RFDCiVN9_cOv0cDGc_jmSvHY8b0NtLqhQzvJ1BkZE3oNgTWttZT7ld9cUNh8ZgSl0Bn3EcIchGawMmmufWn21n7jaJlbG-NonZGOPMlGpduhx1DdSQkLF-QdLdKZfCvmOj0HAxR3MghG5itsCYvHabAhRoyBCdog2Ja6t-xzr06XfQUN98bhvXZlOWEIVWTU4DphZ7uXa-0XrQgY_vS8c9QM9FNXXydLYszpxpDlkVpu1VhLo7ODzHwmf43rTEgE-EnCUOcvNR-Ig6UTHBnHk0beBZcLu8n6D1s80CSDP13qugtqFNg/3yk/-oYzYa9zRASE1DvICaDrmg/h2/6ffcBohSxXKXoUoAY8Qi-9liC5hjyh-sdcL4Eqa8H_g)
---
The **_Fossil Free Finance Act,_** introduced with Rep. Ayanna Pressley and Sen. Ed Markey, would require the U.S. Federal Reserve to finally address the climate crisis.
Under the Federal Reserve’s supervision, financial institutions provided trillions in direct fossil fuel financing. The Federal Reserve is supposed to protect our economy, not surrender our planet to corporate polluters or shepherd our financial system to its destruction.
The bill would mandate financial institutions to stop financing projects linked to increased greenhouse gas emissions, to prioritize withdrawing funding from companies and projects that have a disproportionate negative impact on low-income communities and communities of color, and to prioritize lending to companies that provide benefits to workers impacted by the transition to a clean energy economy. We must always center the people who already face environmental racism, including many in my community.
The **_Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act,_** introduced with Rep. Adam Schiff, would require insurance companies to disclose their investments and underwritings related to coal, oil and gas projects, and fossil fuels.
As our communities face increasing climate risks, major insurers are refusing to cover communities most vulnerable to climate change. But at the same time, these insurers continue to invest in and underwrite the fossil fuel projects and companies driving the climate crisis. The American public deserves to know how the insurance industry is bankrolling the climate crisis.
[**Please sign the petition now to stop climate change’s deadly impacts by supporting the**** _Fossil Free Finance Act_****and the**** _Polluter Portfolio Disclosure Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QL7FUppoF6PQ6vvutqw0DjGfSuE-zs-fAl1RDuxwwEgBSNStRVUNUVvaZ645JXgprqWvSgukxPrj20Qdtk1LvK3ES-yb8m6zsP44MMvM_Qc3Zi6eoR7dmuknWSRheSNHDuQ9z9T6lMSEp086bjXnrx-t3JWhPv-IBIrMZS7TOg6mhshuIKxVq1AI7Mn6K-51fML8vkRA4fvsxpoB-vu_xGmlylo1HumoSm7XBgqxLOM1f0U7Mr-ZQb_aEPXwhjdhsSJOfqzvJVi0-p2HNFfukG6nJ0yG7fZhYItxmDezmPU8AP9RP4t6ySkktUJ1WUwv8a2DnblZg6AW5FClQjRVs7FoZowGAiMZiC4skZq4sDTmy4xv1-5GvaW93r-a1SEn46ANPoSwvEylNZj747qo1fwLNY_OZ7OSxFIbObqYyvV1Q06syzQbAfg2MsrgIb6iKjdgvmmKxky4Y_5mrSiUwVw/3yk/-oYzYa9zRASE1DvICaDrmg/h3/6IA90-jnkwGg6Y_y4LAw_ybHfyQHOpYq2bjWPz1SDnI)
Thank you for taking action to protect our communities.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | You’ll be the talk of Louisiana. | Friend, IT’S OFFICIAL: Since you’re such a loyal supporter, we wanted to give you first dibs before everything sells out! Just take your pick of the merchandise listed below: Hats are a classic, and much-needed this time of year to protect you from the Louisiana sun! | If you want to show off your support while making a trip to the grocery store, then grab our Cassidy for Senate bumper sticker. | Or if you want to enjoy your morning coffee while listening to Sen. Cassidy lead the way in promoting sane and constitutional policies, then get our coffee mug! | We look forward to seeing you rocking this gear. \- Team Cassidy | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Team Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 = \- ==

subject: Hoping to hear your direct thoughts on Trump's indictment

body:
There have been a number of major developments. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67795187/420876272/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjkyMmJlMy00NDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPd-nzoah4JqjUGyGj-0FfSyo1CYFZQkbBrVZ1SwCpY=)
Peter, Last week, Donald Trump was handed his third indictment -- and for arguably his most serious charges yet. The indictment gets to the crux of Trump's role on January 6th, and whether he personally engaged in a conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election results and disrupt the transfer of power. There have been a number of major developments since:
* **According to a new poll from _ABC News/Ipsos_ , a staggering 65% of American adults are calling these charges "very serious." **Notably, this poll shows an 11-point increase among _independent voters_ who consider this indictment very serious compared to Trump's previous indictments.
* Despite that, Trump loyalists in Congress like Marjorie Taylor Greene have threatened to **cut funds from federal law enforcement** \-- including from special counsel Jack Smith who filed the criminal indictment charges.

**[We want to hear from you. What are your thoughts on the latest news relating to Trump's indictment? Please take our 3-minute survey below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67795188/420876273/1150188459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjkyMmJlMy00NDM2LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPd-nzoah4JqjUGyGj-0FfSyo1CYFZQkbBrVZ1SwCpY=&emci=fcb3148e-4336-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cb922be3-4436-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=17577837)**

name: (2) me, Team Trump
subject: RE: Did you miss our new ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | Friend,

---
Everybody knows that President Trump can’t get a fair trial in Washington, D.C. – the single most Democrat district in the entire country!

---

subject: Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable Republican in the country (new polling)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you please let me explain what this means for our movement?
#
Peter — last week, a new _Morning Consult_ poll showed us that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Senate GOP incumbent up for re-election in 2024.
Before I ask you to **[chip in toward my campaign to replace him,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) please let me explain what this information means for our movement here in Missouri:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)**
**Since Josh Hawley’s last election in 2018, he’s shown us he’s nothing more than a fraud and a coward.** We saw it on January 6th, 2021 — when he raised his fist outside the Capitol, then ran away from the rioters he raised his fist in support of just hours earlier when he thought it’d help his ambitions. And we’ve seen it in communities all across Missouri, as he votes time and time against investing in our state and uses his power to strip away the rights of everyday people.
But it isn’t just us taking notice. Some of Hawley’s long-time GOP mentors and mega-donors have already publicly abandoned his campaign. And a report earlier this year showed Hawley facing _“intensely negative sentiment”_ among Missouri voters.
**So this new poll confirms — Hawley is the least popular, most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024.**
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)**
But I will not lie to you — this won’t be easy.
GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee started attacking me on the first day I got into this race, and they haven’t let up. Now GOP mega-donors just put $1 million into a Super PAC to bail Hawley out with what will certainly be a wave of false and negative attack ads against me and our movement.
**They’re afraid. They know we can win this race. And so they’re going to try and stop us.**
That’s why I need your help today, Peter. This race in Missouri is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024 + our only chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and we cannot afford to waste it.
**[Can you chip in $10 or more right now so we’ll be able to take advantage of this opportunity, fight back against the GOP insiders and mega-donors trying to tear down our campaign, and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, so you know I’ll always stand up and fight for real people like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35445?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35444?refcode=em20230808-3527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)
---
Missouri voters already know how to take back their power at the ballot box from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley. Over the last three election cycles, they’ve used their vote to reject anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, raise the minimum wage, expand healthcare, and legalize weed with huge statewide margins.
And next year, we’re going to do it again by replacing Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
Thanks for being on this team, Peter.
Let’s get moving,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230808-3527-footer&t=13&refcode2=3527_614464_Pz3tF4&akid=3527%2E614464%2EPz3tF4)**

We’re now less than _three months_ from Virginia’s 2023 elections.

Abortion rights in our Commonwealth are hanging by a thread. If the GOP takes control of the State Senate (in which Democrats currently hold a mere 2-seat majority) they’ll have a legislative trifecta. **Glenn Youngkin and Virginia Republicans have promised to pass restrictions on reproductive freedom the first chance they get.**

clean_body: With 3 months to go, abortion rights in the Commonwealth are hanging by a thread = We’re now less than three months from Virginia’s 2023 elections. Abortion rights in our Commonwealth are hanging by a thread. If the GOP takes control of the State Senate (in which Democrats currently hold a mere 2-seat majority) they’ll have a legislative trifecta. Glenn Youngkin and Virginia Republicans have promised to pass restrictions on reproductive freedom the first chance they get. And in the final three-month sprint to Election Day, things are coming down to the wire. A new poll of Virginia voter preferences has Democrats and Republicans exactly tied in a ballot test for State Senate. = Jennifer was a proud defender of reproductive rights when she was in the State Senate, and she’s determined to keep the chamber out of the hands of anti-choice extremists.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Youngkin and his allies have amassed millions of dollars to spend this fall on marginal State Senate races.
